MAP:CHI01ObjectiveText.text:
MISSION OBJECTIVE 
 Destroy the Nuclear Warhead Storage Facility

MAP:CHI02Open.text:
Hong Kong, China 
 Hong Kong Crisis

SCRIPT:CHI02AudioHolder01.text:
<Red Guard speaking> 
 'General, we're all that's left of the assault force! We need to build a Command Center and get the radar up to receive new orders'

SCRIPT:CHI02AudioHolder02.text:
<Red Guard speaking> 
 'General, if we don't get our radar up we can't receive intelligence on the enemy's position. We need that radar'

SCRIPT:CHI02AudioHolder03.text:
<'EVA' speaking> 
 'General, you're alive!?! We thought we lost you when the bridge went down. Well, you're not out of danger yet, so let's get started'

SCRIPT:CHI02AudioHolder04.text:
<'EVA' speaking> 
 'First, you're going to need to finish your base. The barracks, reactor, and supply center are all essential to your survival, so finish constructing them immediately. I'll contact you again once your base is complete'

SCRIPT:CHI02AudioHolder05.text:
<'EVA' speaking> 
 'Excellent, your base is complete, except for a War Factory. We need to get you one now. There should be a surplus base--with a War Factory--here'

SCRIPT:CHI02AudioHolder06.text:
<'EVA' speaking> 
 'I don't know what condition the base is in, but it should allow you to build armored units to help your fight. Get there as soon as possible, General.'

SCRIPT:CHI02AudioHolder07.text:
<'EVA' speaking> 
 'Now we know the GLA's reason for coming to Hong Kong: They're targeting key buildings around the city. Our main objective is to destroy all of the GLA's forces, but if we can also keep them from destroying those buildings, our leaders would be most grateful.'

SCRIPT:CHI02AudioHolder08.text:
<'EVA' speaking> 
 'If you can keep your radar operating, I can track the Terrorists for you and give you their possible targets.'

SCRIPT:CHI02AudioHolder09.text:
<'EVA' speaking> 
 'General, a Terrorist is leaving the Convention Center, and he's strapped with enough explosives to bring down a building! I'll mark the Terrorist in red on your radar. I'll mark his possible targets in yellow. Stop him before he reaches one of those targets!'

SCRIPT:CHI02AudioHolder10.text:
<'EVA' speaking> 
 'Another Terrorist has left the Convention Center! I'll mark his location in red. His possible targets are marked in yellow. Stop him, General.'

SCRIPT:CHI02AudioHolder11.text:
<'EVA' speaking> 
 'General, this building is a Terrorist target--we must protect it!'

SCRIPT:CHI02AudioHolder12.text:
<'EVA' speaking> 
 'General, the Terrorists have taken over the Convention Center! You're going to have to destroy the Convention Center and the attached parking structures to stop the Terrorist threat.'

SCRIPT:CHI02AudioHolder13.text:
<'EVA' speaking> 
 'Excellent, you've reached the surplus base. Hmm, it's not much to look at, but it will allow you to build tanks, and more War Factories, if you need.'

SCRIPT:CHI02AudioHolder14.text:
<'EVA' speaking> 
 'The Terrorist threat is finished. Good work, General.'

SCRIPT:CHI02AudioHolder15.text:
<'EVA' speaking> 
 'General, I've detected GLA armored units on the move. They didn't come from the Convention Center, so the GLA must have another base somewhere in Hong Kong. Find that base and destroy it!'

SCRIPT:CHI02AudioHolder16.text:
<'EVA' speaking> 
 'General, the GLA have brought their Toxin Tractors with them. You'll know them by the green ooze they spray. Keep your infantry units away from them and use your tanks to deal with this new threat.'

SCRIPT:CHI02AudioHolder17.text:
<'EVA' speaking> 
 'Good work, General, you've destroyed the Toxin base. Now they shouldn't be able to build any more Toxin Tractors.'

SCRIPT:CHI02AudioHolder18.text:
<'EVA' speaking> 
 'Wait, General, there is a large force up ahead. I'll call for an EMP strike to clear the area, standby.'

SCRIPT:CHI02AudioHolder19.text:
<'EVA' speaking> 
 'That should give you a clear path to their base. Let's finish this, General.'

SCRIPT:CHI02AudioHolder20.text:
<AutoFerry Capt. speaking> 
 'Finally, the military is here! Those Terrorists are ruining my business! If you put your forces aboard I'll take you out to the Convention Center. You can sneak in the backdoor and catch them by surprise. Jut hit the Transport button when you're ready.'

SCRIPT:TrainingMove.text: Left click on units to select them. Selected units can be given commands. With a unit selected you can left click on the ground to give them a move command. Left click on enemy soldiers to order your selected unit to attack

SCRIPT:TrainingCommand.text: You have liberated a USA Command Center. Here you can use many of your special abilities. To choose technologies and special weapons click on the flashing General button

SCRIPT:TrainingExplor.text: The Fog of War around your units can be pushed back by moving into new and unexplored areas. The Fog shows you where you have explored and where you have not. Explore new areas to find enemy forces and resources to expand your army

SCRIPT:TrainingBarracks.text: You have liberated a USA Barracks. Buildings like this allow you to train new units. The Barracks trains soldiers. Left click on your new Barracks to see what soldiers you can train. Left click on a unit in the Barracks to spend the supplies to create that unit

SCRIPT:TrainingPilots.text: You have freed several Pilots. USA pilots are often veterans of many battles and they can enter your vehicles to provide their skills and experience to the crew of the vehicle. Vehicles with golden chevrons near them have experienced crews and are more effective in combat

SCRIPT:TrainingSupply.text: You have liberated a USA Supply Center. Supply Centers collect supplies, providing you with the resources to build new buildings and units. Each Supply Center automatically generates a single Chinook helicopter that will gather supplies for you

SCRIPT:TrainingDozer.text: You have liberated a USA Construction Dozer. Left click on your new Construction Dozer to see what buildings it can create. Select the War Factory and choose a location for it to be built. Once done creating the War Factory, the Dozer will be available for other construction projects

SCRIPT:TrainingUnits.text: Your new War Factory can be used to build vehicles like Crusader Tanks. Left click on a Crusader Tank to order it to be built. You can left click multiple times to order multiple tanks to be constructed

SCRIPT:TrainingPower.text: You have liberated a USA Cold Fusion Reactor. Reactors are used by American and Chinese forces to power their base. Your power bar indicates how much power your base has. If your base runs low on power base defenses may go off-line and your radar will go out

SCRIPT:TrainingAbilities.text: Some units have special abilities. Select a unit to see what special powers it has. Left click on the power to activate it. In the case of the USA Crusader Tank, each tank can build a single Battle Drone. Battle Drones are small robotic helpers that automatically engage enemies and repair their Crusader Tank in case it is damaged by enemy fire

SCRIPT:TrainingObjective.text: You have liberated an entire USA base and are now ready to carry the fight to the enemy. Each mission has mission objectives that you must follow in order to win the mission and to progress in your war against your enemies. Follow the mission objective to win the mission

SCRIPT:TrainingUrban.text: Civilian buildings can be occupied by soldiers. Order your soldiers to enter civilian buildings to get a defensive bonus. Civilian buildings occupied in this way are powerful strong-points for your troops and can be used to defend important routes into and out of your base

SCRIPT:TrainingTech.text: Civilian Objective Buildings can be captured by your Rangers. Holding these buildings will give you advantages against your enemies. Capture the Oil Derricks by selecting a Ranger, left clicking the capture button and then left clicking on the Oil Derrick itself. Oil Derricks provide you with additional resources as they pump oil

SCRIPT:TrainingCrate.text: Crates contain bonus items for your soldiers that will increase their abilities. Additional ammunition, armor and other items can be found in crates. Order your soldiers or vehicles to move onto a crate to open it and collect the contents

SCRIPT:TrainingMissionObjective.text:

LOAD:GLA04_3.text: - While Astana burns, loot the city for supplies

LOAD:GLA05_1.text: - The arrogance of the USA cannot go unanswered

LOAD:GLA05_2.text: - Keep region from their imperialist grasp

LOAD:GLA06_1.text: - Reports from the Aral Sea are not good

LOAD:GLA06_2.text: - US forces have control of our toxin storage facility

LOAD:GLA07_1.text: - GLA defectors have joined with China

LOAD:GLA07_2.text: - Assault the convoys and sever their supply lines

LOAD:GLA07_3.text: - Eliminate the traitors and their Chinese allies

LOAD:GLA08_2.text: - The missiles there will deliver deadly toxin to our enemies

MAP:TrainingGenerals.text: Left click on the generals button in the lower right corner of your screen to choose a new ability for your General. As you are promoted your General will gain access to new abilities. Some abilities will allow you to create new special units, while others will give you special powers that are used from your Command Center

MAP:TrainingSalvage.text: You have created a pile of salvage. Whenever GLA vehicles destroy enemy vehicles salvage is left behind. GLA vehicles can pick up salvage by moving over it. Salvage may be worth money or experience. Technicals, Quad Cannons and Marauders can upgrade their weapons with salvage

MAP:TrainingUpgrade.text: Upgrades are bought at different structures in your base. They improve your units. Left click on the Barracks and then left click on Capture Building icon to upgrade your Rangers to be able to capture enemy buildings

TOOLTIP:Shadows.text: Toggle showing shadows in game. Turn off for improved performance

TOOLTIP:BehindBuilding.text: Toggle showing units behind buildings. Turn off for improved performance

TOOLTIP:ShowProps.text: Toggle displaying game props. Turn off for improved performance

TOOLTIP:LowResSlider.text: Higher resolution textures can slow the game down

TOOLTIP:ParticleCapSlider.text: More particles can slow the game down

GUI:OlderReplayVersion.text: Loading may not display the replay properly, continue to load?

TOOLTIP:Shadows2D.text: Toggle showing 2D shadows in game. Turn off for improved performance

TOOLTIP:Shadows3D.text: Toggle showing 3D shadows in game. Turn off for improved performance

TOOLTIP:CloudShadows.text: Toggle showing cloud shadows on terrain. Turn off for improved performance

TOOLTIP:GroundLighting.text: Toggle showing detailed lighting on terrain. Turn off for improved performance

TOOLTIP:SmoothWater.text: Toggle smoothing of water borders. Turn off for improved performance

TOOLTIP:ExtraAnimations.text: Toggle showing optional animations like tree sway. Turn off for improved performance

TOOLTIP:NoDynamicLOD.text: Disable automatic detail adjustment. Turn off for improved performance

TOOLTIP:UnlockMaxFPS.text: Allows frame rates above 30. Affects game speed so only recommended for benchmarks

TOOLTIP:TreeSway.text: Toggle tree animations. Turn off for improved performance

TOOLTIP:TankTreads.text: Toggle marks left by vehicles. Turn off for improved performance

TOOLTIP:WaterWaves.text: Toggle wave animations on shorelines. Turn off for improved performance

TOOLTIP:BuildupAnimations.text: Show additional animations during structure construction. Turn off for improved performance

GUI:AdvancedOptionsToggleOnOff.text: Toggle On/Off - Off to improve performance

GUI:InternetDisconnectionMenuBody1.text: One or more players have been disconnected from the game. If you choose to vote a person out of the game then click the VOTE button next to the respective player. When the timer counts down to 0 that person will be removed from the game and the battle will continue

GUI:InternetDisconnectionMenuBody2.text: It is possible that the person is attempting to reconnect so you may choose to wait until this player's timer has elapsed. When the timer counts down to 0 that person will be removed from the game and the battle will continue

HELP:MOAB-01.text:
HINT: 
 MOABs are effective against vehicles and 
 will stun any survivors

HELP:Countermeasures-01.text:
HINT: 
 Upgrade to Countermeasures to help air units evade attacks

HELP:HellfireDrone-01.text:
HINT: 
 Upgrade your vehicles with Hellfire Drones 
 to increase effectiveness against armored forces

HELP:ChemicalSuit-01.text:
HINT: 
 Utilize the Chemical Suit upgrade to protect infantry 
 from deadly toxins and radiation

HELP:BunkerBuster-01.text:
HINT: 
 The Stealth Bomber's Bunker Buster upgrade 
 can damage garrisoned enemies

HELP:BunkerBuster-02.text:
HINT: 
 Bunker Busters can kill units inside of Bunkers

HELP:SupplyLines-01.text:
HINT: 
 The Supply Lines upgrade improves income

HELP:SupplyLines-02.text:
HINT: 
 Upgrade Supply Lines to increase 
 the efficiency of Chinooks

HELP:ListeningOutpost-01.text:
HINT: 
 Listening Outposts are stealthed and will detect 
 camouflaged units

HELP:ListeningOutpost-02.text:
HINT: 
 Listening Outposts have a very large sight radius

HELP:Helix-01.text:
HINT: 
 Upgrade a Helix with a Propaganda Tower to 
 repair and heal your nearby units

HELP:Helix-02.text:
HINT: 
 The Helix can be upgraded to drop napalm bombs 
 These can be dropped on targets beneath the Helix

HELP:Helix-03.text:
HINT: 
 You can upgrade a Helix with a Battle Bunker, 
 Propaganda Tower, or Gattling Cannon

HELP:ECMTank-01.text:
HINT: 
 Use the ECM Tank to disrupt enemy missile and rocket fire

HELP:Frenzy-01.text:
HINT: 
 Use the Frenzy Generals Power to increase the 
 firepower and armor of your units

HELP:InternetCenter-01.text:
HINT: 
 Place Hackers in the Internet Center 
 to increase money collection rate

HELP:InternetCenter-02.text:
HINT: 
 Build an Internet Center and upgrade to 
 Satellite Hack 1 and 2

HELP:SatelliteHack1-01.text:
HINT: 
 Satellite Hack 1 reveals all enemy Command Centers

HELP:SatelliteHack2-01.text:
HINT: 
 Satellite Hack 2 reveals all that enemy units can see

HELP:EMPMines-01.text:
HINT: 
 Mines can be upgraded to Neutron Mines, which will 
 disrupt enemy vehicles

HELP:NeutronShell-01.text:
HINT: 
 Neutron Shell attacks from the Nuke Cannon neutralize 
 vehicles, allowing any infantry to capture them

HELP:CombatCycle-01.text:
HINT: 
 Combat Cycles can jump off of cliffs

HELP:CombatCycle-02.text:
HINT: 
 Place a Tunnel Defender on a Combat Cycle to

HELP:CombatCycle-03.text:
HINT: 
 Place a Terrorist on a Combat Cycle to

HELP:CombatCycle-04.text:
HINT: 
 Jarmen Kell can snipe from a Combat Cycle

HELP:CombatCycle-05.text:
HINT: 
 Workers can use Combat Cycles to travel quickly

HELP:Saboteur-01.text:
HINT: 
 The Saboteur disrupts the abilities of enemy structures

HELP:Saboteur-02.text:
HINT: 
 Direct the Saboteur into an enemy Command Center 
 to reset their Generals Powers timers

HELP:FakeStructures-01.text:
HINT: 
 Build Fake Structures to fool your enemies

HELP:SneakAttack-01.text:
HINT: 
 Use Sneak Attack to instantly build a Tunnel Network 
 anywhere you can see

HELP:GPSScramble-01.text:
HINT: 
 Use the GPS Scrambler Generals Power to 
 camouflage friendly units

HELP:WorkerShoes-01.text:
HINT: 
 Purchase Worker Shoes to increase the speed Workers 
 travel and collect resources

HELP:CamoNetting-01.text:
HINT: 
 Camo-Netting camouflages your Stinger Sites 
 and Tunnel Networks

HELP:FortifiedStructures-01.text:
HINT: 
 Fortified Structures are harder to destroy

HELP:BoobyTrap-01.text:
HINT: 
 Booby Traps will detonate when an enemy tries 
 to garrison or capture the trapped structure

HELP:KingRaptor-01.text:
HINT: 
 King Raptors carry extra ammo and have more armor

HELP:CombatChinooks-01.text:
HINT: 
 Infantry inside of a Combat Chinook can fire in flight

HELP:AuroraAlpha-01.text:
HINT: 
 The Aurora Alpha is equipped with a small 
 but devastating Fuel Air Bomb

HELP:MicrowavePatriot-01.text:
HINT: 
 The EMP Patriot's Rockets are effective 
 against both vehicles and infantry

HELP:AdvancedRods-01.text:
HINT: 
 Advanced Rods provide more power than normal Control Rods

HELP:LaserTank-01.text:
HINT: 
 Build extra Power Plants when using Laser Tanks 
 They cannot move or fire when power is low

HELP:LaserDefenseTurret-01.text:
HINT: 
 Laser Defense Turrets are strong but require extra power

HELP:AssaultTroopTransport-01.text:
HINT: 
 Units can fire out of the Assault Troop Transport

HELP:AttackOutpost-01.text:
HINT: 
 The Attack Outpost can hold extra infantry and

HELP:FortifiedBunkers-01.text:
HINT: 
 The Fortified Bunkers come with Mines and 
 stronger armor and can hold extra infantry

HELP:Mini-Gunner-01.text:
HINT: 
 Mini-Gunners carry a personal Gattling Gun

HELP:InfantryBlackLotus-01.text:
HINT: 
 Your Black Lotus units have improved abilities

HELP:InfantryBlackLotus-02.text:
HINT: 
 You can build multiple Black Lotus units

HELP:InfantryHacker-01.text:
HINT: 
 The Infantry General's Hacker hack money faster

HELP:ChineseParadrop-01.text:
HINT: 
 The Chinese Paradrop parachutes Red Guard anywhere

HELP:EmperorTank-01.text:
HINT: 
 Emperor Tanks are the ultimate tank, 
 effective against both vehicles and infantry

HELP:EmperorTank-02.text:
HINT: 
 The Emperor Tank can be upgraded with a Gattling Cannon

HELP:EmperorTank-03.text:
HINT: 
 Emperor Tanks come equipped with Propaganda Towers

HELP:TankDrop-01.text:
HINT:

HELP:TacticalNuke-01.text:
HINT: 
 Your Airfield can upgrade MiGs to carry Tactical Nukes

HELP:IsotopeStability-01.text:
HINT:

HELP:AdvancedNuclearPower-01.text:
HINT: 
 Advanced Nuclear Power Plants generate more power than normal Nuclear Plans

HELP:ToxinRebels-01.text:
HINT: 
 Toxin Rebels shoot a stream of highly poisonous toxins

HELP:ToxinRebels-02.text:
HINT: 
 Toxin Rebels are resistant to toxin attacks

HELP:ToxinRebels-03.text:
HINT: 
 Use Toxin Rebels to quickly clear out garrisoned structures

HELP:ToxinNetworks-01.text:
HINT: 
 Toxin Networks fire streams of toxin from their cannons

HELP:ToxinTerrorists-01.text:
HINT: 
 Toxin Terrorists explode in a cloud of toxin

HELP:ToxinTerrorists-02.text:
HINT: 
 Use Toxin Terrorists to attack large groups of infantry

HELP:AnthraxGamma-01.text:
HINT: 
 Anthrax Gamma increases the damage of all toxin attacks

HELP:AnthraxGamma-02.text:
HINT: 
 Anthrax Gamma is even more potent than Anthrax Beta

HELP:AdvancedTrap-01.text:
HINT: 
 Advanced Traps are more powerful than normal Demo Traps

HELP:Demolitions-01.text:
HINT: 
 The Demolitions upgrade gives units the ability to detonate

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_2.text:
MISSION OBJECTIVE: 
 Destroy US European Central Command in the Northeast

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_3.text:
INCOMING TRANSMISSION: 
 Rescue the POWs and bring them back here 
 The Terror Cell will awaken to assist you against the US

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_4.text:
HINT: 
 Move the POWs to their village 
 in the North and they will assist us

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_5.text:
INCOMING TRANSMISSION: 
 Remove the American threat to 
 free the POWs from their captors

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_6.text:
INCOMING TRANSMISSION: 
 We are ready to return to our village in the North

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_7.text:
INCOMING TRANSMISSION: 
 You have rescued the POWs and returned them home 
 The Terror Cell will activate and begin to assault the US

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_8.text:
HINT: 
 Capture the remaining US structures 
 and build a second base here

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_9.text:
WARNING: 
 Time is running out. Rescue the POWs

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_10.text:
WARNING: 
 We must eliminate the enemy's Southern 
 support base before they become too powerful

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_11.text:
INCOMING TRANSMISSION: 
 The Terror Cell has been eliminated 
 Do not let their deaths go unpunished

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_12.text:
INCOMING TRANSMISSION: 
 We have beaten the enemy. Victory is ours

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_13.text:
INCOMING TRANSMISSION: 
 The enemy is holding our brothers captive 
 Free them and they will assist us against the US

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_14.text:
INCOMING TRANSMISSION: 
 Intel has reported that the POWs will be moved soon 
 Infiltrate the US base to rescue them

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_15.text:
HINT: 
 Upgrade the China Command Center with Radar

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_16.text:
INCOMING TRANSMISSION: 
 Protect the GLA Terror Cell from US attacks 
 and secure the area

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_17.text:
HINT: 
 Build a GLA Command Center to use your Generals Powers

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_18.text:
INCOMING TRANSMISSION: 
 Our base is under attack

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_19.text:
WARNING: 
 The POWs are being attacked. Defend them

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_20.text:
INCOMING TRANSMISSION: 
 The POWs have all been killed 
 The Terror Cell joins us to avenge their deaths

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_21.text:
INCOMING TRANSMISSION: 
 The enemy has spread out to secure more resources 
 Remove them and use the resources for ourselves

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_22.text:
HINT: 
 Their base is massive 
 Perhaps Sneak Attacks will help us infiltrate it

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_23.text:
INCOMING TRANSMISSION: 
 With the small base neutralized, we can focus on 
 the US European Central Command base

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_24.text:
We have a plan... 
 We shall move in and capture the Chinese Base 
 and use it to drive the USA out of Europe

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_25.text: The U.S. European Central Command base must fall

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_26.text:
INCOMING TRANSMISSION: 
 We are being attacked from the East 
 Eliminate the southern US Support base

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_27.text:
INCOMING TRANSMISSION: 
 The Terror Cell is being attacked by the US 
 Assist them in repulsing our foes

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_28.text:
INCOMING TRANSMISSION: 
 Rescue the POWs from the US support base before 
 they are transferred to a new location

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_29.text:
MISSION OBJECTIVE: 
 Destroy US European Central Command in the Northeast

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_30.text:
US Central Command, Stuttgart-Vaihingen, Germany 
 'Sneak Attack'

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_31.text:
US Central Command, Stuttgart-Vaihingen, Germany 
 'Sneak Attack'

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_32.text:
HINT: Remove the Americans from the area 
 then secure the supplies

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_33.text:
HINT: 
 Finish off the Central Command Base

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_34.text:
HINT: 
 Capture Oil Derricks and secure additional supplies 
 Capture Artillery Platforms to control key areas

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_35.text:
HINT: 
 Upgrade the Cash Bounty 
 Generals Power to increase income

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_36.text:
HINT: 
 Use the Sneak Attack ability to 
 launch an attack against the US base

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_37.text:
INCOMING TRANSMISSION: 
 The POWs have been moved away 
 Despite our failure, the Terror Cell pledges their support

MD_GLA05-MilitaryBriefing:String_38.text:
US Central Command, Stuttgart-Vaihingen, Germany 
 'Sneak Attack'

TOOLTIP:BioStrategyLong_Pos0.text: General Malcolm "Ace" Grainger prefers to utilize the maximum airpower available to defeat his enemies

GUI:BioDefeatedEntry_Pos0.text: I guess It's time for me to go find a good airline job.

GUI:BioVictoriousEntry_Pos0.text: I win, you lose. What more is there to say?

TOOLTIP:BioStrategyLong_Pos1.text: Dr. Thrax prefers to mix deadly toxins to defeat his enemies

GUI:BioDefeatedEntry_Pos1.text: Perhaps I shouldn't have gotten my degree from a mail-order college.

GUI:BioVictoriousEntry_Pos1.text: You thought my toxins were ineffective and now look what has happened to you, General.

TOOLTIP:BioStrategyLong_Pos2.text: General Tsing Shi Tao prefers to utilize nuclear radiation to defeat his enemies

GUI:BioDefeatedEntry_Pos2.text: Another moment and I would have reduced you to dust.

GUI:BioVictoriousEntry_Pos2.text: You are lucky to have survived this battle intact. Challenge me again if you dare.

TOOLTIP:BioStrategyLong_Pos3.text: General Alexis Alexander prefers to build heavy base defenses and build superweapons to defeat her enemies

GUI:BioDefeatedEntry_Pos3.text: It's not fair! One more Super Weapon and I would have beaten you, General. Challenge me again, I dare you.

GUI:BioVictoriousEntry_Pos3.text: I told you you'd never beat my Super Weapons, General. Care to try again?

TOOLTIP:BioStrategyLong_Pos4.text: General Ta Hun Kwai prefers to construct well built tanks to defeat his enemies

GUI:BioDefeatedEntry_Pos4.text: You may have defeated my tanks, General, but the Tigress will crush you like an insect.

GUI:BioVictoriousEntry_Pos4.text: Tanks are the key to any victory... as you well know.

GUI:BioBirthplaceEntry_Pos5.text: Fort Union, Redwood Shores, California, USA

TOOLTIP:BioStrategyLong_Pos5.text: "Pinpoint" Townes prefers to utilize cutting edge laser technology to defeat his enemies

GUI:BioDefeatedEntry_Pos5.text: You defeated me, General, but I will scan your tactics and devise a superior strategy.

GUI:BioVictoriousEntry_Pos5.text: Your weaknesses became obvious when I scanned your tactics.

TOOLTIP:BioStrategyLong_Pos6.text: Prince Kassad prefers to use camouflage and covert ops to defeat his enemies

GUI:BioDefeatedEntry_Pos6.text: My men will not accept this defeat from their leader, General. You have signed my death warrant with your superior tactics...

GUI:BioVictoriousEntry_Pos6.text: Accept your bitter defeat and remove yourself from my sight, General.

TOOLTIP:BioStrategyLong_Pos7.text: General "Anvil" Shin Fai prefers to enlist highly trained soldiers to defeat his enemies

TOOLTIP:BioStrategyLong_Pos8.text: General Rodall "Demo" Juhziz prefers to wire up powerful explosives to defeat his enemies

TOOLTIP:BioStrategyLong_Pos9.text: General "Tigress" Leiong Leang demands the use of all other technology to defeat her enemies

GUI:BioDefeatedEntry_Pos9.text: This has been an interesting contest. Perhaps you will challenge me again.

GUI:BioVictoriousEntry_Pos9.text: Improve your skills and challenge me again.

TOOLTIP:BioStrategyLong_GLA.text: The Global Liberation Army prefers underhanded and sneaky tactics to defeat its enemies

TOOLTIP:BioStrategyLong_China.text: China uses fire and overwhelming numbers to defeat its enemies

TOOLTIP:BioStrategyLong_USA.text: The USA utilizes high tech weaponry and skill to defeat its enemies

TOOLTIP:BioStrategyLong_Random.text: This selection will randomly choose a faction

CREDITS:CameoPhotoshootStudio.text: Photos shot at Out West Studio

ACADEMY:BuildAllStructures.text: When you're on the battlefield it's important to utilize all the tools available to you, General. Make sure you build all the structures. You must maintain a strong military force

ACADEMY:BuildSupplyCenterEarlier.text: General, one of the most important functions of a strong leader is making sure that the soldiers have plenty of supplies. We suggest that you make sure to build a Supply Center or Stash whenever you begin a mission. Supplies bring you cash and cash brings you victory

ACADEMY:TryBuildingRadar.text: The Fog of War surrounds us all. One helpful way to see through the pea soup is via radar. Each faction is unique in how it obtains the eye in the sky. The USA Command Center automatically comes with radar, the Chinese Command Center must be upgraded and the GLA must build a Radar Van from its Arms Dealer

ACADEMY:BuildMorePeons.text: If you ask any other Generals they'll confirm a simple rule: The grunts make the army. In order to build your base you'll need to put your Dozers or Workers to work. These guys are key to your future success so don't forget them!

ACADEMY:TryCapturingStructures.text: General, sometimes it's easier to take what you want rather than work for it. If you build the "Capture" upgrade from your Barracks you'll be able to steal enemy structures. There are also Tech Buildings littered around the battlefield that can enhance your army even further

ACADEMY:SpendGeneralsPoints.text: With war come the spoils. Every time you destroy an enemy you'll earn your way toward more Generals Points. These can be spent by pressing the "star" button on the right side of the Command Bar. Simply open the Generals Points menu and spend your hard earned points on some new war toys

ACADEMY:TryUsingSuperweapons.text: What's the use of collecting Generals points if you don't use them? If you've purchased Generals Powers by using your points an icon will pop up on the right side of the screen. Simply press it and watch the fireworks begin. The more points you spend, the more powerful the power

ACADEMY:TryGarrisoningAStructure.text: Soldiers can be effective in the open, but are deadlier when garrisoned inside civilian buildings. Select your soldiers and send them into an empty structure. They'll be protected by the walls - unless a Flash Bang, Toxin Tractor or Dragon Tank comes their way

ACADEMY:IdleBuildingUnits.text: General, fielding and leading a great army should be your highest goal. Make sure you're building your fighting units by clicking on a Barracks, War Factory, Airfield, etc. and then clicking a respective picture in the bottom Command Bar. It will be money well spent and will help you achieve victory

ACADEMY:TryDragSelectingUnits.text: Manipulating your army is one of the trickiest things a General must learn. While you can click on each individual unit, it's usually faster to "lasso" a group of units. Simply click and drag the box around the units. They will now be in your control. If you click on another area the units will move to this spot

ACADEMY:ResearchUpgrades.text: A great General can make a lot of tanks, but a greater General can make a lot of better tanks. Almost every unit has some form of upgrade. It's often best to spend your money on improving what you already have

ACADEMY:RanOutOfPower.text: While the GLA has no need for power, China and the USA eat it up like popcorn. To keep a base running strong a General needs to spend money on plenty of power to supply the war machine. Make sure to build a Cold Fusion Reactor or a Nuclear Reactor for maximum output. Low power can mean a low success rate

ACADEMY:BuildMoreGatherers.text: General, make sure you're building plenty of Workers, Supply Trucks or Chinooks to keep your income flowing. You can make extra gatherers by clicking on rescource gatherer's picture in the Supply Center or Stash. Don't be shy about maximizing your resource potential

ACADEMY:BuildAHero.text: Jarmen Kell, Col. Burton and Black Lotus can be invaluable to your strategy. These heroes can turn the tide of a battle and are invisible to the enemy. To locate your hero on the radar, look for the cross hair icon. Though you can only build one at a time don't underestimate their importance

ACADEMY:PickStrategyCenterPlan.text: The US Strategy Center is a very helpful structure. You should remember to choose the strategy that best fits your gameplan. Search & Destroy, Bombardment and Hold the Line are all excellent ways to give you the edge you need. Along with these overall strategies you can purchase many upgrades from this building

ACADEMY:UseTunnelNetwork.text: When it comes to the GLA sneaking around the battlefield is their calling card. Tunnel Networks offer defense capabilities but they also allow the player to move around quickly. Simply build a few Tunnel Networks and send your units inside. Click on the structure and you can expel them from any other Tunnel Network anywhere on the map. They are key to the overall GLA strategy

ACADEMY:UseControlGroups.text: Managing a large army can be a bit unruly sometimes. One way to manage lots of units easily is by creating a "control group". Simply select the group of units in question and press "Ctrl" & a number at the same time. Now anytime you press this number, the group of units will be selected. Tap the number twice quickly and the camera view will center over the group

ACADEMY:UseSecondaryIncomeMethods.text: General, acquiring supplies later in a mission can be difficult. Each faction has a unique way to gain funds during long battles. China can build Hackers and an Internet Center. You can direct the Hackers to hack the internet for funds anywhere or just send them inside Internet Center to gain money even quicker. The GLA depends on the Black Market and the USA relies on the Supply Drop. If you don't plan ahead you may have shortages

ACADEMY:ClearBuildings.text: Garrisoned buildings can be tough to handle - unless you know some tricks. Upgrade your USA Rangers with Flash Bangs, build GLA Toxin Tractors or Chinese Dragon Tanks to quickly clear out these strong points. The USA also can upgrade to the Bunker Buster to even clear out Tunnel Networks!

ACADEMY:PickUpSalvage.text: The GLA is a sneaky bunch but they're also resourceful. Whenever the GLA units destroy another vehicle a salvage bonus is left behind. Roll over the salvaged parts to upgrade your units, gain veterancy or get some extra cash. Salvage can make a big difference in a long fight so don't leave it just lying around

ACADEMY:UseGuardAbility.text: Sometimes it's important that units stay put and guard a particular area. Simply select the unit and press the "shield" button or "G" key and then select the area to be guarded. The unit will attack any enemies that enter its guard radius

ACADEMY:MultipleSupplyCenters.text: Supplies are the name on the game, General. They can be gathered at Supply Docks littered around the battlefield. While one dock may be enough early on it's usually best to branch out and find a few more during a mission. You'll need to build a Supply Center or Stash close to the Supply Dock to ensure efficient collection

ACADEMY:GarrionVehicle.text: Some units may enter or steal other vehicles. Stealing vehicles with Hijackers or Terrorists can allow you to sneak into enemy territory

ACADEMY:UseSelectionHotkeys.text: General, hotkeys are a great way to enhance your control of your forces. "E" will select all of the same unit types on the view screen. If you tap "E" twice quickly it will select all the same type across the entire battlefield. "Q" will select all your combat units on the map. "W" will select all your air units on the map. Give them a try, they'll help you out

ACADEMY:AlternateMouseInterface.text: One new addition is the "Alternate Mouse Interface" option located in the Options Menu. If you are used to commanding armies using right click as your action button then this may help you get a better handle on your army

ACADEMY:DoubleClickAttackMoveGuard.text: General, we have created a new way to direct your army. Simply select your units and double click the destination area. Your units will attack-move to the spot and then guard it. You may enable this through the options menu

ACADEMY:BuildBarracksSooner.text: In order to create a well balanced force you must build a Barracks earlier in the mission. Infantry can make or break your gameplan so it's best not to forget them

ACADEMY:BuildWarFactorySooner.text: While infantry and airpower can be great assets nothing quite beats a good tank. Be sure to build a War Factory or Arms Dealer earlier in the mission

ACADEMY:BuildTechStructureSooner.text: For the advanced weaponry there is no replacement for a Strategy Center, Propaganda Center or Palace. Don't forget to build one a bit earlier in missions to ensure success

ACADEMY:NoIncome.text: General, it's vital to your success that your income flow continues throughout the mission. Too many gaps lead to losing your edge. Make sure you're keeping the supplies rolling in consistently

ACADEMY:ClearMines.text: Demo Traps and mines can really be the start of a bad day. These sneaky tactics can be combated by using Dozers or Workers to clear these dangerous areas out

ACADEMY:UnmannedVehicles.text: General, some units can snipe or remove enemy drivers of a vehicles. When this occurs the vehicles become neutral and can be "borrowed" from the enemy. Feel free to go for a ride at your enemy's expense

ACADEMY:DisguisedUnits.text: Some units can disguise themselves as other units. There is nothing quite as satisfying as rolling a GLA Bomb Truck into an enemy base undetected and causing lots of havoc. Make sure to use this key tactic to further your battle plan

ACADEMY:StealthUpgrade.text: Some structures can be upgraded to camouflage, like the GLA Tunnel Network or Stinger Sites. These will be invisible to the enemy until its too late. Surprise!

ACADEMY:Firestorm.text: China has the unique ability to create a Firestorm when multiple MiGs or Inferno Cannons target a single enemy or area. Make sure to coordinate your attacks for maximum effect

TOOLTIP:HeatEffects.text: Toggle showing heat distortion effects. Turn off for improved performance

TOOLTIP:WeatherEffects.text: Toggle showing weather effects such as snow. Turn off for improved performance

DIALOGEVENT:EvaGLA_OpinionDestroyStatues.text: *Destroy the GLA's statues to increase our International Opinion, sir

DIALOGEVENT:EvaGLA_OpinionDestroyStructu.text: *Sir. Destroying enemy structures will increase International Opinion of us

DIALOGEVENT:EvaGLA_OpinionDestroyTroopsS.text: *Destroy more enemy troops to Increase International Opinion

DIALOGEVENT:EvaUSA_LaserDefenseSpeechSub.text: *General, our opponent has a stronghold in the middle of the city. His laser defense system is devastating, but requires lots of power. He will be forced to divert his power to one point of defense at a time. Use this to your advantage

DIALOGEVENT:EvaUSA_OpinionCivilianStruct.text: *General. Be careful that civilian structures are not destroyed
*Destroying civilian structures will adversely affect our International Opinion!

DIALOGEVENT:EvaUSA_OpinionDestroyStatues.text: *Destroy the GLA statues to increase International Opinion, sir

DIALOGEVENT:EvaUSA_OpinionDestroyStructu.text: *Sir. Destroying enemy structures will increase International Opinion of us

DIALOGEVENT:EvaUSA_OpinionDestroyTroopsS.text: *Destroy more enemy troops to Increase International Opinion

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xBrf01Subtitle.text: *General, the GLA managed to defeat the US forces in this area. We launched a devastating counter attack, but like roaches they are still alive

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xBrf02Subtitle.text: *Even now the GLA survivors are rebuilding

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xBrf03Subtitle.text: *To finally eliminate the GLA we must send in our forces and root them out of every dark corner in which they hide

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xBrf04Subtitle.text: *General, our new Listening Outposts are stationed in the area. They are at your disposal

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xBrf05Subtitle.text: *The Listening Outpost itself is unarmed, however its passengers can fire on enemies that venture too close. You will find its long sight range and stealth ability greatly enhances battlefield awareness

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xChat01Subtitle.text: *No GLA will slip past our garrison

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xChat02Subtitle.text: *Toxin Tractors! They're trying to poison us allwe need support!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xChat03Subtitle.text: *LookOil Derricksshould we capture them?

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xChat04Subtitle.text: *GLA in your home? Apply a little fireno more GLA

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xChat05Subtitle.text: *The GLA are rebuilding over therestand ready to attack

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xChat06Subtitle.text: *We will win this dayeveryone advance

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xCin01aSubtitle.text: *I did not think the United States would be defeated so easily

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xCin01bSubtitle.text: *I do not understand why the United States has allowed this to happen

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xCin01cSubtitle.text: *This can not be allowed to stand. China will make things right

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xCin01dSubtitle.text: *The GLA's treacherous use of our resources against the Americans has caused great embarrassment to China. They must pay for their insolence

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xCin02Subtitle.text: *The missiles are prepared and ready for launchfinal countdown started

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xCin04Subtitle.text: *They believe they have won the day, but they celebrate too soon

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xCin05Subtitle.text: *It is pretty when used for the right reasons

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xCin06Subtitle.text: *GLA survivors are running to town for coverthey must be stopped!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xCin07Subtitle.text: *We are in positionbomb bay doors open

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xCin08Subtitle.text: *We have spotted survivors. Ground assault will be necessary

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xXO01Subtitle.text: *General, our former base in the region was overrun by the GLA. You will need to construct a new base before you can engage the enemy

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xXO02Subtitle.text: *May I suggest that you garrison several of the nearby buildings to defend our base

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xXO03Subtitle.text: *General, the GLA has garrisoned several buildings throughout the town. Perhaps you could use a Dragon tank to clear out those garrisons

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xXO04Subtitle.text: *General, the GLA is moving Toxin Tractors towards our garrisoned buildings. If those tractors attack those buildings, everyone inside will be eliminated

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xXO05Subtitle.text: *The GLA are using these Oil Derricks to fund their forces. One of our Red Guard could capture those derricks. The proceeds would help defeat the GLA

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xXO06Subtitle.text: *General, is it wise to destroy these Oil Derricks? They would provide valuable resources for us. One of our Red Guard could capture them

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xXO07Subtitle.text: *You have caught them off-guard, General. One of your Red Guard could capture their buildings before they are able to respond

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xXO08Subtitle.text: *Now that you have re-established our base of operations, it is time to root out all remaining GLA forces in the area

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI01xXO09Subtitle.text: *Congratulations, General. You have freed the town of all GLA forces. Once you have wiped out their final base, your mission will be complete

DIALOGEVENT:MisChi02Lin13Subtitle.text: *The Terrorist threat is finished. Good work, General

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xBrf01Subtitle.text: *General, the GLA are attempting to steal the nuclear warheads stored at this facility

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xBrf01aSubtitle.text: *General, the GLA are attempting to destroy our main nuclear power plant

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xBrf02Subtitle.text: *Our brave soldiers held off their attack but at great cost and the GLA is still out there

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xBrf03Subtitle.text: *You must hold off the GLA and insure that every one of our Bunkers is protected

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xBrf03aSubtitle.text: *You must hold off the GLA to insure that the facility is not destroyed

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xBrf04Subtitle.text: *We have several new technologies that should be of great benefit to your mission, General

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xBrf05Subtitle.text: *Our Nuclear Cannons are now upgraded to fire neutron shells. These new shells effectively eliminate soldiers and vehicle drivers. Once the radiation has cleared, one of our infantrymen can then capture the surviving vehicles

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xBrf06Subtitle.text: *Our buildings can now upgrade to Neutron mines. While still effective against infantry, they will also temporarily incapacitate enemy vehicles

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xBrf07aSubtitle.text: *General, your reinforcements will arrive in 15 minutes

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xBrf07bSubtitle.text: *General, your reinforcements will arrive in 10 minutes

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xBrf07cSubtitle.text: *General, your reinforcements will arrive in 5 minutes

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xChat01Subtitle.text: *Enemy forces sighted. We will hold them back

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xChat02Subtitle.text: *We're taking fire on the right flanksupport is needed here

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xChat03Subtitle.text: *They are behind usdirect all fire to the south!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xChat04Subtitle.text: *GLA base in rangeall teams ready to attack, General

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xChat05Subtitle.text: *Enemy buildings on that ridge. Give the word, General, and we will roll over them

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xChat06Subtitle.text: *Watch those RPG Troopers! We need help!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xChat07Subtitle.text: *General, we are over the target area now and have commenced bombing

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xChat08Subtitle.text: *Rolling out the carpetof bombs. Heheh

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xChat09Subtitle.text: *Enemy air defenses are thick herewe are taking heavy damage

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xChat10Subtitle.text: *Stinger sites have locked onto uswe are in trouble!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xChat11Subtitle.text: *Stop that Rebel, he's trying to capture our bunker!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xChat12Subtitle.text: *It isn't a Battlemaster, but it will have to do

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xChat16Subtitle.text: *Now we will show them how to attack a base!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xChat17Subtitle.text: *Reinforcements! We are glad to see you!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xChat18Subtitle.text: *We are ready for your orders, General. Where do you need us?

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xCin01Subtitle.text: *We must be on our guard. Reports say the GLA might attack as revenge for our entering the war

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xCin01aSubtitle.text: *I don't feel safe guarding this nuclear plant

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xCin01bSubtitle.text: *Yah. I wish I had joined up with the air force instead

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xCin01dSubtitle.text: *Surely after our recent victory they would not dare to attack us here

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xCin01cSubtitle.text: *Their food is much better. And they get to wear those fancy helmets

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xCin04aSubtitle.text: *Another wave! They've got bomb trucks and terrorists! We need reinforcements!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xCin04bSubtitle.text: *Another wave! They're using suicide tactics! Where are those reinforcements?!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xCin06Subtitle.text: *They're trying to get to the storage bunkers! Protect them at all costs!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xCin06aSubtitle.text: *They're trying to get to the main reactor! Protect it at all costs!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xCin07Subtitle.text: *The Command Centerthey got the Command Center

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xCin09Subtitle.text: *Not much left. We're going to need reinforcements

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xCin10Subtitle.text: *The message got through, but we'll have to hold until they get here

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xXO02Subtitle.text: *General, GLA forces are attacking the bunkers

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xXO02aSubtitle.text: *General, GLA forces are attacking the nuclear plant!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xXO03Subtitle.text: *The GLA is attempting to capture one of our bunkers

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xXO04Subtitle.text: *General, this bunker is badly damaged. May I suggest it be repaired before another GLA attack

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xXO04aSubtitle.text: *General, our nuclear plant is badly damaged. May I suggest it be repaired before another GLA attack

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xXO05Subtitle.text: *General, that last attack severely weakened several bunkers. If one of them is destroyed, the GLA will win this encounter

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xXO05aSubtitle.text: *General, that last attack severely weakened the nuclear plant. If it is destroyed, we will fail our mission!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xXO06Subtitle.text: *WarningGLA forces moving towards the bunkers

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xXO06aSubtitle.text: *WarningGLA forces are moving towards the power plant!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xXO07Subtitle.text: *General, I've made contact with one of our spy outposts. They are under GLA attack. If we can rescue them, I can patch into their system and we will be able to call in carpet bombers

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xXO08Subtitle.text: *General, if you can secure that spy outpost, it will allow you to direct carpet bombing runs on the GLA forces

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI02xXO09Subtitle.text: *General, now that our reinforcements have arrived it is time to eliminate the GLA from this area

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI03xBrf01Subtitle.text: *Greetings, Commander. Now that we have thwarted the GLA's counterattack, it is time to press our advantage!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI03xBrf02Subtitle.text: *We must liberate this town from the GLA's clutches

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI03xBrf03Subtitle.text: *There is a very heavily defended GLA base north of the river. We must destroy it, but it will not be an easy task

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI03xBrf04Subtitle.text: *Our operations have attracted much attention from the rest of the world, and we will be watched closely. The longer this battle goes on, the lower our International Opinion will fall

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI03xBrf05Subtitle.text: *Damage to civilian property must be avoided. Our operation must be precise, and swift. Destruction of GLA forces will cause International Opinion to rise, in our favor

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI03xBrf09Subtitle.text: *If our International Opinion becomes high enough, the people of the town might join our cause

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI03xBrf10Subtitle.text: *It will then be easy to annihilate the GLA's defenses

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI03xChat01Subtitle.text: *They must have a camouflaged Tunnel Network near here

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI03xChat05Subtitle.text: *They are coming from the far side of the lake

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI03xChat06Subtitle.text: *Their troops must be hidden in the forest

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI03xChat12Subtitle.text: *The people are too afraid to come out from their homes

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI03xChat13Subtitle.text: *We must free them from this oppression!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI03xXO10Subtitle.text: *General. Destroying the GLA statues will be critical to increasing our International Opinion and will boost support of our efforts amongst the population

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI03xXO11Subtitle.text: *They have dispatched a Toxic Tractor to clear our garrisonned structures!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI03xXO12Subtitle.text: *Our Dragon Tanks will be a high priority targetguard them well

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI03xXO13Subtitle.text: *Well done, sir. The destruction of the statue has caused world opinion to rise

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI03xXO16Subtitle.text: *Do not let them destroy the buildings!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI03xXO17Subtitle.text: *Use the Neutron Shell to clear buildings without damaging them

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI03xXO18Subtitle.text: *Beware! Their defensive structures are hidden with camo-netting

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI03xXO19Subtitle.text: *General, the GLA have the city well-defended. We need to clear them out

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI03xXO20Subtitle.text: *You're making good progress, Commander. Much of the city is now free of GLA control

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI03xXO21Subtitle.text: *Sir! The city is rising up against our foes!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI03xXO22Subtitle.text: *General, we must clear the GLA from this area!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI03xXO23Subtitle.text: *Our International Opinion is high. Great work!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xChat01Subtitle.text: *They have almost escaped! We must stop them!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xChat010Subtitle.text: *They are skirting the lake. Intercept them!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xChat012Subtitle.text: *We have stopped the first wave of GLA!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xChat013Subtitle.text: *Again we have put them in their place!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xChat014Subtitle.text: *No one can stand to the might of China!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xChat018Subtitle.text: *We will banish them from the skies!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xChat03Subtitle.text: *We cannot let them get past that hill

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xChat04Subtitle.text: *They will surely pass by here. We should defend this area

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xChat15Subtitle.text: *Our forces are in position. We are ready for anything

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xChat16Subtitle.text: *They are stronger than we thought. We need air support. Send in the Helix now!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO01Subtitle.text: *The GLA is sending forth another wave!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO02Subtitle.text: *This wave is retreating towards the north

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO04Subtitle.text: *This wave is retreating to the east

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO05Subtitle.text: *The European Union is extremely pleased with our performance, General. We need to stay aggressive and eliminate the GLA

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO07Subtitle.text: *General, they have a scud storm! We must spread out our troops to deny them a target!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO09Subtitle.text: *The GLA have no honor! They have decimated the village to clear a path!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO10Subtitle.text: *We should assemble a base to secure this region

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO11Subtitle.text: *Our Helix is the Overlord of the skies. Build more to help us control the area

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO12Subtitle.text: *Sir, I recommend placing Listening Outposts at key locations

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO13Subtitle.text: *Current Intel reports that the GLA are retreating towards this location. We will make our stand here. Do not permit any GLA units to leave this area. Our new Helix Helicopter should assure your success. The appearance of our forces from the south will signal the completion of your main objective

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO14Subtitle.text: *Current Intel reports that the GLA are retreating towards this location. We will make our stand here. Do not permit any GLA units to leave this area. If too many of them escape, our mission will be a failure. Our new Helix Helicopter should assure your success. The appearance of our forces from the south will signal the completion of your main objective

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO15Subtitle.text: *A wave of GLA is approaching from the west

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO16Subtitle.text: *There is a wave of GLA approaching from the south

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO17Subtitle.text: *GLA forces have been spotted approaching from the southwest

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO19Subtitle.text: *A wave of GLA forces are approaching from the southwest

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO21Subtitle.text: *Excellent work, sir. Intel confirms that you have destroyed the entire wave

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO22Subtitle.text: *The enemy is about to breach our defenses

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO24Subtitle.text: *Our defenses have been breached commander, we have failed the mission

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO25Subtitle.text: *Commander, our forces from the south have arrived. Out mission was a success

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO26Subtitle.text: *General, enemy forces are dangerously close to making their escape. We must deal with them quickly!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO27Subtitle.text: *GLA forces have been detected fleeing through this location. Move into defensive positions and await enemy contact

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO28Subtitle.text: *General, Wave 1 of the enemies retreat has been detected entering the area and intel has them moving along the path shown on the your radar

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO29Subtitle.text: *General, Wave 2 of the enemies retreat has been detected entering the area and intel has them moving along the path shown on the your radar

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO30Subtitle.text: *General, Wave 3 of the enemies retreat has been detected entering the area and intel has them moving along the path shown on the your radar

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO31Subtitle.text: *General, Wave 4 of the enemies retreat has been detected entering the area and intel has them moving along the path shown on the your radar

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO32Subtitle.text: *General, Wave 5 of the enemies retreat has been detected entering the area and intel has them moving along the path shown on the your radar

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO33Subtitle.text: *Our forces have arrived from the south. You have been successful in preventing the enemy retreat. Good job General

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI04xXO34Subtitle.text: *General, the enemy forces have escaped to the North. We have failed the mission

DIALOGEVENT:MisChi05OfficerC01Subtitle.text: *It's time we corrected our mistake. Kill them all!

DIALOGEVENT:MisChi05OfficerC02Subtitle.text: *Let us flush these rats from their holes. Death to the cowards!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xBrf01Subtitle.text: *Thanks to your remarkable efforts in Halberstadt the GLA are all but finished. US intel has located the last GLA stronghold outside of Hamburg. Unfortunately we were too late to help the Americans in this area and the GLA captured their base. Build your forces and destroy both the GLA and US bases

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xBrf02Subtitle.text: *The GLA have captured an old US base in the region and are building up. Your Final Objective is to Destroy both the US and GLA bases

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xBrf03Subtitle.text: *The GLA have increased their stealth abilities, General. They can now stealth just about anything. We'll need to stay alert

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xBrf04Subtitle.text: *Use your Listening Outposts to detect stealthed units

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xBrf05Subtitle.text: *General, I suggest you first concentrate your attack on the US base. We need to take out their Particle Cannons

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xChat01Subtitle.text: *It feels like we are on an Easter Egg hunt, General

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xCin01Subtitle.text: *Corporal! Any sign of the Chinese yet?

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xCin02Subtitle.text: *No sir, the last message received was at 02:00nothing since

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xCin03Subtitle.text: *Well, I hope they get here soon. Our intel points to a full-scale GLA attack

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xCin07Subtitle.text: *Our base has been breached.all units to your stations! Where are those Chinese we were promised!?

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xCin08Subtitle.text: *Fox in the hole! Fox in the hole!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xCin10Subtitle.text: *They're capturing our buildings! We can't hold! All units, fall back! Repeat, fall back!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xXO01Subtitle.text: *That's it! Power to the US base is down! Finish them quickly before they can rebuild!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xXO02Subtitle.text: *Well done, General. The enemy can no longer produce US units

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xXO03Subtitle.text: *Well done, General. The enemy can no longer produce GLA units

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xXO04Subtitle.text: *Well done, General. The US base has been neutralized. Destroy the GLA base to finish this battle

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xXO05Subtitle.text: *Well done, General. The GLA base has been neutralized. Destroy the US base to finish this battle

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xXO06Subtitle.text: *We must finish what the US was not able to do. The GLA must fall and the world will be at peace

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xXO07Subtitle.text: *If we are able to defeat the GLA and save Europe from its clutches then there are great rewards to be had

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xXO08Subtitle.text: *General, you will take your place among China's finest heroes. The GLA has fallen and China is the shining beacon in a new world. Take you place of honor and bask in the glory that is China

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xXO09Subtitle.text: *General, the enemy has improved their stealth ability, but they do not appear to be using tanks

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xXO10Subtitle.text: *General, the GLA commander is lacking tanks. Perhaps we can overwhelm him with our forces

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xXO11Subtitle.text: *General, we are losing vehicles to Jarmen Kell. You must track him down if we are to stand a chance

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xXO12Subtitle.text: *General, the enemy is using HIJACKERS! We need to stop them!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xXO13Subtitle.text: *General, the enemy has positioned SNIPERs in the local villages. We must clear them out

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xXO14Subtitle.text: *General, we are losing troops to the enemy's Quad Cannons, we need heavy armor out here

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xXO15Subtitle.text: *General, current intel suggests Jarmen Kell may be holed up in this small village

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xXO16Subtitle.text: *General, the enemy's base seems to be on the other side of this river. Perhaps we can lock him in by positioning forces near the bridges

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xXO17Subtitle.text: *General, we have many driverless vehicles in the fieldsend units to recapture them

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xXO18Subtitle.text: *Sir! We have detected Battle buses in sector C. We should deal with them before they can reach our base

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xXO19Subtitle.text: *General, the enemy has slipped units into our base! We should improve our defenses!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xXO20Subtitle.text: *General, the enemy has infiltrated our base!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xXO21Subtitle.text: *General! Taking out the American Command Center will put a stop to his heavy Air support

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xXO22Subtitle.text: *General, we need to get our INTERNET CENTER built as quickly as possible. It will help us locate enemy positions

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xXO23Subtitle.text: *General, the enemy has left his Flank unguarded! Now is our chance to counter attack!

DIALOGEVENT:MisCHI05xXO24Subtitle.text: *General, the Americans have superior stealth detection technology. Perhaps you should capture this base instead of destroying it

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01Scorpion108Subtitle.text: *We have found a secret way. It's poorly guarded

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xChat02Subtitle.text: *Enemy position spotted! We must find a way past them!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xChat04Subtitle.text: *American Sentry Drones! We must destroy them quickly before they sound the alarm!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xChat05Subtitle.text: *Look at them scramble! Our attack was a complete surprise!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xChat06Subtitle.text: *American attackers closing in! We must hold our position, General!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xChat07Subtitle.text: *Our surprise was complete! All units, concentrate on their power plants!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xCin01Subtitle.text: *Patrol to base: Target has been located and we are in pursuit

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xCin02Subtitle.text: *Be advised, the bombing campaign has already begun. Be careful, Patrol

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xCin03Subtitle.text: *Roger that, base. I'm on the right

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xCin08Subtitle.text: *Base! Charlie three is down! Repeat: Charlie three is down!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xCin09Subtitle.text: *Continue pursuit, Charlie two! This is our best shot at him!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xCin12Subtitle.text: *Heh heh. General, we've made our escape.and are headed for the rendevouz point. The GLA shall rise again

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xCin14Subtitle.text: *This is scout team. We detect no enemy presence. Wait

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xCin16Subtitle.text: *Sentry Drones! These Americans are most clever. Their drones are hidden when they are still. You must proceed with caution, General

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xKen01Subtitle.text: *The Americans have surrounded our stronghold with military checkpoints. You must clear the way

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xKen02Subtitle.text: *General, you must help our true leader escape, so that the GLA can live on

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xKen03Subtitle.text: *Dr. Thrax may have died for the cause but he was inconsequential. If our brother escapes the US will not have seen the last of the GLA

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xKen04Subtitle.text: *General. The Fire Base defenses around this American position are too strong. We should avoid a direct confrontation and find another way into the base

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xKen05Subtitle.text: *Hold you forces back, General. We are sending in a team to scout the other side of the bridge. They will report back on enemy positions

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xKen06Subtitle.text: *My General. One of our Quick Strike teams has managed to elude their American pursuers, and have agreed to aid us in our mission. Their rocket pods should prove most useful against enemy armor

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xKen07Subtitle.text: *We have discovered one of our demolitions teams. They will help us to clear a path by destroying the outlying US support bases

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xKen08Subtitle.text: *General. We must secure the airfield before the transport plane arrives. The survival of the GLA depends on your success

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xKen09Subtitle.text: *Our Combat Cycles are very versatile. They enhance the abilities of our loyal infantry, and are able to travel over rough terrain. They are even able to survive a jump off cliffs. Use them to bypass American strong-points and attack their vulnerable sides

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xKen10Subtitle.text: *General! The Americans have sent a second group of pursuers to capture our leader. Protect him at all costs!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xKen11Subtitle.text: *General, this hidden base can provide us with the resources we need to push past the American siege and reach the airfield

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xKen12Subtitle.text: *General, our leader is under attack! He must not fall to the Americans!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xKen13Subtitle.text: *General, your forces are moving too far ahead of our leader. Remember that he must reach the airfield if our cause is to survive

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xKen14Subtitle.text: *Another American base. It must be eliminated. Be wary of their Fire Bases, sir

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xKen15Subtitle.text: *We are within reach of the airfield, General. Destroy the American forces and secure the area that we may fly our leader to safety

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xKen16Subtitle.text: *Well done, General. With you in command, we can not fail

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xKen17Subtitle.text: *We have reached the airfield, sir. Make sure our leader is ready and waiting at the air strip when his plane arrives

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xKen18Subtitle.text: *Our plane is on approach, General! Just hold your position for a little longer. Our leader must survive to board that plane!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xKen19Subtitle.text: *The plane has arrived. Load our leader in so that we may fly him to safety and regroup

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xKen20Subtitle.text: *The plane is waiting for our leader to board. Make haste and bring him in, General. Our forces cannot hold out indefinitely against the Americans

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xKen21Subtitle.text: *Our operative, Jarmen Kell, has been harassing the American supply lines. He will be of great help to our mission, General

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xKen22Subtitle.text: *Excellent work, General. We will show the Americans that we still have the power to resist them

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xKen23Subtitle.text: *We have discovered an advance scout force, General. They have offered to aid us with our mission

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xKen24Subtitle.text: *General! Take out the American power plants to shut down their base defenses!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA01xKen25Subtitle.text: *Our forces have been weakened, General. We must choose our battles more wisely

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02Chatter04Subtitle.text: *We are here and ready for your command

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xChat02Subtitle.text: *The resistance is too strong, there must be another way

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xChat03Subtitle.text: *The Prince must be stopped. The GLA must not fall to him!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xChat07Subtitle.text: *We must rebuild our Arms Dealer quickly

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xCin01Subtitle.text: *This is Recon 1 to base. I am finishing my patrol. Sector is clear

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xCin02Subtitle.text: *This is base. Are you certain, Recon 1? We've had reports of troop movements linked to Prince Kassad

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xCin03Subtitle.text: *I am most certain. I haven't seen anything but dust and shrubs for hours now. Returning to base after this

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xCin05Subtitle.text: *Recon 1 to base! Enemy contact! Repeat, enemy contact!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xCin08Subtitle.text: *Recon 1, what is your status? Recon 1! Report!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xCin09Subtitle.text: *Once Prince Kassad is removed the GLA will be under our control. Then vengeance will be ours and the American infidels will burn

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xCin10Subtitle.text: *Prince Kassad is beginning to take control wherever he can. We must put an end to his vie for power

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen01Subtitle.text: *General, our resources are running low -- we must find a new source of supplies!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen02Subtitle.text: *Kassad is attempting to capture nearby resources! We must not let him take what is rightfully ours!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen03Subtitle.text: *We must reunite the GLA under one leader!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen04Subtitle.text: *Beware! Kassad has launched a sneak attack against us!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen05Subtitle.text: *We have much bigger plans than that rat Kassad. The world will quake as we unleash the fury of the GLA

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen06Subtitle.text: *We have acquired GPS Scramble technology! Now we can use Kassad's tricks against him!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen07Subtitle.text: *Excellent, General! We have secured the Sneak Attack ability!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen09Subtitle.text: *If we can capture the enemy Command Center we can use their technology against them

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen10Subtitle.text: *General, we must capture their Command Center and use their knowledge to progress towards our goal of uniting the GLA under one flag

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen11Subtitle.text: *We are running low on resources. We must capture some oil derricks

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen12Subtitle.text: *Our enemy is attacking our Oil Supply! They must be stopped!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen13Subtitle.text: *Use the GPS scramble to sneak past the enemy defenses!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen14Subtitle.text: *The GPS Scramble will not work here, there are too many Stinger Sites.We will need to use a different tactic

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen15Subtitle.text: *Perhaps we can find an unguarded area to use our new Sneak Attack ability

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen16Subtitle.text: *Do not destroy the Command Center. We need to capture the structure and keep it intact

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen17Subtitle.text: *Their knowledge must be stolen. We need to use their advanced tactics to defeat them!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen18Subtitle.text: *General, be wary of snipers -- Kassad loves to use them

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen19Subtitle.text: *This bridge is heavily defended. We will need assistance in getting across it

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen20Subtitle.text: *Capture the enemy Command Center to the North!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen21Subtitle.text: *Capture the enemy Command Center to the West!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen22Subtitle.text: *General, if we capture this cannon, we can use it against Kassad's forces!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen23Subtitle.text: *If we capture the Command Center, we can use their abilities to turn the tide of this battle

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen24Subtitle.text: *Prince Kassad is no more. The GLA are once again united against our enemies!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen25Subtitle.text: *Now that we have GPS scramble, we can move unseen past Kassad's bridge defenses!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen26Subtitle.text: *The traitor has fortified himself on this hilltop and cut all other means of access. Sneak Attack is the only way we have to strike at his main base

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen27Subtitle.text: *General, this area is being controlled by Prince Kassad. He has turned his back on his brethren and will not aid us in our cause against the infidels

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen28Subtitle.text: *Kassad is a master of stealth, hiding his forces in plain sight. He refuses to share his knowledge with us, so we will take it from him

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen29Subtitle.text: *A GLA splinter cell commanded by Prince Kassad is controlling this area. Kassad refuses to let us use his abilities for the good of the GLA

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen30Subtitle.text: *Kassad is a master of stealth, relying on several techniques to surprise and attack his enemies

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen31Subtitle.text: *GPS scramble gives him the power to have any unit strike unseen against an enemy

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen32Subtitle.text: *Tunnel sneak attacks offer further tactical advantages

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA02xKen33Subtitle.text: *We must have these technologies. If Kassad will not share, we will take them from him. Capture his command centers and turn his own abilities against him!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03Kenwar15Subtitle.text: *We have spotted a Prison Camp, our brothers are held inside

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xBrf02Subtitle.text: *Kassad was too cowardly to make an attempt against the US such as this. General, you are truly a master mind

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xBrf03Subtitle.text: *Once the US Mediterranean naval force is shattered all of Europe will be in our grasp

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xBrf04Subtitle.text: *Now that we are again united, it is time to make our strength felt!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xBrf05Subtitle.text: *The USA has attacked our secret base in the Mediterranean

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xBrf06Subtitle.text: *But before it was wiped out, we learned of the location of their Particle Cannon and naval fleet in the region

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xBrf07Subtitle.text: *Most of their ships are in port and helpless. We will steal their Particle Cannon and use it to take out their Aircraft Carrier!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xBrf08Subtitle.text: *Look for an opportunity to reclaim and rebuild our secret base

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xChat06Subtitle.text: *We have them where we want them!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xCin02Subtitle.text: *Their carrier will be turned into scrap!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xCin03Subtitle.text: *We have proven the might of the GLA!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen01Subtitle.text: *Our Hijackers could take that tank easily

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen02Subtitle.text: *That Ranger is running for help! We must not let him get away

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen03Subtitle.text: *We'll need this Particle Cannon to sink the enemy Carrier. Defend it well!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen04Subtitle.text: *Our rebels can use their Capture Building ability to take control of the Particle Cannon

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen05Subtitle.text: *We can use our Sneak Attack to create Tunnel Networks on nearby islands

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen06Subtitle.text: *We must not let the pilot reach his Tomahawk!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen10Subtitle.text: *This Arms Dealer will serve us well

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen12Subtitle.text: *General, do you see those enemy supply planes? If we could destroy their drop zones, we would cripple their production!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen13Subtitle.text: *Ah, this toxic tractor will come in handy

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen14Subtitle.text: *These Quad Cannons will defend us from enemy aircraft

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen16Subtitle.text: *Destroy these tanks and we can liberate the Barracks!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen17Subtitle.text: *If we clear this area, we can safely occupy the Command Center

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen18Subtitle.text: *Kill those troops and the Arms Dealer will be ours!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen19Subtitle.text: *They may be launching an attack against us! Defend our buildings!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen22Subtitle.text: *They are trying to retake the Particle Cannon!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen23Subtitle.text: *Their aircraft have destroyed our Tunnel Network!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen24Subtitle.text: *Those clever villains! They are targeting our Power Plants. We need power to use the Particle Cannon

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen25Subtitle.text: *Almost all of the power plants have been destroyed. We must have power to use the Particle Cannon!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen26Subtitle.text: *If we could capture some power plants, we could use the Particle Cannon against them

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen27Subtitle.text: *Ahh.. We have found some hidden goodies

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen28Subtitle.text: *This pass is well defended. We should use the Particle Cannon to blast through

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen29Subtitle.text: *Be careful! This pass is heavily guarded!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen32Subtitle.text: *They have launched an A10 Strike against us!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen34Subtitle.text: *We have disabled their Supply Drop Zones! Their production will be crippled!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen35Subtitle.text: *Your mission is to destroy the enemy Aircraft Carrier with the Particle Cannon. You will have to penetrate their base on the mainland to get a visual lock on the Carrier so that you can destroy it

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen36Subtitle.text: *Great work! Now we must secure some Power Plants

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen37Subtitle.text: *The Tunnel Network will bring us to the next island

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen38Subtitle.text: *The Particle Cannon is now online. We should defend it and the Power Plants

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen39Subtitle.text: *All of our units and buildings have been destroyed!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen40Subtitle.text: *Without the Particle Cannon, it will be impossible to sink the Carrier

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen41Subtitle.text: *Now the Americans shall taste bitter defeat!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen42Subtitle.text: *They destroyed our Tunnel Network! Use the sneak attack to reclaim the Particle Cannon!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen43Subtitle.text: *We are closing in on the Aircraft Carrier. It is just south of here

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen44Subtitle.text: *There's the Aircraft Carrier! Destroy it using the Particle Cannon!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen45Subtitle.text: *Jarmen Kell is here to serve us

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen46Subtitle.text: *His snipe ability can disable enemy vehicles, allowing our infantry to then capture them

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen48Subtitle.text: *The Battleship is bombarding us! Destroy it!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen49Subtitle.text: *This must be the enemy's main base

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen50Subtitle.text: *These fake buildings will fool our foes

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA03xKen51Subtitle.text: *Build more fake structures to trick the enemy!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xChat01Subtitle.text: *We've got to clear out those bunkers!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xChat02Subtitle.text: *Their power is down! No Patriots to deal with!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xChat03Subtitle.text: *Break down the fences and rescue our brethren!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xChat05Subtitle.text: *An american chinook would help to transport our troops. Capture this supply depot if you can

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xChat06Subtitle.text: *Get some anti air over here, general! Their Comanches are tearing us to bits!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xChat07Subtitle.text: *General, we must find some way to take out these bridge defenses!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xChat08Subtitle.text: *General, we are using our cell phones to call in a surprise tunnel network!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xChat09Subtitle.text: *We'll need these tractors if we want to clear any bunkers

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xChat10Subtitle.text: *This ferry is under our control now! You will take us where we want to go!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xChat11Subtitle.text: *Yes, yes. I will do what you say!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xChat13Subtitle.text: *There sure are a lot of sports utility vehicles in this strange land

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xChat14Subtitle.text: *We have a GLA sympathizer in this area. He and his brothers have agreed to help us

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xCin01Subtitle.text: *This is team one. We are in position

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xCin02Subtitle.text: *My brethren, be careful, as we tread on enemy soil. Our main objective is to obtain chemical samples from the nearby American toxin facility

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xCin03Subtitle.text: *The remains of the American naval force have moved to the Mediterranean, in response to the loss of their command fleet. This has allowed us to slip in

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xCin04Subtitle.text: *We defeated them there, and we shall be victorious here
