DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xCin05Subtitle.text: *Brothers rejoice! Once we have the toxins from this facility, our scientists will be able to forge a weapon of mass infection

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xCin06Subtitle.text: *The Americans have meddled for too long. With this new weapon, we shall be able to strike fear into the hearts of our oppressors!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xCin08Subtitle.text: *Team one, are toxins secured and on board?

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xCin12Subtitle.text: *You are clear to proceed. We will defend your escape!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xCin14Subtitle.text: *Hold them back until we clear the landing strip!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xCin17Subtitle.text: *We'll meet again when we reach the toxin facility

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xCin18Subtitle.text: *The Americans think they have driven us out

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xCin20Subtitle.text: *We are nothing against this air power!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xCin21Subtitle.text: *You have not seen the last of us!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xCin22Subtitle.text: *We will get our revenge, you filthy Americans!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xCin23Subtitle.text: *Let's do our part to take down these capitalist pigs!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xCin24Subtitle.text: *These Americans will pay for the lives of our brethren

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xCin25Subtitle.text: *Let's light up these GLA intruders! Fox 1!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xCin26Subtitle.text: *GLA spotted offshore! All units to defense positions

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xCin27Subtitle.text: *We got GLA infiltration at coordinated 77BetaGamma! All available units move to respond!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xCin28Subtitle.text: *There's more of them on the beach!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xCin30Subtitle.text: *We've got GLA inside city limits! All units converge on coordinates 34AlphaAlpha

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xKen01Subtitle.text: *Good job, General! Only 15 more toxin samples to be retrieved

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xKen02Subtitle.text: *Good job, General! Only 10 more toxin samples to be retrieved

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xKen03Subtitle.text: *Good job, General! Only 5 more toxin samples to be retrieved

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xKen04Subtitle.text: *General, we have a plan to attack America's Central Command in Europe. But we do not yet have the power to strike at them directly. We need a new toxin weapon

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xKen05Subtitle.text: *Both of our forces are in place. The two groups must work together if we are to retrieve the toxins

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xKen06Subtitle.text: *Our hijackers can capture vehicles and they are stealthed unless they are moving

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xKen07Subtitle.text: *Jarmen Kell can snipe pilots from vehicles and also take out infantry at long range

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xKen08Subtitle.text: *Our Saboteurs can perform a number of secret operations like shutting down power plants

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xKen09Subtitle.text: *Our rebels are camouflaged, and can capture buildings to aid us in our cause

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xKen10Subtitle.text: *Good luck, General. May stealth and cunning be with you in your quest

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xKen13Subtitle.text: *General, there are mines here, but we cannot detect them! We need a Radar Van!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xKen14Subtitle.text: *General, get someone into that Valve station by the river. Draining the coolant reservoir will allow our brothers to continue further

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xKen17Subtitle.text: *General! Destroy that airfield before we are wiped out!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xKen18Subtitle.text: *General. We must destroy their power! Then the Americans will be sitting ducks for sure!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xKen19Subtitle.text: *General, we must capture that toxin facility

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xKen20Subtitle.text: *Excellent work, General. Now we must protect these trucks as they transport the toxins to the cargo plane

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xKen21Subtitle.text: *Use the trucks to begin gathering toxins from the facility

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xKen23Subtitle.text: *Another cell of hijackers has arrived to support our cause

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xKen24Subtitle.text: *Another cell of rebels has arrived to support our cause

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xKen25Subtitle.text: *JarmenKell has been found and he has returned to help our cause

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xKen26Subtitle.text: *Our brothers have broken through and provided us with reinforcements

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xKen27Subtitle.text: *The US will not suspect an attack on their soil after our victory in Greece

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xKen28Subtitle.text: *Kassad would never have had the courage to attack the US homeland

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA04xKen29Subtitle.text: *Once we've stolen the secret toxin agent from the US Bio Center, we will be unstoppable

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05Kenwar02bSubtitle.text: *Destroy the American airbase and they will lose much of their ability to project power in this region

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05Kenwar05Subtitle.text: *The Americans will use their airpower to stop us

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05Rebel02Subtitle.text: *We are defenseless against American air attacks!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05Scorpion105Subtitle.text: *American cowards! Fight on the ground, like men!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xChat01Subtitle.text: *This region is under the control of the United States Air Force General Granger. We can and will use force to remove you from this area. You are hereby under order to clear out immediately

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xCin01Subtitle.text: *Our forces are few, but we can use what we have to come out on top

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xCin02Subtitle.text: *Since we do not have a base in this region we must take one!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xCin03Subtitle.text: *The Chinese base We must strike now! Their Base will soon be ours!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xJarmen01Subtitle.text: *If you rescue our fellow comrades from the Southern US base, our elite warriors will fight alongside you!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xJarmen02Subtitle.text: *Thank you for rescuing our brothers! In return we will open up an area of the US base for you to begin your assault

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xJarmen03Subtitle.text: *Heh heh heh heh heh (Sinister Laugh) That will teach them

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xJarmen04Subtitle.text: *Do not let our deaths go unpunished!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xJarmen05Subtitle.text: *Together we have beaten the enemy! Victory is ours!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xJarmen06Subtitle.text: *Thank you for your help in rescuing my soldiers. We shall repay the favor and help you to take out the U.S. Central Command Base

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen01Subtitle.text: *Once this base is destroyed the US will scurry home like cowardly dogs. All of Europe will be ours

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen02Subtitle.text: *The Americans have our brethren held hostage in their base. We must rescue them

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen03Subtitle.text: *It is in our best interest to rescue the POW's from the clutches of the Americans

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen04Subtitle.text: *Good work! Capture or eliminate this base to ensure the POW's safety

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen05Subtitle.text: *We must transport them safely back home to their base in the North. No harm must come to them

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen06Subtitle.text: *We are running low on supplies. We must spread out and capture new resources

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen07Subtitle.text: *More attacks from the air! We must build more air defenses

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen08Subtitle.text: *Rebuild our defenses quickly, we haven't long before the next attack

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen09Subtitle.text: *The new toxin agent we borrowed from the US will be especially effective against their own forces

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen10Subtitle.text: *First the Mediterranean fleet, then an attack upon US soiland now begins our European domination

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen11Subtitle.text: *We are being attacked from the east. End the attacks now, we must eliminate them so we can focus on the main base to the north

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen12Subtitle.text: *Almost there The U.S. will pay dearly for their transgressions against our people

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen13Subtitle.text: *We are running low on funds. Scout the area for resources, we must not be stopped

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen14Subtitle.text: *With this area secure we must now build up and launch an assault on the U.S. European Central Command Base

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen15Subtitle.text: *The Americans are relying heavily on air units. Build more Stinger sites and Quad Cannons

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen16Subtitle.text: *They are targeting our defenses, we must camouflage the stinger sites

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen17Subtitle.text: *My General, we need to build a Scud Storm

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen18Subtitle.text: *The American General is using a Particle Cannon against us

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen19Subtitle.text: *We have to try a different tactic. Use a sneak attack to get units into the base

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen20Subtitle.text: *Capture the U.S. base and build it up. We can use their weapons against them

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen21Subtitle.text: *You must take out the Particle Cannon!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen22Subtitle.text: *They are attacking from the ground now. Defend our base!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen23Subtitle.text: *Rebuild the base quicklyWe must prepare for more attacks!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen24Subtitle.text: *Well done, General. Thanks to your superior tactics we now control all three super weapons. The Americans will never know what hit them!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen25Subtitle.text: *Finish the Americans, General. They cannot hold for much longer

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen26Subtitle.text: *General, we can target their chemical bunkers and create havoc in their own base

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen28Subtitle.text: *The Americans have built another Particle Cannon. They must not be allowed to use it against us

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen29Subtitle.text: *We must eliminate the enemy's Southern support base now! The longer we wait, the more their attacks grow in strength

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen30Subtitle.text: *Reports indicate that the POW's held captive in the U.S. Base will be moved soon. We must rescue them quickly!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen31Subtitle.text: *You will need to completely clear the U.S. base area to free the POW's

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen32Subtitle.text: *Hurry, the POW's need to be rescued now!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen33Subtitle.text: *We need to bring Radar online by upgrading it from the China Command Center

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen34Subtitle.text: *It is imperative that you build a GLA Command Center

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen35Subtitle.text: *With the small southern base gone we can focus on the U.S. European Central Command base

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen36Subtitle.text: *The U.S. Central Command Base is massive, we have to find a way in! Perhaps sneak attacks would work

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen37Subtitle.text: *We need to deliver the POW's to their village so that they will reawaken their Terror Cell

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen38Subtitle.text: *Our brothers are being attacked! We must help them!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen39Subtitle.text: *Return the POW's to their village, follow the river North until you reach it

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen40Subtitle.text: *The POW's are safe! We must help them return to their village so that they may aid us in our fight against the US!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen41Subtitle.text: *Take these tanks and we will use them as our own!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen42Subtitle.text: *Secure the supplies and we will hold the perfect area from which to launch our assaults on the Americans!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen43Subtitle.text: *The soldiers are safe and their families are full of joy! They will fight with us and we have been given more supplies as well

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen44Subtitle.text: *We have let our brothers down but they will still fight alongside us

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen45Subtitle.text: *Our brothers will fight on our side to avenge the death of the POW's!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xKen46Subtitle.text: *The Americans have moved the POW's, but our brothers will still fight alongside us against our enemy!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xPOW01Subtitle.text: *Free us from our captors. Protect us from all US attacks and we will assist you!

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA05xPOW02Subtitle.text: *We are ready to travel home when you are

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA06Chatter02Subtitle.text: *We're coming up on a bridge. No Americans

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA06General05Subtitle.text: *We have been discovered by the American scouts. Be ready to fight

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA06General20Subtitle.text: *You must push them back so you can take control of the bunkers

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA07Convoy13Subtitle.text: *We have found some supplies, could be useful

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA08Kenwar10Subtitle.text: *We will have to hit them with everything we have

DIALOGEVENT:MisGLA08Kenwar39Subtitle.text: *Our forces are prepared to begin the assault

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01Commander09Subtitle.text: *Echo company, bomber in-bound, you're too close, pull back!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01Eva02Subtitle.text: *General, capture enemy oil derricks to secure more supplies for the war effort

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01xBrf02Subtitle.text: *The GLA launched their missile from the Baikonur Facility early this morning. Intel reports that they are preparing a second launch

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01xBrf03Subtitle.text: *Use of this missile will severely weaken our foothold in Europe. It is vital that we remove this threat

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01xBrf04Subtitle.text: *Our sources indicate that the next missile is being transported to the launch facility by train. These tracks are the only way into the facility

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01xBrf05Subtitle.text: *If we can intercept that train in time, we can use it as cover to infiltrate the base

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01xBrf06Subtitle.text: *The first step in completing our mission is to secure and hold this Train Depot

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01xChat05Subtitle.text: *Get some infantry into these vehicles! We can use them to help defeat the GLA!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01xChat06Subtitle.text: *Somebody garrison that Radio Station! We need air support now!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01xChat08Subtitle.text: *Ok boys. Let's load 'em up, and mooove 'em out!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01xChat09Subtitle.text: *Stinger sites are down! Repeat Stingers down! All units converge on GLA structures! Let's tear this place up!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01xChat12Subtitle.text: *Will do, HQ! Got 'em in my sights

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01xChat14Subtitle.text: *Love that fresh smell of MOAB in the morning

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01xCin01Subtitle.text: *All units clear the launch area. Launch is scheduled in t-minus

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01xCin10Subtitle.text: *Filthy Americans. We will torch your presence here

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01xEva01Subtitle.text: *Good work, General. The depot is secured

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01xEva02Subtitle.text: *Now we need to build an attack force large enough to destroy the GLA base

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01xEva03Subtitle.text: *Load your best units onto the train

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01xEva04Subtitle.text: *The train will depart when it is completely full

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01xEva05Subtitle.text: *Good work, General the train is full

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01xEva06Subtitle.text: *Get that Dragon Tank up there to clear out those buildings

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01xEva07Subtitle.text: *Build more units. We don't want to fail in our surprise attack

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01xEva08Subtitle.text: *General! Get your men out of the pit! We've got MOABS on the way that are gonna blow this place to bits

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01xEva09Subtitle.text: *We need to finish destroying this base!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01xEva10Subtitle.text: *The MOABs will be here any minute!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01xEva11Subtitle.text: *Alpha Wing! Area is clear. You may proceed

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA01xEva12Subtitle.text: *Good work, General. It looks like the GLA threat has finally been removed. It's time to put all this behind us and get looking for those WMDs

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02Comanche101Subtitle.text: *Thanks for getting me out, sir! Things were getting a little dicey for me

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xBrf01Subtitle.text: *The docks have been cleared, General. Our first task will be to hold them while the supply trucks are brought in. Until the Dozers arrive, we will have to defend this position with our troops as they filter in

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xBrf02Subtitle.text: *Most of our fleet survived the GLA Baikonur Attack. Our Aircraft Carrier and Battleship escorts are at your disposal to aid with this operation

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xChat03Subtitle.text: *Docks are all clear. No GLA in sight

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xChat08Subtitle.text: *We'll give them some red glare alright

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xCin01Subtitle.text: *Carrier Command to fleet. Keep up the fire, boys. The GLA are bringing in reinforcements

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xCin02Subtitle.text: *Roger that, Carrier command. Maintaining suppression fire on the docks

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xCin03Subtitle.text: *Be careful what you hit. We just want to clear it out, not destroy it

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xEva01Subtitle.text: *Good work, sir! Our next objective is to provide safe passage for the supply trucks as they travel through the city. The trucks must reach the city's supply warehouse. We must also retain control of the docks. Good luck, sir

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xEva02Subtitle.text: *Supply Trucks are beginning to move, General. We must provide protection as they make their way to the drop off point

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xEva03Subtitle.text: *I'm sending you some new prototype sentry drones. The enemy can't detect them if they stay still. The drones are also capable of spotting stealthed units as well as GLA demo traps. They should prove to be very useful

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xEva04Subtitle.text: *Our dozer has arrived sir! Begin building up your base. The GLA are preparing a new wave of attacks against us!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xEva05Subtitle.text: *Great job, sir! The people of this city have expressed their gratitude for the relief supplies. Our final objective is to drive the GLA from the area. Destroy their main base overlooking the city and the area will be secured

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xEva07Subtitle.text: *General, our Sentry Drones can help spot GLA Demo Traps

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xEva08Subtitle.text: *Sir, there are still GLA near the warehouse. We need to clear them out immediately

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xEva10Subtitle.text: *Good job, all trucks are safely to the docks, now lets get them to the city

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xEva12Subtitle.text: *You've discovered a GLA training camp, sir. Intelligence believes that members of this camp were partially responsible for the Baikonur Launch. We have been ordered to take it out

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xEva13Subtitle.text: *Secure the warehouse so the supply trucks can proceed safely

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xEva14Subtitle.text: *Once the warehouse is secure the supply trucks will proceed

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xEva15Subtitle.text: *Dozers have arrived general. You are cleared to eliminate the GLA at your discretion

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xEva16Subtitle.text: *Get the food to the city before the GLA can steal or destroy it

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xEva17Subtitle.text: *General, we've done it. The city is free from the GLA tyranny. It looks like they've got some Intel that will lead us straight to those hidden WMDs

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xEva18Subtitle.text: *Full naval support is available for this operation

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xEva19Subtitle.text: *Use the battleships and aircraft carrier at your discretion

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xEva20Subtitle.text: *The battleships are in range and awaiting targets, General

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xEva21Subtitle.text: *The CVN Daedalus is standing by with aircraft at the ready

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xEva22Subtitle.text: *The warehouse needs to be secured, but the safety of the docks must not be compromised

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xEva23Subtitle.text: *Our forces are limited in this area. You will receive reinforcements as they become available

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xEva24Subtitle.text: *Secure the warehouse without compromising the safety of the docks

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xEva26Subtitle.text: *The GLA Base is the next objective, General

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xSupply01Subtitle.text: *As soon as that warehouse is safe, we will roll out

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xSupply02Subtitle.text: *Thanks for the cover fire, General! All trucks loaded and ready to move out. Just clear out that city for us, sir!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xSupply03Subtitle.text: *The streets are lined with Demo Traps, sir! We'll need them swept clear!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xSupply04Subtitle.text: *We've reached the warehouse, General. Thanks for the escort!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA02xSupply05Subtitle.text: *Convoy's arrived safely, sir. Thanks for the cover

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03Comanche102Subtitle.text: *Quad Cannons are picking us apart, sir

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03Crusader105Subtitle.text: *We need more support! They're chewing us up!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03Crusader304Subtitle.text: *Enemy contacts confirmed! They're moving in fast!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xBrf01Subtitle.text: *General, Col Burton and Black Lotus are in position and ready for your orders

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xBrf02Subtitle.text: *Their primary objective is this secret laboratory. It's location was revealed by the documents captured during your last mission

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xBrf03Subtitle.text: *The GLA are working on a new weapon of mass destruction. Black Lotus must download this data so we know how far along their research has come

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xBrf04Subtitle.text: *Once she has completed her download, Col Burton must bring the mountainside down on the lab and bury it forever

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xBurton01Subtitle.text: *We're at the bridge. Lotus, take care of that Scorpion, I'll deal with the other guards

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xBurton02Subtitle.text: *That wasn't part of the plan, Lotus

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xBurton03Subtitle.text: *You'll wait for me? All right, Lotus, let's race

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xBurton05Subtitle.text: *All right, I see the POW camplooks like they have a Tunnel Network that passes under the river

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xBurton06Subtitle.text: *Nice work, LotusTunnels down herejust take care of a couple guards and I'll have everyone freed

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xBurton07Subtitle.text: *Those vehicles would come in handy if the intel about the defenses around the mountains are correct. General, we ought to rescue them, too

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xBurton08Subtitle.text: *General, I'm in position near the second POW Campthere's a Tunnel Network and guards out front. I could slip past them into the compound if I climbed down the cliffs on the south end of the camp

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xBurton09Subtitle.text: *Don't get cocky, Lotus, you haven't won this race yet

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xBurton10Subtitle.text: *That's the last of themsecond POW Camp is securedsomeone should tell Lotus to hurry upI don't want to be kept waiting at the Lab

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xBurton11Subtitle.text: *That's some new toy. General, if you focus it at those Tunnel Networks and Stinger Sites guarding the mountain, I'll slip right by them

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xBurton12Subtitle.text: *Looks like a whole GLA base. Intel never said anything about this being here

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xBurton13Subtitle.text: *Doesn't look like they were expecting mea little C4 here and there and I'll make short work of this placejust say the word, General

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xBurton14Subtitle.text: *I should be safe moving through the villagejust need to watch out for any Radar Vans monitoring the area. Wish I had a couple Flash Bangs

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xBurton15Subtitle.text: *This is it! I'm moving into position above the Labdon't keep me waiting Lotus, its cold up here

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xBurton17Subtitle.text: *Well, Lotus, you're fastI'll give you that. I'll be there as soon as I can

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xBurton18Subtitle.text: *AlrightI'm at the mountainTell me when your download finishes, Lotus, and I'll bury that lab where no one will ever find it again

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xChat02Subtitle.text: *There they areremember, short controlled bursts

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xChat04Subtitle.text: *We're taking firewe need some support here!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xCin01Subtitle.text: *This is Spirit, I am rolling in over the target area

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xCin02Subtitle.text: *Roger, Spirit, mission is go. You ready to do this?

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xCin04Subtitle.text: *This is Spirit, bomb bay doors open bombs are away

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xCin05Subtitle.text: *Spirit to Infiltrator, your LZ is clearGood Luck

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xCin08Subtitle.text: *Thanks for the lift boyssee you soon

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xCin09Subtitle.text: *Your small Chinooks are efficientbut I prefer the strength of our Helixes...

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xEva01Subtitle.text: *General, your first objective is the destruction of this bridge. Its destruction will cut off GLA reinforcements from the other side of the river

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xEva02Subtitle.text: *General, GLA reinforcements have been sighted crossing the bridge

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xEva03Subtitle.text: *Another GLA squad has entered the area, General. Perhaps we should take care of that bridge now?

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xEva04Subtitle.text: *General, it appears that there are several GLA Radar Vans in the area, if your forces get to close, they will be detected

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xEva05Subtitle.text: *Excellent job, General. Now you only need to worry about GLA forces on this side of the river

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xEva06Subtitle.text: *The GLA have a POW camp along the route Col Burton must take to the GLA Lab. If you free the men held there, Col Burton will have an easier time getting to the Lab

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xEva07Subtitle.text: *General, intel suggests you free the men at the POW camp before you send Col Burton too far away

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xEva08Subtitle.text: *Congratulations, General, I'm sure the families of those men will be happy to hear they've been rescued

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xEva09Subtitle.text: *General, the GLA's Lab is directly north of your current position. There are a number of GLA defenses still along your routebe careful

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xEva10Subtitle.text: *It appears that those Oil Derricks are the only source of income for the GLA base. If you can destroy them you will cripple the GLA here

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xEva12Subtitle.text: *General, the men you just rescued are driving our newest vehicle, the Microwave Tank

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xEva13Subtitle.text: *This vehicle has two modes: The first generates a continuous microwave field in front of the vehicle - very lethal to all infantry. The second allows it to disrupt the functions of any targeted building

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xEva14Subtitle.text: *General, the GLA know we are here and appear to be on heightened alert. Be careful when moving Col Burton into position above their Secret Lab

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xEva15Subtitle.text: *General, the GLA have upgraded their tank shells to contain poisons. Be careful.

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xEva16Subtitle.text: *I'm showing a GLA patrol in that village, Generalas well as a number of enemy forces garrisoned throughout the village

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xEva17Subtitle.text: *Maybe Black Lotus can find out more Intel about who is behind the GLA WMD program

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xEva18Subtitle.text: *That was incredible General. Looks like the GLA won't be using that facility anymoreand it seems Black Lotus downloaded some vital info about the source of this lab. For now, let's regroup and see what she was able to find out. Great work

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xLotus01Subtitle.text: *The scorpion is disabledI will take care of matters across the river. Wait until I am across and then destroy the bridge

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xLotus02Subtitle.text: *It is now. Don't worry, I'll wait for you at the labdo hurry

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xLotus03Subtitle.text: *General, I am in a position to help free your forces held prisoner. Perhaps Col. Burton would like to help?

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xLotus04Subtitle.text: *General, could you ask Col Burton to please hurry to the POW campI'm tired of waiting on him

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xLotus05Subtitle.text: *I will draw the camp guards attention to this side of the river. That should let you and your pet robots handle the Tunnel and free your captured men

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xLotus06Subtitle.text: *Generalmy forces are moving on the final GLA positions this side of the river. Please inform Col Burton that he should hurryI would prefer not to wait too long for him to catch up

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xLotus07Subtitle.text: *Please inform Col Burton that I shall be waiting for HIM at the Lab

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xLotus08Subtitle.text: *I'm here, Colonelyou win. The GLA put up a stronger fight than I had anticipated. Beginning download

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xLotus10Subtitle.text: *General. I am ready and waiting at the Labwhenever the Colonel would like to arrive and finish this mission

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xLotus11Subtitle.text: *It is cold out here. You are coming aren't you Burton?

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xRngr02Subtitle.text: *A couple of our men broke off to check out the village east of here before we were captured. They may still be over there

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xRngr03Subtitle.text: *Good to see you, General, we thought we were going to end up captured

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xRngr04Subtitle.text: *The rest of our team was captured just after we got to the village. General, we'd like to volunteer to rescue them

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA03xRngr05Subtitle.text: *General, a squad of vehicles was captured just after we were taken. The GLA are holding them in a camp just north of here

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04Eva07Subtitle.text: *We need to clear out these Stinger Sites before we can bring in our bombers to clear the GLA from the area

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04Eva08Subtitle.text: *Construction crews have arrived sir. You'll need to get our base setup before we're overrun by the GLA

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04Eva09Subtitle.text: *Our final objective is this GLA base here, in the hills. Take it out, and the operation is complete

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04Officer03Subtitle.text: *Terrorists detected. All units be on the alert

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04Ranger01Subtitle.text: *Calling in GLA bunker location at grid square Beta Charlie 6-8-9er-4-4

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04Transport01Subtitle.text: *Transport teams 1 and 2 approaching the landing zone

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04Transport03Subtitle.text: *Transport Team 1 reporting! Mission completed! I'm pulling out!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xBrf01Subtitle.text: *General, intelligence reports that the rogue forces behind this GLA splinter cell are commanded by Dr. Thrax

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xBrf02Subtitle.text: *Dr. Thrax is a wanted criminalresponsible for notorious terror crimes against the US military. He must be brought to justice

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xBrf03Subtitle.text: *Dr. Thrax was developing a brand new toxin at his secret mountain lab. Thank goodness Lotus and Burton were there to stop him

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xBrf04Subtitle.text: *Dr. Thrax is receiving his funding from his oil fields. We must cut off his flow of oil

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xBrf05Subtitle.text: *The Intel we retrieved from the Secret Lab proves the GLA have seized these oil fields to help fund the nefarious Dr. Thrax. They may destroy them, rather then let you recapture them. Beware General, the GLA have started using Booby Trapsuse Dozers to remove BOOBY TRAPS safely

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xChat01Subtitle.text: *Sir! Toxin Tractors are eating us up! Send help!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xChat04Subtitle.text: *We're losing units to Quad Cannons, sir! Send armor!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xChat05Subtitle.text: * NO! Bravo Three was killed by a Quad Cannon, Sir!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xChat06Subtitle.text: *The enemy has started sending tanks, sir! Send Missile defenders!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xChat07Subtitle.text: *Ha! GLA tanks are no match for us!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xChat08Subtitle.text: *Sir, we're losing units to enemy Tanks!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xChat09Subtitle.text: *What's the enemy doing with those radar vans?

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xChat11Subtitle.text: *Where are those car bombs coming from?

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xChat12Subtitle.text: *Sir, we need more defenses out here! Car Bombs are tearing us up!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xChat14Subtitle.text: *Sir, we need better defenses against these Bomb Trucks!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xChat15Subtitle.text: *Sir, we've engaged angry mobs! Send anti-personnel units!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xChat16Subtitle.text: *Angry mobs are destroying us! Send some snipers out here!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xChat17Subtitle.text: *Sir, we need to do something about these ANGRY MOBS!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xChat18Subtitle.text: *Sir, we're losing units to Terrorists, can we get a sniper out here?

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xChat19Subtitle.text: *Sir, these Terrorists are chewing us up! Send support!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xChat20Subtitle.text: *Geez! What's with all these demo traps!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xChat21Subtitle.text: *Sir, this field is littered with Demo Traps! We need to clear them out!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xChat22Subtitle.text: *What?! We've lost a structure to a CAR BOMBER!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xChat23Subtitle.text: *Car Bombers are attacking us! The appear to be coming from the local town

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xChat24Subtitle.text: *Whoa! Those bomb trucks pack a punch!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xChat26Subtitle.text: *Sir, build more defenses to protect against the BOMB TRUCKS!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xChat28Subtitle.text: *Sir, we need a Pathfinder to deal with those ANGRY MOBS!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xChat29Subtitle.text: *Sir, we need anti-personnel out here NOW! These angry mobs are chewing us up!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xChat30Subtitle.text: *Sir, we've lost a building to a car bomb

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xChat31Subtitle.text: *Terrorists are destroying our buildings! Call in snipers!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xChat32Subtitle.text: *Sir! Their Bomb Trucks are destroying our base!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xCIA01Subtitle.text: *Good to see some friendlies! Let's rock!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xCin01Subtitle.text: *Satcom, this is Charlie 5. Approaching TARGET, no hostiles sightedwaitTARGET is in sight, Satcomover

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xCin02Subtitle.text: *Roger that 5You are a go, over

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xCin03Subtitle.text: *Roger Satcompayload is awayleaving hotzone! Over

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xCin04Subtitle.text: *Roger that 5, out. Victor 3 you are go for IMMEDIATE dropover

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xCin08Subtitle.text: *Careful not to get slimed, boyschem weapons sighted

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xCin09Subtitle.text: *This is no MILK RUN, boys! Keep your heads!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xCin11Subtitle.text: *Goats are away. Retuning to barn. Out

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xCin12Subtitle.text: *Bravo team, your primary objective is the small airstrip to your South. Secure it for incoming reinforcements. Out

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xCin13Subtitle.text: *Roger Satcom, moving out. Listen up kids! This is a FREE FIRE ZONE! Watch for ROACHES! If it moves kill it

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva01Subtitle.text: *The GLA has started using BOOBY-TRAPS on structures in this area. They will explode if you try to capture or garrison them. Use Dozers to remove them

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva02Subtitle.text: *The GLA has seized the nearby oil fields. Protect the derricks and destroy the GLA base

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva03Subtitle.text: *BE CAREFUL, General; the enemy may have set up traps in the oil field

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva04Subtitle.text: *Good news, General. Colonel Burton knows several covert operatives in this area. Lead Burton to the ops to solicit their help

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva05Subtitle.text: *Good news, General. There are several covert operatives in this area. Find them to solicit their help

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva06Subtitle.text: *Well done General, this region is now free of GLA troublemakers

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva07Subtitle.text: *Well done, General. This area has been secured

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva08Subtitle.text: *General, Your ultimate objective is to destroy the GLA base in this area. Your main source of funding will be the oil derricks. You must secure and protect them!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva09Subtitle.text: *Well done, General. Your mission is a success

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva10Subtitle.text: *General, the local town is being poisoned by GLA propaganda and are launching attacks against us. Destroy the GLA radio station to quell the uprising

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva11Subtitle.text: *Destroy the GLA radio-station in the city to quell the uprising

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva12Subtitle.text: *Well done, General. The GLA propaganda machine has been destroyed

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva13Subtitle.text: *Destroy the GLA RADIO STATION in the city to stop the car-bomb attacks

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva14Subtitle.text: *Destroy the GLA RADIO STATION in the city to stop the bomb-truck attacks

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva15Subtitle.text: *Destroy the GLA RADIO STATION in the city to stop the suicide attacks

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva16Subtitle.text: *General, there are several ARTILLERY PLATFORMS in the area. Capture them for suppression fire

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva17Subtitle.text: *General, There is a REPAIR PAD in the area. Capture it to help heal our vehicles

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva18Subtitle.text: *Sir, please build more defenses to protect against the car bombers

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva19Subtitle.text: *Sir, the enemy has started deploying Radar Vans, they can spot our pathfinders!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva20Subtitle.text: *Sir, the enemy's Radar Vans are sweeping for our pathfindersbe careful

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva21Subtitle.text: *Sir, we should build Patriots to counter the bomb trucks

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva22Subtitle.text: *Sir, Enemy Terrorists are proving highly effective. I suggest you send Pathfinders

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva23Subtitle.text: *Sir! We're losing units to Demo Traps, please be more careful!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva24Subtitle.text: *General, There is an OIL REFINERY in the area. Capture it to reduce vehicle cost

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva25Subtitle.text: *Sir, the enemy has begun attacking the OIL FIELDS

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva26Subtitle.text:
*WARNING: OIL derrick DESTROYED! 
 Only 1 derrick remains!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva27Subtitle.text:
*WARNING: OIL derrick DESTROYED! 
 Only 5 derricks remain

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva28Subtitle.text:
*WARNING: OIL derrick DESTROYED! 
 Only 10 derricks remain

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva30Subtitle.text: *General, our cash reserves are running low -- capture oil derricks for needed cash

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva33Subtitle.text: *All the oil derricks have been DESTROYED! Your mission is a failure

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA04xEva34Subtitle.text: *Your base has been destroyed! Your mission is a failure

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xChat01Subtitle.text: *Our base is being attacked sir. They built a tunnel network inside our base without us knowing

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xChat02Subtitle.text: *Those buses are loaded with hostiles sir! Watch out!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xChat03Subtitle.text: *Our base is being attacked sir. They built a tunnel network inside our base without us knowing

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xChat04Subtitle.text: *We offer you our assistance to rid us of this Toxin Monger. His obsession will kill us all and that we cannot allow

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xChat07Subtitle.text: *Thank you for releasing me. Transport me to my base in the East and I can help you

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xCin01Subtitle.text: *Sat-Com A4 has confirmation on base location. Visuals are uploading now

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xCin02Subtitle.text: *Field, please verify status of Toxin Production facilities

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xCin03Subtitle.text: *Then we have a go upon presentation of final clearance code

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xCin04Subtitle.text: *Roger that, Alpha Whiskey Echo, the birds are in the air

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xCin06Subtitle.text: *Clearance code is Sierra, Hotel, Oscar, Charlie Kilo

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva01Subtitle.text: *Phase one of our operation has been completed General. Our Tomahawk Missile strike was successful in destroying all of GLA's Toxin production facilities. Only their main base and Toxin Missile silo's remain to be eliminated

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva02Subtitle.text: *General, we've tracked Dr. Thrax to this remote location. He is in possession of chemical tipped missiles, and has them prepped for launch. Destroying his toxin storage tanks has slowed him down, but we must move in and secure those missiles before they can be launched

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva03Subtitle.text: *General, Dr. Thrax was able to develop small quantities of his new toxin. Make sure your forces are on high alert

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva04Subtitle.text: *General, due to the civilian presence in this location you will need to use ground forces to assault the final base and capture the 4 toxin missile sites in the area. Our successful liberation of the oil sites in Amisbad has provided us with additional resources for this operation

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva05Subtitle.text: *Dr. Thrax must be defeated so he can't inflict further terror on the world. General, you must stop him

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva06Subtitle.text: *Our Intel indicates that this is the best area to build your base. Local unrest may be in your favor. Good luck

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva07Subtitle.text: *General, the local GLA have responded to your rescue and have given us control of their base. You may now use their forces in your attack

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva08Subtitle.text: *General, your main objective is to capture the 4 Toxin Missile Silo's targeted on US major metropolitan areas before they launch

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva09Subtitle.text: *General, infrared scans of the area indicate that they are preparing to launch the Toxin Missiles

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva10Subtitle.text: *Missile launch in 5 minutes Your final offensive should commence now

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva14Subtitle.text: *Missile launch in 1 minute We must move in now!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva15Subtitle.text: *30 seconds until missile launch It's almost too late General!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva18Subtitle.text: *Toxin Missile Impact has been detected and Hot Zone is now confirmed. The casualties are incalculable General, we have failed

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva19Subtitle.text: *The first Missile Silo has been captured and the HazMat decontamination team is en-route. One to go Commander

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva20Subtitle.text: *Good job, sir. The second Missile Silo has been captured. Two to go

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva21Subtitle.text: *Good job, sir. The third Missile Silo has been captured. One to go

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva22Subtitle.text: *Great work, General. We now have control of all 4 Toxin Missile silo's. The operation is a success

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva23Subtitle.text: *Toxin breach, you have 2 minutes to guide the Bio-engineer to the hot zone to neutralize the threat

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva24Subtitle.text: *We have a green light for the operation. Launch the attack on GLA's perimeter base

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva25Subtitle.text: *Intel says that the Missile Sites we are looking for are in this region. Use caution and make sure those toxins aren't released

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva26Subtitle.text: *Infantry won't work well here, General. Our enemy is using toxins in almost every weapon that they throw at us

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva27Subtitle.text: *General, your objective is to capture this structure, not destroy it! If those toxins are released then the region will be contaminated for 100 square miles!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva28Subtitle.text: *General, our intel indicates that if we can leak the napalm in those tanks into those nearby tunnels exits we can flood their whole system

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva29Subtitle.text: *Congratulations General. Dr. Thrax won't be poisoning the world with his creations any longer

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva30Subtitle.text: *Now that Dr. Thrax is defeated we can finally bring our boys home. Good work, General

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva31Subtitle.text: *We have a green light on Operation: Eagle's Strike. Launch the attack on Toxin Production facilities

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva32Subtitle.text: *General, your orders are to build a base to attack the Toxin General. As your forces are ready then capture the enemies 4 Toxin Missile sites before they can launch

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva33Subtitle.text: *General, the GLA base to the east has decided to Rebel against the Toxin General and his mass use of toxins. They wish to aid us in our attack against the General by giving us use of their base

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva34Subtitle.text: *General, the enemy has detected our presence in their main base and have begun launch preparations for the Toxin Missiles. The should have launch capability in approximately 30 minutes. Intel has located and revealed the 4 missile sites on your radar screen

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xEva35Subtitle.text: *General, Intel puts some of the Missiles in this region. Take care not to release the toxin!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xThrax01Subtitle.text: *You are too late infidel, the launch is commencing to cleanse your lands in pestilence. Hahahaha

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xThrax02Subtitle.text: *Your betrayal has not gone unnoticed. You will burn with the infidels you now assist. May your sons camels swell with virulence!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA05xThrax03Subtitle.text: *My reach is long and now you will feel my wrath! Die infidel dogs, die!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA06Crusader202Subtitle.text: *They're too well dug in! We need reinforcements!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA07Crusader204Subtitle.text: *We've broken through to the north! Send reinforcements

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA07Crusader301Subtitle.text: *Be advised, car bombs in the area

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA07Crusader303Subtitle.text: *We've crossed the bridge. Sweep and clear

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA07Officer01Subtitle.text: *We've got to clear the area! Destroy everything!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA07Officer02Subtitle.text: *Destroy everything not American. Leave nothing behind!

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA07Officer03Subtitle.text: *Copy that Delta two. Your orders are to fall back. Over

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA08Chatter06Subtitle.text: *This is Echo one rolling into hot zone. Everyone keep your eyes open

DIALOGEVENT:MisUSA08Cin03Subtitle.text: *Looks like the whole GLA is lining up for us today

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi001Subtitle.text: *So, I see you have decided to stay and stand against me. You will regret that decision, General. Prepare to meet your end!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi002Subtitle.text: *The tiger stands poised to strike, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi004Subtitle.text: *My forces are ready to engage your defenses, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi005Subtitle.text: *Feel the stomping feet of my iron dragon!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi006Subtitle.text: *Your defenses are worthless against my forces

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi007Subtitle.text: *Now we meet in the field of honor, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi008Subtitle.text: *This we do for the good of China

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi009Subtitle.text: *It is time to test your steel, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi010Subtitle.text: *You have attacked me for the last time, General. This wave will break your defenses and crush your pitiful army to dust!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi011Subtitle.text: *The might of China falls upon you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi012Subtitle.text: *Your inferior forces will provide no challenge for my warriors

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi013Subtitle.text: *You began this fight, General. No I will finish it

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi015Subtitle.text: *Two warriors meet on the battlefield. Who is to say who will win? I do, that's who. Me. You will fall, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi016Subtitle.text: *A fight that cannot be won is not worth fighting. So why are you here, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi017Subtitle.text: *Rage will only get you so far, General. Now, rage and a column of tanks...that will get you somewhere

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi018Subtitle.text: *You find yourself at the end of your rope, General. And only now have you discovered that the end of that rope is on fire

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi019Subtitle.text: *The dance of battle is strange and briefand this battle with you has been strangely brief

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi020Subtitle.text: *I see you haven't thought your strategy through. Pity

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi022Subtitle.text: *You are not acting for the good of you people, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi023Subtitle.text: *I will give you a moments pause to consider your next move

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi024Subtitle.text: *A wise man knows when to retreat. Obviously you are not such a man

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi025Subtitle.text: *In the end, all fall before me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi027Subtitle.text: *China cannot be defeated by one man

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi028Subtitle.text: *We shall mediate and consider our next move

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi029Subtitle.text: *Do not commit to a tactic you cannot support

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi031Subtitle.text: *We sweep away your buildings like bamboo before a hurricane

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi032Subtitle.text: *Your men ran from the Barracks as we knocked it to the ground

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi033Subtitle.text: *A factory cannot produce war, General--and now your War Factory produces nothing

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi034Subtitle.text: *Your Air Field has been grounded, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi035Subtitle.text: *Your base defenses fall before us like blades of grass

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi036Subtitle.text: *We've destroyed your Command Center, so where are you hiding now, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi037Subtitle.text: *So many of your buildings have fallen that I would have expected you to surrender by now

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi038Subtitle.text: *Don't think you can destroy my Barracks without feeling my wraith, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi039Subtitle.text: *I'll have to rebuild that War Factory now. You would be wise to exploit my momentary weaknessit won't last

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi040Subtitle.text: *Dozers: Rebuild the Air Field before our MiGs return!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi041Subtitle.text: *Our defenses are cracking! Repel the invaders!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi042Subtitle.text: *That is quite enough destruction, General. Now it is my turn

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi043Subtitle.text: *You can claim my Command Center, but this battle isn't over, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi044Subtitle.text: *We will avenge all those MiGs you've destroyed, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi045Subtitle.text: *The price of this war is too high, General. Now it is time for you to pay

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi046Subtitle.text: *China's infantry is plentiful, but too many have been sacrificed. Now I will return your cruelty ten-fold

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi047Subtitle.text: *Capture all the oil you wish--you will not have time to reap the rewards

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi048Subtitle.text: *That Artillery Platform can easily be avoided, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi049Subtitle.text: *Seeking to increase your efficiency with that Oil Refinery, General? A solid strategy would have served you better

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi050Subtitle.text: *Something stirs at the edge of my base

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi051Subtitle.text: *I see you approaching my base, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi052Subtitle.text: *You will not live to regret entering my base, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi053Subtitle.text: *You forces may enter my base, but they will never leave again

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi054Subtitle.text: *Those resources are under my protection, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi055Subtitle.text: *Why do you insist on attacking from the flanks?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi056Subtitle.text: *Interesting attack, General, but it will not succeed against me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi057Subtitle.text: *A brave attack, General, but bravery alone will not defeat me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi059Subtitle.text: *Leave this place before you anger me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi060Subtitle.text: *I can see what you are doing, General. I will not allow it

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi061Subtitle.text: *Run away from here, General, before I unleash the horde on you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi062Subtitle.text: *We are approaching your base, General. What is your defense?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi063Subtitle.text: *Are you prepared for our attack, General? We shall see

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi065Subtitle.text: *Now we will begin leveling your base, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi067Subtitle.text: *I claim this Oil Derrick for China

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi068Subtitle.text: *Your flanks are exposed, General. Fatal mistake

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi069Subtitle.text: *You have allowed my forces to subvert your defenses. Now we will finish you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi070Subtitle.text: *You have allowed your power to drop, General. Pray that isn't a fatal mistake

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi071Subtitle.text: *Without power you won't be able to defend your base, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi072Subtitle.text: *You have exhausted your resources, General. It is time to admit defeat

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi073Subtitle.text: *You have taxed my resources, General. Now I will come and take yours

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi074Subtitle.text: *The Scud Strom is a cowardly weapon, General. I thought more of you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi075Subtitle.text: *You are forcing me to answer with a Nuclear Silo of my own, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi076Subtitle.text: *That Particle Cannon is a formidable weapon, but it cannot stop China

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi077Subtitle.text: *So many defensesI see you have proper respect for your enemy

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi078Subtitle.text: *You cannot build more tanks than China, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi079Subtitle.text: *We will match you planes in the air, General. Your superiority will be only in your mind

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi080Subtitle.text: *Your men are outnumbered, General. Do not try to make a greater horde than China

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi081Subtitle.text: *Your base grows large, Generalripe for a nuclear strike

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi083Subtitle.text: *We are immune to your nuclear missiles, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi084Subtitle.text: *No! Your particle beam will only injure us--we will not forget this, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi085Subtitle.text: *Hide in those buildings, General. Perhaps a Dragon Tank will come to visit you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi086Subtitle.text: *Colonel Burton's exploits are legendary, but he is only one man, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi087Subtitle.text: *I see you have corrupted one of our Black Lotus agents. Her training will not turn the battle to your favor, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi088Subtitle.text: *The sniper Kell enters our battle. Do not count on his stealth to save you, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi089Subtitle.text: *You are foolish to build an Air Field, General. Only tanks can save you from me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi090Subtitle.text: *You are wise to build a War Factory, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi091Subtitle.text: *That Barracks is only the beginning of what you will need to defeat me, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi092Subtitle.text: *If you are going to sell your buildings, why do you bother constructing them?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi093Subtitle.text: *You will not defeat me this easily, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi095Subtitle.text: *I will not be beaten by the likes of you, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi096Subtitle.text: *This is not the end, General. I will recover from this

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi097Subtitle.text: *I must acknowledge this defeat. You have shown superior tactics, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi098Subtitle.text: *My superior tactics are leading to your defeat, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi099Subtitle.text: *You are losing this battle, General. Better to accept defeat honorably than to fight on

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi100Subtitle.text: *The end is drawing near for you, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi101Subtitle.text: *Why do you resist the inevitable, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi102Subtitle.text: *The shadow of the dragon signals the beginning of your defeat, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi103Subtitle.text: *It is time to accept your defeat, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi104Subtitle.text: *It is time for the dragon to rise again

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi105Subtitle.text: *There is no shame in accepting your weakness

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi106Subtitle.text: *You are not ready to face me. Return when your training is complete

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi107Subtitle.text: *Why do you run towards your own demise?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi108Subtitle.text: *This has been an interesting contest. Perhaps you will challenge me again

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi109Subtitle.text: *Improve your skills and challenge me again

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi110Subtitle.text: *Welcome, General. I hope you are prepared to face me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi111Subtitle.text: *Your victories speak well of your ability, but my generals did not have my cunning or experience

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossChi112Subtitle.text: *Soon you will see what it is to face the dragon

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA001Subtitle.text: *Most enemies would have flee from the sight of my armies. Perhaps this will be worthwhile after all

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA002Subtitle.text: *My forces descend on you like the wind, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA003Subtitle.text: *Your men are like sheep before my warriors

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA004Subtitle.text: *Look at all the wonderful toys you have brought to me. I broke all my toys as a child, General, and now I will break yours

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA005Subtitle.text: *Your forces fall like wheat before my sword

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA006Subtitle.text: *You have done well against my Generals, but I have all of their power combined. What will you do against that, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA007Subtitle.text: *You will never even see my forces, Generaluntil it is too late

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA008Subtitle.text: *We will sweep you from our lands, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA009Subtitle.text: *Now you will see what your useless invasion has brought you, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA010Subtitle.text: *You have dared to challenge me--now you will reap the terrible reward

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA011Subtitle.text: *How do you feel, General, as the horsemen ride to your doorstep?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA012Subtitle.text: *You've had your chance to retreat, now we will annihilate you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA013Subtitle.text: *Bear witness to the power of my will, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA014Subtitle.text: *My rage will tear your war-machine to dust

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA015Subtitle.text: *ToxinexplosivesstealthAny one of these you have defeated, but all three? All is lost, General. You should surrenderfor the good of your men

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA016Subtitle.text: *Your world has made you soft, General. Mine has made me strong

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA017Subtitle.text: *You will learn to respect my power, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA018Subtitle.text: *You will pause while I build my next attack, then the battle will resume

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA019Subtitle.text: *Have you grown tired dying against my defenses, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA020Subtitle.text: *The battlefield is quiet, General. Are you waiting for me to finish this?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA021Subtitle.text: *We await your next pathetic attack with great anticipation

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA022Subtitle.text: *Has this been the extent of your power, General? Truly pathetic

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA023Subtitle.text: *Your attacks have been like pathetic screams amidst the howl of a raging storm

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA024Subtitle.text: *This battle is beginning to bore me, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA025Subtitle.text: *How much longer should I let you live, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA026Subtitle.text: *General, my subject require my attentionhow much longer do you intend to dance around like a clown?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA027Subtitle.text: *General, your tactics remind me of a child learning to play chess

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA028Subtitle.text: *Are you done, General? Have you exhausted your pathetic resources?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA029Subtitle.text: *General, I was bored minutes ago--now I'm beginning to fall asleep

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA030Subtitle.text: *How does it feel to challenge a true military genius?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA032Subtitle.text: *Now your Barracks falls--soon all shall fall

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA033Subtitle.text: *Your War Factory is lost--rebuild it and I'll destroy it again

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA034Subtitle.text: *I have relieved you of your Air Field, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA035Subtitle.text: *Your base defenses cannot stop my forces, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA036Subtitle.text: * General, if you cannot even hold on to your Command Center, how do you hope to defeat me?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA037Subtitle.text: *So many of your structures have fallen, General--why not retreat the field and spare yourself any further embarrassment?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA038Subtitle.text: *Do not test my patience further by destroying any more of my Oil Derricks, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA039Subtitle.text: *You dare to destroy my Barracks, General?!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA040Subtitle.text: *General, I require an Arms Dealer to do my business. Do not destroy another one

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA041Subtitle.text: *You think to crush my defenses, General? More will rise in their place

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA042Subtitle.text: *That is the last building you will destroy, General. My patience has limits

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA043Subtitle.text: *My Command Center! You have forced me to retreat underground, but this isn't over yet, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA044Subtitle.text: *You have destroyed many of my machine, General. Perhaps I underestimated you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA045Subtitle.text: *My men are not targets for your practice, General. Their blood is on your hands

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA046Subtitle.text: *Release my Oil Derrick or I will burn it down

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA047Subtitle.text: *I see you've captured that derelict Artillery Platform. Best of luck making it work

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA048Subtitle.text: *That Oil Refinery will not turn the tide to your favor, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA049Subtitle.text: *Impudent fool! You have invaded into my home far enough

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA050Subtitle.text: *You are like a stinging insect, General, and it is time to squash your annoying presence

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA051Subtitle.text: *The enemy is in our presence! Destroy him! Destroy them all!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA052Subtitle.text: *Fool! You have crossed the line! Your forces are forfeit!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA053Subtitle.text: *Ah, a flanking attackcrude, but at least it is a strategy

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA055Subtitle.text: *A frontal attack? You should have brought more forces

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA056Subtitle.text: *I see you've found my extra suppliesand I stress, my extra supplies. Leave them now

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA057Subtitle.text: *Approaching my base from that path will only lead you to death

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA058Subtitle.text: *Stay out of that village, General. I protect those under my care

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA059Subtitle.text: *Those resources are for my people, General. They are not your for the taking

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA060Subtitle.text: *Those buildings were not placed here for your use, General. Do not disrupt my infrastructure

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA061Subtitle.text: *It seems you appetite has overstretched your resources, General. I hope you get your power back up before we reach your base

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA062Subtitle.text: *Our land is without powertoo bad your base cannot run without its dependence

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA064Subtitle.text: *General, you are taxing my resources. Your little war will cause my people to go hungry

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA065Subtitle.text: *A Scud Storm?! You have stolen our technology! You will pay for this, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA066Subtitle.text: *Building nuclear weapons, General? I figured you would resort to such cowardice

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA067Subtitle.text: *Particle Cannon? Your beams from space cannot reach us beneath the earth

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA068Subtitle.text: *So many base defenses. You must truly fear my power, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA069Subtitle.text: *How many tanks do you require, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA070Subtitle.text: *You fill the air with those annoying gnats. Now we will swat them down

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA071Subtitle.text: *Train all the men you wish, General, but the loss of life will only grow greater by the minute

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA072Subtitle.text: *Your base has grown large, Generalperhaps too large

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA073Subtitle.text: *Launch your toxins at us, General; we have prepared for much worse

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA075Subtitle.text: *Yes, use your particle beam--show the world your cowardice

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA076Subtitle.text: *Garrison the building, General--hide like rats in a wall

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA077Subtitle.text: *Colonel Burton will not save you, General. You'll have to fight this war yourself

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA078Subtitle.text: *Ah, the beautiful Black Lotus. Join me, Lotus, and you could like as a queen

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA079Subtitle.text: *Jarmen Kell? He dares to stand against me?! My vengeance will be mostunpleasant

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA080Subtitle.text: *Your Air Field will not stand against my assault, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA081Subtitle.text: *Finally built a War Factory, eh General? What took you so long?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA082Subtitle.text: *Your pathetic Barracks will be of no use to you, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA083Subtitle.text: *Selling off your buildings to fund your army? Hardly seems logical, does it, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA084Subtitle.text: *This is impossible! You cannot defeat me!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA085Subtitle.text: *You may think you have the upper-hand, but this battle will turn like the wind

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA086Subtitle.text: *Your soldiers may outnumber mine now, but battles are won by more than numbers, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA087Subtitle.text: *I can't believe that I'm being beaten by such a weak-minded fool. The shame will mark me forever

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA088Subtitle.text: *Defeated by a foolthe humiliation is too great to bearplease leave me to my torment

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA089Subtitle.text: *General, I smell the stench of fear and desperation coming from you base

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA090Subtitle.text: * I sense the time of your demise growing near, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA091Subtitle.text: *Your forces are beginning to be overrun, General. Soon they will be my prisoners

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA092Subtitle.text: *We are kicking you like a wounded goat, General. Admit defeat to spare your agony

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA093Subtitle.text: *You are defeated. This is what happens to all who stand against me , General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA094Subtitle.text: *You are a fool to challenge me, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA095Subtitle.text: *All the powers of the GLA are at my disposal

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA096Subtitle.text: *I am more dangerous than all my three Generals combined

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA097Subtitle.text: *You have won, General. Why do you continue to torture me by examining these statistics?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA098Subtitle.text: *Yes, you can now see why you have lostthe numbers speak for themselves

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA099Subtitle.text: *You have traveled far and faced many opponents to reach me General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA100Subtitle.text: *I commend your efforts, but they have wholly unprepared you for what you are about to face

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA101Subtitle.text: *You have faced Dr. Thrax's toxic warriors; Kassad's stealth legions and Juhziz's demolitions, but I taught them all in the art of war

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA102Subtitle.text: *This will be your final battle, General. May whatever gods you pray to have mercy on youbecause I will not

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossGLA103Subtitle.text: *This will be your final battle, General. Make your peace and prepare for the end

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA001Subtitle.text: *Well, there you are. Too late to run now, Boy

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA002Subtitle.text: *I hope you're ready, cause we're coming for ya

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA003Subtitle.text: *Set the table, Kid, cause we're coming for dinner

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA004Subtitle.text: *I've got three things to teach you, Kid: How to lose; how to cry; and how to die

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA005Subtitle.text: *We're coming to attack soon, so get out all your white flags

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA006Subtitle.text: *Here we come, Kidtry not to wet yourself, okay?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA008Subtitle.text: *Ooh, you're going to get it now, Kid

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA009Subtitle.text: *You ready? Cause here comes a tactic you may have learned in school. You ready to go back to school?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA010Subtitle.text: *It's time for me to teach you a thing or two about the back of my hand

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA011Subtitle.text: *You should have run when you had the chance. Now I'm going to teach you the meaning of respect

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA012Subtitle.text: *So, about your funeralopen casket or closed?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA013Subtitle.text: *I'm gonna march into your base and plant my foot in your butt, <sarcastic> "General."

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA014Subtitle.text: *Here we come, Punk--step aside or get stepped on

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA015Subtitle.text: *You call yourself a "General"? I call you a pain in the butt, is what I call you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA016Subtitle.text: *This is your idea of strategy? Of tactics? "Tank blob" is the best you can come up with? Patheticjust pathetic

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA017Subtitle.text: *Yeah, I've read Sun Tzu too, Sport: "Greater enemy--retreat. Smaller enemy--attack." Is that all you got for me?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA018Subtitle.text: *So, where's your army, Boy? Or did you just want to bare-knuckle it? Cause I'll slap you down with my bare hands if you want. You want a piece of that, Boy?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA019Subtitle.text: *You got me out of bed for this? I aught to take you over my knee right now

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA020Subtitle.text: *I got more medals than you've got teeth, Boywhich won't be saying much after I get done knocking them out for you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA021Subtitle.text: *Are you putting all of your defenses at the front of your base? You don't think we can go around that? Well, do you?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA022Subtitle.text: *Boy, you think I'm playing with you? You better think again

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA023Subtitle.text: *Better check your flanks there, Partner; I think some of my troops just snuck into your base

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA024Subtitle.text: *Do you think this is a game? Well do you? Wait, don't answer that

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA025Subtitle.text: *Kid, who taught you military tactics? Huh? Cause you should go slap him square in the mouth, I tell you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA026Subtitle.text: *I have the whole United States military behind me, Son, and I've just decided that we don't like you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA027Subtitle.text: *Is this tactic of yours supposed to be some kind of joke I'm not aware of?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA028Subtitle.text: *So, you're not a real general, are you? You're like the Surgeon General or something like that, right?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA029Subtitle.text: *Does your mommy know you're out by yourself?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA030Subtitle.text: *You can tell me.. We're just Generals here Do your men know you're incompetent?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA031Subtitle.text: *Did you know you just lost a Tech Building, Sport?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA032Subtitle.text: *Just blew-up your Barracks, Skippy. What you gonna do about it?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA033Subtitle.text: *There goes your War Factory. You mad yet, Boy?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA034Subtitle.text: *I don't know why you bothered to build that Air Field if you aren't going to protect it

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA035Subtitle.text: *Who put these base defenses down like this? They can't defend anything like that

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA036Subtitle.text: *I should let you build another Command Center just so I could knock it down again

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA037Subtitle.text: *I feel like I'm kicking over sand castles. How many of your buildings you gonna let me destroy there, Sport?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA038Subtitle.text: *I let you have that Tech Building, Boy. I don't need it to beat you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA039Subtitle.text: *Kid, that Barracks was not a military target. Do that again and this will get ugly

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA040Subtitle.text: *You better stand down, Son--I'm not going to stand for you blowing-up my War Factories, you hear?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA041Subtitle.text: *Do you know how much those jets cost? I coulda fed the whole world with what you just destroyed

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA042Subtitle.text: *Cracking my defenses, huh? Well, go on--it should be me just enough time to overrun your base

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA043Subtitle.text: *That's enough buildings, Son. Why don't you try attacking my forces now

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA044Subtitle.text: *My Command Center?! You think I'm just going to sit here and take that?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA045Subtitle.text: *You had best leave my pilots alone, Boy. Planes are one thing, but you let my pilots return safe, you hear?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA046Subtitle.text: *You're a sneaky little 'cuss, aren't you? But I think that's enough of my vehicles destroyed, don't you?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA047Subtitle.text: *Let's get armor and air support out there--our grunts are getting torn apart!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA048Subtitle.text: *Let that Oil Derrick go, Boy. This war ain't about the price of gas you know

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA049Subtitle.text: *Think you know how to use that Artillery Platform, Son?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA050Subtitle.text: *That Oil Refinery is not a viable target, Son. And it don't belong to you, so we're coming to get it back

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA051Subtitle.text: *Well, you managed to get to my side of the map. Didn't think you had it in ya

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA052Subtitle.text: *You planning to attack, or you just going to stand out there all day?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA053Subtitle.text: *You'll get out of my base if you know what's good for you, Boy

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA054Subtitle.text: *Enemy's in our perimeter--all forces repel the invaders

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA055Subtitle.text: *Those ain't your supplies, Sport. Best to step-off now, before you get hurt

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA056Subtitle.text: *A flanking attack?! Don't make me laugh, Boy

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA057Subtitle.text: *Trying to attack from my back-door? Good luck with that

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA058Subtitle.text: *You coming to attack me, Boy? Nice to see you have some guts

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA059Subtitle.text: *Get away from my Tech buildings, if you know what's good for you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA060Subtitle.text: *My forces have your base in sight, Kid. What you gonna do now?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA061Subtitle.text: *Here comes the hammer, Punk, and you don't want to be the nail

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA063Subtitle.text: *Things are about to get real bad for you, Sport. Don't say I didn't warn you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA064Subtitle.text: *So, here's where you're hiding your resources. Mind if I take a few?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA066Subtitle.text: *Maybe we'll come in your back-door. Whadda you think about that?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA067Subtitle.text: *Look out, we're coming through the front-door!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA070Subtitle.text: *What did you plan to do without power? I can't wait to see this strategy

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA071Subtitle.text: *You better pay you power bill or we're going to have to postpone this fight

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA072Subtitle.text: *You're out of resources? Boy, you don't start the dance if you can't pay the bill

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA073Subtitle.text: *Uh-oh, looks like we're going to have to do some deficit spending

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA074Subtitle.text: *Built yourself a Scud Storm there? You can't hit the side of a barn with a scud, don't you know that?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA075Subtitle.text: *Bringing out your nukes, huh? If Washington hadn't tied my hands, I'd show you some nukes, I tell you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA076Subtitle.text: *How'd you get a Particle Cannon, Son? That's supposed to me top-secret

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA077Subtitle.text: *So many base defenses. I can just smell the fear coming off you, Boy

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA078Subtitle.text: *Oh, look at thishere comes the tank blob. Not gonna work against me, Son

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA079Subtitle.text: *That's a lot of expensive planes you're putting in the air, Kid. Sure you wanna spend that money?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA080Subtitle.text: *Hope all those grunts know what you're getting them into

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA081Subtitle.text: *That's a lot of buildings, Son. You know that buildings can't fight for you, right?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA082Subtitle.text: *Bring the scuds, Punk--I'll show you the storm

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA083Subtitle.text: *You're going to regret nuking me, Kid. I don't take kindly to that

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA084Subtitle.text: *Using a particle beam, eh? You better put me away with that cause you won't like my counter-attack

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA085Subtitle.text: *You know, only a coward fights from inside buildings. You know that, right?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA086Subtitle.text: *Welcome, Colonel Burton. Sorry you had to get tied up in this thing. No hard feelings

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA087Subtitle.text: *Black Lotus ain't your salvation, Boy. She ain't gonna get anywhere near my base

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA088Subtitle.text: *Jarmen Kell's just another sniper, Punk. I've got dozens of snipers

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA089Subtitle.text: *Yeah, build your Air Field--get some birds in the air. May be your only shot a stopping me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA090Subtitle.text: *Only one War Factory? It's gonna take at least half-a-dozen to stop me, Kid
