DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA091Subtitle.text: *Is that Barracks a little close to the front-lines, Kid? Hard to sleep with bullets in your barracks

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA092Subtitle.text: *Don't just sell one building, Boy--sell them all and hope that I don't come for you anyway

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA093Subtitle.text: *Don't get cocky, Boy--this ain't over yet

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA094Subtitle.text: *You may think you have the upper-hand, but I've got a few tricks left in me. You'll see

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA095Subtitle.text: *I've dug myself outta worse holes than this, Punk. You ain't gonna win that easily

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA096Subtitle.text: *You think you're beating me? You best think again

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA097Subtitle.text: *HuhI guess it's over. Nice work, Kid. I guess you took me down a peg or two

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA098Subtitle.text: *Can you feel my fist starting to close around your neck, Punk?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA099Subtitle.text: *Don't take losing to me so hard--everyone loses to me, Kid

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA100Subtitle.text: *Give me a sec to get some tanks together and I'll end this little skirmish

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA101Subtitle.text: *Why don't you just give up now, <sarcastic> "General."

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA102Subtitle.text: *Boy, I beat you like an old drum. Who gave you a command? Cause I've got some word for them

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA103Subtitle.text: *Don't click that button unless you're serious, Boy

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA104Subtitle.text: *You wanna tangle with me? I think you better think again, Kid

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA105Subtitle.text: *Don't bring that attitude in here unless you can back it up, Punk

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA107Subtitle.text: *Maybe you could make a few extra bucks polishing my boots, cause you sure ain't no general

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_BossUSA109Subtitle.text: *I ain't gonna give no speeches, so let's just get this on

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo001Subtitle.text: *I have some surprises for you, General. Why don't you come out and play?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo002Subtitle.text: *Now that the field is covered with explosives, I suppose we'll attack

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo003Subtitle.text: *General, I have a delivery for yousign for it, won't you?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo004Subtitle.text: *Careful, who knows when Jarmen Kell will sneak into your base

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo005Subtitle.text: *Did your building just blow up? HmmI wonder how that happened?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo006Subtitle.text: *All of my forces are packed with explosives, General. I wouldn't shoot at them if I were you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo007Subtitle.text: *My Terrorists have learned to disguise themselves asoops, have I said too much?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo008Subtitle.text: *You might notice that my explosives pack a bit more punchI hope you appreciate our attention to quality

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo009Subtitle.text: *Look how quickly the Scud Launcher destroys a building nowjust wait, it's amazing

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo010Subtitle.text: *First, all is silencethen "boom!"ahhdon't you just love it, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo011Subtitle.text: *I rarely attack, you should feel honored

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo013Subtitle.text: *My troops are coming to assault your basemake them feel welcome

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo014Subtitle.text: *Please ignore my workers, General; they're just burying someummgarbage for me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo015Subtitle.text: *Oh, General, you must see thisit's the bomb. <childish laugh>

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo016Subtitle.text: *We're going out for more explosives, General. Be right back

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo017Subtitle.text: *It's quiet out there, General. You know what quiet means, right? BOOM!!!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo018Subtitle.text: *I am the master of explosives, General. You have no defense against me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo019Subtitle.text: *Your base has been targeted for demolition

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo020Subtitle.text: *Do you fear my next attack, General? You should

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo021Subtitle.text: *As we speak my agents are sneaking into your base and planting explosives

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo022Subtitle.text: *Your building could be wired to explode right now. You'll never know until it's too late

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo023Subtitle.text: *There are few units that can detect my demolitionsdo you know which ones they are?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo024Subtitle.text: *Demo Traps are difficult to construct, General. To appreciate their beauty you have to see one up close

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo025Subtitle.text: *How are you enjoying my tricks and traps so far?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo027Subtitle.text: *We've destroyed your BarracksI hope no one was in there

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo028Subtitle.text: *Your War Factory has fallen, General. Build another one so we can knock it down again

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo029Subtitle.text: *Air Fields are so fragile--it's hardly even fun to destroy them

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo030Subtitle.text: *Your base defenses cannot take my explosives, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo031Subtitle.text: *Ah, there's nothing quite like destroying a Command Center

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo032Subtitle.text: *We've destroyed so many of your buildings, GeneralI appreciate you building more for our ammusement

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo033Subtitle.text: *You've destroyed our Oil Derrick. Now you're getting into the spirit of things

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo034Subtitle.text: *My Barracks! Many of my demolitions were in there, General. I'll make you pay for this

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo035Subtitle.text: *Not my War Factory! General, this annoy habit you've developed cannot continue

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo036Subtitle.text: *Not to worry, my base defenses are only an early-warning signal. Now you must walk through my true defenses

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo037Subtitle.text: *Too many! You've destroy too many of my structures, General. Now the fighting gets dirty

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo038Subtitle.text: *We will rebuild that Command Center, General, and you will play for this transgression

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo039Subtitle.text: *General, how do you expect me to defeat you if you keep destroying my vehicles?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo040Subtitle.text: *You're cutting my men down before they can place their demolitionsthat doesn't seem right, does it, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo041Subtitle.text: *Ah yes, capture that Oil Derrick, General. Then we'll have more to destroy

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo042Subtitle.text: *General, why do you want that Artillery Platform?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo043Subtitle.text: *Good, General, capture the Oil Refinerythey blow-up so dramatically

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo044Subtitle.text: *Be careful, General--your men have just enter the danger zone around my base. Even I don't remember where all the traps are set out there

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo045Subtitle.text: *General, your men are coming dangerously close to my base. I'd turn back if I were you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo046Subtitle.text: *Get out of my base, General. This whole area is wired with explosives, and I'm not afraid to use them

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo047Subtitle.text: *You fool! Do you know how many explosives are surrounding your men right now?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo048Subtitle.text: *Attacking from the flank, General? There might be few defenses there, but what about traps?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo049Subtitle.text: *The back of my base is particularly nasty, General. I wouldn't recommend an assault from there

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo050Subtitle.text: *A frontal assault?! You are more of a fool than I thought, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo051Subtitle.text: *There is nothing in this valley for you except death

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo052Subtitle.text: *Careful, General; this looks like a good place for an ambushoops, too late

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo053Subtitle.text: *You think I didn't prepare for you coming here, General? Fool

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo054Subtitle.text: *Those are my resources, General. Go find your own

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo055Subtitle.text: *General, you've entered my demolitions storage facility. One false move and we all die

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo056Subtitle.text: *Ah, I see we hit one of your power lines. I hope your power isn't out for too long

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo057Subtitle.text: *Your dependency on electricity will be you undoing, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo058Subtitle.text: *Your resources are exhausted, General. My forces are circling for the kill

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo059Subtitle.text: *My resources are low, General. Mind if we come take some of yours?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo060Subtitle.text: *A Scud StormI seeWell, perhaps it is time to build one of my own

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo061Subtitle.text: *I wonder how many explosives it will take to destroy that Nuclear Silo?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo062Subtitle.text: *Now why do you want to build a Particle Cannon? We were just beginning to have fun, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo063Subtitle.text: *So many base defenses, General. How do you expect my bombers to enter your base now?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo064Subtitle.text: *Tanksso many tanks. I'll enjoy watching your tanks hit my traps, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo065Subtitle.text: *Stop building planes, Generalyou'll miss the genius of my traps

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo066Subtitle.text: *With that many infantry you're sure to set-off my Demo Traps. I'd tell them to spread out when crossing the field, Generalor not

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo067Subtitle.text: *So many buildings Your base is a perfect target for my explosives, General. Thank you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo068Subtitle.text: *Foolish move, General. Your Scud Storm won't stop me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo069Subtitle.text: *Nuclear missile! You will pay for this, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo070Subtitle.text: *No! That particle beam will set off my explosives!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo071Subtitle.text: *Yes, garrison that building, General--it probably doesn't have explosives attached to it

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo072Subtitle.text: *Hello, Colonel Burton. Try not to step on any traps

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo073Subtitle.text: *Black Lotusjust because you can detect my traps do not think I am now vulnerable

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo074Subtitle.text: *Why would you send Jarmen Kell against me, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo075Subtitle.text: *Do not build any more Air Fields, GeneralI don't like them

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo076Subtitle.text: *The War Factory builds vehiclesvehicles that will set-off my Demo Traps

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo077Subtitle.text: *Do you think it is wise to build a Barracks, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo078Subtitle.text: *Please, General, don't sell-off what I could destroy for you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo079Subtitle.text: *General, you're not playing fair. Now go step on some traps

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo080Subtitle.text: *You're exceptionally lucky, General, but you can't avoid my Demo Traps forever

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo081Subtitle.text: *No one has beaten my traps, General, and you won't be the firstyou'll see

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo082Subtitle.text: *Do you think you're beating me, General? This could change in an instant--I don't fight fair

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo083Subtitle.text: *You may have defeated me, General, but Deathstrike will avenge me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo084Subtitle.text: *Ha ha! Your troops are falling to my traps, General. Soon they'll all be gone

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo085Subtitle.text: *You're losing, General. My tactics elude you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo086Subtitle.text: *You'll never defeat me, General. You should leave before you get hurt

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo087Subtitle.text: *I have so many explosives leftmore explosives than you have forces I'm afraid

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo089Subtitle.text: *I have just the thing. Let's go make war

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo090Subtitle.text: *Demolitions expert: How can I help you?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo091Subtitle.text: *I wonder if I could wire that button to explode?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo092Subtitle.text: *Please, General--enter my battlefieldbut watch where to step

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo093Subtitle.text: *You were lucky this time, General. You could never beat me again

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo094Subtitle.text: *You were not prepared for this kind of war. Try again, if you dare

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo095Subtitle.text: *Here we see the battlefield--openuntouched by battlea blank slate for our little...

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo096Subtitle.text: *Now where did those Demo Traps come from?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Demo097Subtitle.text: *Perhaps I have a few cards hidden up my sleeve, but did you except any less from me, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger001Subtitle.text: *Hey, General, you ever seen a Raptor up close?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger002Subtitle.text: *Hey, General, did you see that Stealth Fighter?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger003Subtitle.text: *Birds' away! Let's go hunt some dozers!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger004Subtitle.text: *I'm done playing with you, General. (Announcing to his own forces) Everyone attack!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger005Subtitle.text: *Will you look at thatUS military spending at its best

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger006Subtitle.text: *(Singingbadly)and the rockets' red glare, the bombs bursting in air

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger007Subtitle.text: *Here comes the rain of terror, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger008Subtitle.text: *How are you enjoying the Shock-and-Awe, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger010Subtitle.text: *It doesn't seem fair, does it, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger011Subtitle.text: *It's time to pull the goalies. Everyone attack!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger013Subtitle.text: *It's awfully quiet out thereyou didn't leave did you, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger014Subtitle.text: *Don't worry, General, this is just the quiet before the storm

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger015Subtitle.text: *I'd take this break to rebuild your defenses, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger016Subtitle.text: *Shhdid you hear that? I wouldn't worry, it's probably nothing

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger017Subtitle.text: *Sorry, General, we're just taking a lunch-break-be with you in a minute

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger018Subtitle.text: *You've forced me to use tanksI hate using tanks

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger019Subtitle.text: *Having trouble crossing the river, General? Wanna lift?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger021Subtitle.text: *Stealth won't save you, General; we'll find you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger023Subtitle.text: *Huh, where are you going to train your troops now?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger024Subtitle.text: *Having trouble keeping up those defenses, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger025Subtitle.text: *You've lost a lot of buildings, General; were you planning on using harsh language now?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger030Subtitle.text: *This is General Granger to Aircraft Carrier Olympia: Send reinforcementsrepeat: send reinforcements

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger031Subtitle.text: *They're attacking the Command Center! All forces, regroup!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger032Subtitle.text: *I don't appreciate you shooting down my planes, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger033Subtitle.text: *They're taking over our Oil Derricks! Rangers, get out there and take them back!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger036Subtitle.text: *The enemy's in our perimeter! All planes return to base!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger038Subtitle.text: *You're not stealing my supplies, are you, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger040Subtitle.text: *Hiding in the village, huh. That's a coward's tactic, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger041Subtitle.text: *Stop hiding, General. Don't make me come and get you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger046Subtitle.text: *Having trouble keeping your power up, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger047Subtitle.text: *Oops, your power's down - here come the bombs!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger048Subtitle.text: *Out of resources, General? Want to borrow some?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger049Subtitle.text: *Hey, General, how 'bout we call this one a draw?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger050Subtitle.text: *You may have won the battle, General, but the war is far from over

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger051Subtitle.text: *So, you built a Scud Storm. Think you can defend it?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger052Subtitle.text: *Hmm, that's a lot of anti-air, General Think it will be enough to calm the fear?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger053Subtitle.text: *Your tanks are no match for my planes, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger055Subtitle.text: *Garrison all the buildings you want, General-it won't help

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger056Subtitle.text: *How much more of this can you take, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger059Subtitle.text: *This battle is over, General-surrender or prepare to die!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger060Subtitle.text: *Not going to surrender, huh? Too bad

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger062Subtitle.text: *Come on, General--I'll show you the meaning of "Death from Above."

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger064Subtitle.text: *I guess it's time for me to go find a good airline job

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger065Subtitle.text: *I win--you lose. What more is there to say?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger066Subtitle.text: *Be advised: This area is under the control of Air Force General Malcolm Granger. Withdraw now or prepare to be bombed back to the stone-age

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger067Subtitle.text: *General, you're no match for me--I own the skies!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger068Subtitle.text: *Watch the skies, General; we're going to put on an air-show

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger071Subtitle.text: *You don't mind if we drop-in, do ya General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger072Subtitle.text: *That's two of my airfields you've hit, General. I'm starting to get annoyed

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger073Subtitle.text: *Curse you, General. If you hit another airfield I'll come for you personally

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger074Subtitle.text: *That's the last airfield you destroy today. (Announcing to his own troops) Forces, target their Command Center

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger075Subtitle.text: *I can't believe you beat me, General. I salute your superior tactics

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger076Subtitle.text: *It looks like you defeated me this time, General, but we'll meet again someday and I won't be so merciful because-

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger078Subtitle.text: *You don't think I'm going to let you keep that Scud Storm, do you?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger079Subtitle.text: *Another Scud Storm? I guess it's time to take the up a notch

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger081Subtitle.text: *So many Rangers-so few buildings to capture

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger082Subtitle.text: *General, do ya know how a Fuel-Air Bomb works? How 'bout a demonstration?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger083Subtitle.text: *Welcome to the party, Colonel Burton. You're in for it now, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger084Subtitle.text: *Do you know how to stop an A-10, General? Me neither

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger085Subtitle.text: *Hey, wanna see our new Bunker Buster?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger086Subtitle.text: *Artillery! You think you can attack me with artillery?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger087Subtitle.text: *You know that Scud Launcher is never going to make it to my base, right?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger088Subtitle.text: *Wait, that's a Bomb Truck! Everyone look out!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger089Subtitle.text: *You've forced me to use tanksI hate using tanks

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger090Subtitle.text: *Having trouble crossing the river, General? Wanna lift?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger092Subtitle.text: *Stealth won't save you, General; we'll find you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Grainger093Subtitle.text: *Hmm, that's a lot of anti-air, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry001Subtitle.text: *So, this is where you're hiding, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry003Subtitle.text: *(Chinese infantry troops die) <angry voice> 1 billion more where that came from

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry004Subtitle.text: *(Paradrop)Like a swarm of locusts they descend from the sky to devour all those who stand against China

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry009Subtitle.text: *Don't worry General, we don't take prisoners

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry011Subtitle.text: *It's ok General, we've brought our own flag for your base

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry012Subtitle.text: *Soon all your men will see are boots marching over them

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry015Subtitle.text: *Do you know how hard it is to feed a horde, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry016Subtitle.text: *I have enough men to hold a parade. Can we have it in your base?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry018Subtitle.text: *Are you just going to sit there and wait to be overrun?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry020Subtitle.text: *How long does it take for you to build your little tank force?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry021Subtitle.text: *<sarcastic> What tactic will you amaze me with now, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry022Subtitle.text: *This can't be the best you can do, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry024Subtitle.text: *You were not prepared for this challenge, were you, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry025Subtitle.text: *I have enough men to crush you without firing a shot

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry027Subtitle.text: *Awwwe've knocked over your little Tech Building. Boo-hoo

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry028Subtitle.text: *Now your Barracks is gone. How will you fight without men?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry029Subtitle.text: *Without a War Factory you'll have to fight me man-to-man, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry030Subtitle.text: *No more planes for you. Get on the ground and fight like a man

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry031Subtitle.text: *My men are marching right through you base defenses, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry032Subtitle.text: *There is only empty ground where your Command Center once stood, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry033Subtitle.text: *I have lost many men, General, but the cost to your buildings has been worth it

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry035Subtitle.text: *NO! Not my Barracks! We will build another, Generalthen you will pay

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry036Subtitle.text: *My War Factory is not essential to my victory, but do not destroy another

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry037Subtitle.text: *You have destroyed my Air Field! This is getting annoying, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry038Subtitle.text: *Destroy all the base defenses you want--they're only there to slow you down anyway

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry039Subtitle.text: *You have cost me many buildings, General. My men are coming to collect repayment

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry040Subtitle.text: *Nooo! They destroyed my Command Center! Go get them! Keep them away from me!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry041Subtitle.text: *Swat all the planes you like, General--we'll make more

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry042Subtitle.text: *My vehicles are not for your target practice, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry043Subtitle.text: *There are many more in my army ready to sacrifice for China, General. You won't stop us

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry044Subtitle.text: *I see you've captured my Oil Derrick, General. We are coming to take back China's oil now

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry045Subtitle.text: *That old Artillery Platform is destroyed, General; you'll never get it to work

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry046Subtitle.text: *Do you think that Oil Refinery is just there for anyone to use? Return the refinery to me now

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry047Subtitle.text: *Get any closer to my base and I'll set the horde out on you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry048Subtitle.text: *I warn you, General, get away from my base. Do you know what a hundred men can do to a tank?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry049Subtitle.text: *They're in our base! Kill them! Get them out of here!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry051Subtitle.text: *General, get away from my resources--my men need those

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry052Subtitle.text: *General, do not try to flank my base

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry053Subtitle.text: *A back-door attack will not help you, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry054Subtitle.text: *Attacking the front of my base is foolish, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry055Subtitle.text: *Those are my Tech Buildings, General. Stay away

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry057Subtitle.text: *Crossing that bridge is a mistake, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry058Subtitle.text: *You've run out of power, General--your defenses are down and my men will invade soon

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry059Subtitle.text: *Without power you'll never stop my horde, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry060Subtitle.text: *You've wasted all your resources fighting my menbut I still have more men

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry061Subtitle.text: *We are out of resources! How did this happen?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry062Subtitle.text: *Build your Scud Storm--it will only hit a few of my menthe rest will destroy you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry063Subtitle.text: *I thought nuclear missile were not allowed! This is hardly fair, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry064Subtitle.text: *That Particle Cannon is useless against my horde!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry065Subtitle.text: *Yes, you should build more base defenses--at least then you can stop the first wave of the charging horde

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry066Subtitle.text: *Coward! You know that your tanks cannot crush my men, don't you?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry067Subtitle.text: *So many planesno matter, my horde and bring down your planes too

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry068Subtitle.text: *You're mobilizing a horde of your own?! You will need many more men to match my strength, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry069Subtitle.text: *You base has grown too large, General. It is time for my men to drop in and capture a few for China

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry071Subtitle.text: *Nuclear missile approaching! Flee! Get me out of here!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry072Subtitle.text: *Ooh, look at the pretty light show. What do you hope to accomplish with that petty weapon, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry073Subtitle.text: *Get out of that building, General. We have ways of bringing you out by force if necessary

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry074Subtitle.text: *You've brought Colonel Burton to our little war, General. Even he will fall when faced with the horde

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry075Subtitle.text: *Black Lotus? How will she help you survive my horde, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry076Subtitle.text: *All forces beware: Jarmen Kell is hiding in the field

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry077Subtitle.text: *I see that Air Field, General. Run to the air! Fear my horde!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry078Subtitle.text: *My men will tear your tanks apart as fast as you can make them, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry079Subtitle.text: *My men are trained in groups of threehow fast can you train your men?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry080Subtitle.text: *Selling your buildings? Foolish! What will you buy with the money to stop my horde?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry081Subtitle.text: *I have so many forces, how can you be winning this battle?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry083Subtitle.text: *You've caught me off guard, General, but now I am ready for you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry084Subtitle.text: *You will not defeat my horde, General! Your current advantage will soon be lost

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry085Subtitle.text: *I do not accept this defeat, General. My men will cover my escape and we will fight another day

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry086Subtitle.text: *My men outnumber you now, General. I would be wise to surrender

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry087Subtitle.text: *This looks like the end for you, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry088Subtitle.text: *If you do not retreat now I will unleash the horde to scrape you from our land

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry089Subtitle.text: *Do you feel the end drawing near, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry090Subtitle.text: *Haha! I have defeated you. Now you must choose to join my horde or die

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry091Subtitle.text: *It is time to unleash the horde!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry092Subtitle.text: *Face me and fall like the rest

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry094Subtitle.text: *We will tear through you like locusts

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry095Subtitle.text: *Men? Where are my men? You wouldn't consider letting me go would you? Please don't hurt me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry096Subtitle.text: *We have nice uniforms in the hordeit won't be so badyou might even like it. But I doubt it

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry097Subtitle.text: *Are you ready to face my horde, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Infantry098Subtitle.text: *And think, this is just the first wave

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser001Subtitle.text: *I have you in my sights now, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser003Subtitle.text: * (player units destroyed) Interesting choice of tactics, they didn't help my last opponent either

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser004Subtitle.text: *I'm about to attack, I thought you could use the warning

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser005Subtitle.text: *Maybe you should re-evaluate your strategies, they obviously don't work

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser006Subtitle.text: *How do you like my new toys General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser007Subtitle.text: *Prepare yourself General, you're about to be taught a lesson in war

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser009Subtitle.text: *Maybe you're not cut out for this, try painting

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser011Subtitle.text: *My lasers will cut through your defenses like a hot knife through butter

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser013Subtitle.text: *It's a whole new age of warfare, General, and it's coming to your doorstep

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser014Subtitle.text: *Target is painted--all forces begin attack run

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser015Subtitle.text: *Originally all my weapons also had laser targeting, but my enemies got confused

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser016Subtitle.text: *Don't look directly at the laser--you could burn-out the back of your head

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser018Subtitle.text: *Lasers must be calibrated precisely for maximum effect

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser019Subtitle.text: *Dozers, build more Reactors--lasers take a lot of power

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser020Subtitle.text: *Can you match fifty million mega-joules of lasing power, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser021Subtitle.text: *Looks like a big space battle, doesn't it

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser022Subtitle.text: *My lasers are going to turn your armor to vapor

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser023Subtitle.text: *General, you should really try to coordinate your attacks--this has been all to easy for me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser024Subtitle.text: *Don't get distracted by the pretty lights, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser025Subtitle.text: *Would you like me to "beam you up," General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser026Subtitle.text: *Your weapons can't match my pinpoint accuracy, General. Why not just surrender?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser027Subtitle.text: *Why don't you build another Barracks, General? I'll enjoy destroying that one too

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser028Subtitle.text: *If you can't protect your War Factory, how safe could your Command Center be?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser029Subtitle.text: *Your planes are not safe from my lasers, especially without your Air Field

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser030Subtitle.text: *Your base defenses are worthless against me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser031Subtitle.text: *Ah, the Command Center--queen of this chessboard. This match is all but over now, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser032Subtitle.text: *My lasers have destroyed so many of your buildingshow do you keep fighting?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser033Subtitle.text: *General, don't destroy my Tech Buildings, I need those

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser036Subtitle.text: *How dare you destroy my Air Field!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser037Subtitle.text: *They're destroying our defenses! All forces: defend the base!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser038Subtitle.text: *General, these losses are unacceptable. I'll repay you for destroying my buildings

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser039Subtitle.text: *No! Quickly, Dozers rebuild the Command Center!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser040Subtitle.text: *General, if you bring down any more of my planes I'll use all my Super Weapons to destroy you!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser042Subtitle.text: *You're hunting my men on purpose, aren't you, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser043Subtitle.text: *Reap the rewards from that Oil Derrick while you can; we'll be there to take it soon

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser044Subtitle.text: *That Artillery Platform is no match for my airborne lasers

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser045Subtitle.text: *Did you know that that Oil Refinery will let you build vehicles faster and more efficiently? Oops, I probably shouldn't have told you that

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser046Subtitle.text: *You've tripped our outer perimeter warning lasers, General. We know you're there now

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser047Subtitle.text: *I see you approaching my base, General. I wouldn't advise coming any closer

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser048Subtitle.text: *The enemy is in our base! All forces return and deploy lasers!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser050Subtitle.text: *General, those resources are for me--stay away from them

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser051Subtitle.text: *Attacking from the flanks, eh? It will take more than tactical tricks to beat me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser053Subtitle.text: *Yes, come straight through my front-door, Generalif you dare

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser054Subtitle.text: *Be careful, General--the back-door of my base isn't so undefended as it seems

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser055Subtitle.text: *You are foolish to come here, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser056Subtitle.text: *These resources are not enough to save your failed strategy, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser057Subtitle.text: *No! Stay away! I need those reactors to power my lasers!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser058Subtitle.text: *Out of power?! How could you let your base run out of power?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser059Subtitle.text: *Running out of power is a fatal mistake, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser060Subtitle.text: *You're out of resources, General. You'll never recover before we overrun you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser061Subtitle.text: *Out of resources?! This is unacceptable! Chinooks, gather faster!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser062Subtitle.text: *Sell that Scud Storm, General, or I'll destroy it for you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser063Subtitle.text: *That Nuke Silo won't stop me, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser064Subtitle.text: *If you build a Particle Cannon and I destroy it with a Particle Beamis that irony?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser065Subtitle.text: *That excessive amount of base defenses will only slow down my laser, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser066Subtitle.text: *Your conventional tanks are no match for my laser based weapons platforms, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser067Subtitle.text: *That's quite a lot of planes, General. Are you putting on an air show?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser068Subtitle.text: *Quite a few infantry you've trained there, General. I can't wait to see this crazy plan

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser069Subtitle.text: *Your base is starting to look like a housing tract, General. Maybe I should play some connect-the-dots with the Particle Cannon to thin your numbers a bit

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser070Subtitle.text: *I will shoot those scud missiles down, General. Then you will pay

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser071Subtitle.text: *My lasers will bring that nuke down, General. The fallout will be on your hands

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser072Subtitle.text: *Particle Cannon?! I wonder what would happen if we crossed the beams

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser073Subtitle.text: *General, don't garrison that building; come out and play

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser074Subtitle.text: *General, Colonel Burton is a bumbling fool

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser075Subtitle.text: *Black Lotus is not invisible to my lasers, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser076Subtitle.text: *I hope Jarmen Kell isn't using a laser scope on his rifleit wouldn't work against me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser077Subtitle.text: *Building an Air Field only provides airborne targets for my lasers, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser078Subtitle.text: *You're going to need a lot of tanks to get to me, General. Good luck

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser079Subtitle.text: *Building a Barracks will only get your men hurt, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser080Subtitle.text: *Selling off your structures eh? That the first mistake of a desperate general

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser081Subtitle.text: *What?! You can't be beating me! Your lack of precision alone should ensure my victory

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser082Subtitle.text: *I can't lose to you--you're a bumbling buffoon!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser083Subtitle.text: *How can you be winning? This isn't how it played out in the simulation

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser084Subtitle.text: *I've calculated every variable, yet you're winninghow is this possible?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser085Subtitle.text: *No! This can't be the end! What trickery did you use to beat me?!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser086Subtitle.text: *My planning a preparation is leading me to a clear victory

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser087Subtitle.text: *Precision will always defeat brute force, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser088Subtitle.text: *This must be like a nightmare for you, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser089Subtitle.text: *Have you decided how you are going to accept this defeat, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser090Subtitle.text: *You are defeated, General. But then that was never really in question, was it?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser092Subtitle.text: *You're not in my class, General--try an easier opponent

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser093Subtitle.text: *I calculate that you will lose this battle, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser095Subtitle.text: *You defeated me, General, but I will scan your tactics and devise a superior strategy

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser096Subtitle.text: *Your weaknesses became obvious when I scanned your tactics

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser097Subtitle.text: *There you go, General--I've drawn the line in the sand

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Laser098Subtitle.text: *Now I dare you to cross it. Come and get me, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke001Subtitle.text: *At least it's a dry heat, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke002Subtitle.text: *Soon your base will glow like the sun

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke003Subtitle.text: *How do you expect to fight this, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke004Subtitle.text: *Your weapons are no match for my power!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke006Subtitle.text: * The glow! The wonderful glow! Can't you see it, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke007Subtitle.text: *It looks like a nuclear winter this year, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke009Subtitle.text: *This is only the beginning, General. The beginning of the end

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke010Subtitle.text: *Don't worry, General, the warheads are on their way

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke011Subtitle.text: *Sorry for the delay, General; just gathering my forces

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke012Subtitle.text: *Is the heat getting to you, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke014Subtitle.text: *All forces, prepare for the next assault

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke015Subtitle.text: *Now where did I put those launch codes?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke017Subtitle.text: *I think this is your half-life, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke018Subtitle.text: *I hope your radar isn't down, General; I'd hate for you to miss what's coming next

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke019Subtitle.text: *I know your weaknesses now, General. The next attack will be unstoppable

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke020Subtitle.text: *Soon you will know the glory of my nuclear arsenal

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke021Subtitle.text: *I'd stock up on sun-block if I were you, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke023Subtitle.text: *Eventually someone must win the arms race, or what's the point of racing?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke024Subtitle.text: *Time to put on the lead underwear

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke025Subtitle.text: *Remember: Don't look directly at the blast, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke026Subtitle.text: *It appears you have only trained your men to die, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke027Subtitle.text: *Now your War Factory is a glow crater. Wonderful

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke028Subtitle.text: *Your defenses crack like so many eggshells, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke029Subtitle.text: *Oh, you weren't in that Command Center, were you, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke030Subtitle.text: *Why do you destroy my barracks, General? It isn't my men you should fear

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke031Subtitle.text: *My War Factory! What have you done?! My precious tanksgone...

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke032Subtitle.text: *Leave me alone! What have I ever done to you?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke033Subtitle.text: *My Command Center! No!!! I won't lose command! I won't!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke034Subtitle.text: *I can't believe you are beating me! Perhaps you would give me a moment to rebuild?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke035Subtitle.text: *We have suffered great loses at your hands, General, but this isn't over yet

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke036Subtitle.text: *General, you can have that oil derrick, but it won't help you stop me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke037Subtitle.text: *Get out of my base, General! I won't ask twice

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke038Subtitle.text: *How long were you planning on stay in my base, General? Should I prepare a bunk for you?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke039Subtitle.text: *Leave my base, General, or I will be forced detonate my warheads

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke040Subtitle.text: *Do you like my village, General? Please, make yourself at home

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke041Subtitle.text: *Coming to inspect the nukes, General? You can look, but don't touch

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke042Subtitle.text: *I'd be careful, General; these nuclear depots tend to leak

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke044Subtitle.text: *General, I wouldn't capture that oil derrick if I were you--I'll only destroy it

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke046Subtitle.text: *I see your power is down, General. Should I send you some nuclear energy?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke047Subtitle.text: *Out of funds already? Don't you know war is expensive, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke048Subtitle.text: *Please, build more tanks, General; even they will melteventually

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke049Subtitle.text: *Keep those planes away from my silos!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke050Subtitle.text: *So many soldiers, General. Do they have their radiation suits on?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke051Subtitle.text: *How many nukes do you think it will take me to destroy that new weapon, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke052Subtitle.text: *How many nukes do you think it will take me to destroy that new weapon, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke053Subtitle.text: *Selling off buildings? General, if you wanted to clear that area I could have done it for you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke054Subtitle.text: *You cannot stand against my might, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke055Subtitle.text: *Surrender! Or do you want the bombing will continue?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke056Subtitle.text: *You are losing this war, General. A few more bombs and your base will fall!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke057Subtitle.text: *Might makes right. Wouldn't you agree, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke058Subtitle.text: *And now for my final attack. Hold on, General, you're going to like thiswait, no you won't

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke059Subtitle.text: *None will stand against our nuclear arsenal

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke060Subtitle.text: *Challenge me and your base will glow like the sun

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke061Subtitle.text: *Soon you'll be nothing more than nuclear waste

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke062Subtitle.text: *Another moment and I would have reduced you to dust

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke063Subtitle.text: *You are lucky to have survived this battle intact. Challenge me again if you dare

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke064Subtitle.text: *Welcome to the party, General. Please excuse the mess

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke065Subtitle.text: *Now, General, I think you understand why I am known as Mao the Nuke

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke066Subtitle.text: *We've been waiting for you, General. Please accept our gifts

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke067Subtitle.text: *More gifts, General. Our generosity is limitless

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke068Subtitle.text: *Now the battle begins in earnest. Prepare yourself, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke069Subtitle.text: *Cold fusion is no way to create power, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke070Subtitle.text: *It pains me to destroy your reactors, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke071Subtitle.text: *You call that a "super weapon", General? It breaks like a toy

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke072Subtitle.text: *No! My warheads! My beautiful warheads! You will pay, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke073Subtitle.text: *That's okay, General, I have more nukes for you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke074Subtitle.text: *Hey, do you know how much that nuke silo costs?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke075Subtitle.text: *Okay, General, that's enough--I'm running out of nukes!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke076Subtitle.text: *Why do you want to blow-up my nukes anyway, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke077Subtitle.text: *No! That was my last nuclear silo! Why, General..why?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke078Subtitle.text: *(enemy lost all silo) You have destroyed all of my siloswhy, General? Why?!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke079Subtitle.text: *(enemy caps player barracks) I've captured your barracks, General. Perhaps I will sell it

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke080Subtitle.text: *(enemy caps player war factory) My men have captured your War Factory. You really should have guarded it better

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke081Subtitle.text: *(player base) Your defenses are weak, General; we have entered you base

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke082Subtitle.text: *(combat zone) My forces are in the field, General. Soon they will roll into your base

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke083Subtitle.text: *(supply dock area) Ah, we've found some supplies. Soon we will control all of the resources!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke084Subtitle.text: *(second supply dock area) More supplies for us. How are you funding your troops, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke085Subtitle.text: *(oil derrick area) Red Guard--capture that oil derrick!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke086Subtitle.text: *It appears we have used all the supplies in the area. I hope you've made other arrangements, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke087Subtitle.text: *(enemy out of power) What?! I'm out of power? How can I be out of power? Someone get me more power! Now!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke088Subtitle.text: *(ambulance) That ambulance will not save your men from the radiation

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke089Subtitle.text: *(strat center) A Strategy Center? What strategy could you possibly devise to fight me?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke090Subtitle.text: *(black market) The Black Market won't sell you anything powerful enough to stop me, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke091Subtitle.text: *(propaganda center) Your propaganda will not turn anyone against my nuclear power, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke092Subtitle.text: *Oh, look--I have a nuke ready for you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke094Subtitle.text: *Three nukes?!? That's three times the fun!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke096Subtitle.text: *Five nukes? Maybe you want me to send you a clean pair of shorts now?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Nuke097Subtitle.text: *(player sells building) General, if you sell off any more buildings I'll win by default

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth002Subtitle.text: *Here comes my next attacktry to be ready this time, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth003Subtitle.text: *You can't kill what you can't see

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth006Subtitle.text: *hanks for the new units. They'll prove useful in destroying you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth009Subtitle.text: *I think it's time to acquire a new base

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth010Subtitle.text: *It was never meant to be General. Good bye!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth011Subtitle.text: *Closing your eyes will not make the pain of defeat any easier

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth012Subtitle.text: *My stealth assassins will make short work of your forces, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth013Subtitle.text: *We will strike like the snake--quick and invisible

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth014Subtitle.text: *You will not stand against this attack, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth016Subtitle.text: *You'll never see me until it is too late , General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth017Subtitle.text: *General, perhaps you could introduce me to Black Lotus. I'm a great admirer of heruh, work

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth018Subtitle.text: *When it is quiet you should fear me the most

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth019Subtitle.text: *I can't wait for your next attack, General. Can we expect it today?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth020Subtitle.text: *Don't let your senses grow dull, General--you can expect my attack any moment now

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth022Subtitle.text: *I will attack when you least expect it, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth023Subtitle.text: *My men are all over the battlefield, General...hidden from viewready to strike

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth024Subtitle.text: *Stealth is my allyand your enemy

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth025Subtitle.text: *You've lost your Tech Building, General. What shall you lose next?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth026Subtitle.text: *You could not stop me from destroying you Barracks, General. What do you value if not your men?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth027Subtitle.text: *Destroying you War Factory was child's-play. Your Command Center can't be far behind

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth028Subtitle.text: *Your planes have lost their Air Field, and you have lost your advantage, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth029Subtitle.text: *There is a hole in your defenses now, General. Who can say how many of my men are in your base now

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth030Subtitle.text: *Your Command Center is gone, General. My victory is all but assured

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth031Subtitle.text: *I don't relish destroying your buildings, General, but you leave me no choice

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth032Subtitle.text: *You are targeting my Tech Buildings because you have no hope of reaching my base

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth033Subtitle.text: *You have destroyed my Barracks, but we will rebuild and those men will be avenged

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth034Subtitle.text: *My Arms Dealer will not be pleased that you destroyed his depot, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth035Subtitle.text: *You have destroyed that base defense, General, but that just may have allowed my men time to out-flank you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth036Subtitle.text: *You've destroyed many of my buildings, but with even one factory left I am a dangerous opponent, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth037Subtitle.text: *Nicely played, General; you've destroyed my Command Center. Now I will be forced to fight dirty

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth038Subtitle.text: *You're quite adept at discovering my camouflaged vehicles, General. I'll consider a new tactic

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth039Subtitle.text: *Your brutish tactics are costing me men, General. I'll reconsider my tactics now that I know you have none

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth040Subtitle.text: *Now that I've captured this Oil Derrick, my forces will grow even faster

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth041Subtitle.text: *Artillery Platforms are so brutish, but I can't let you have it, can I?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth042Subtitle.text: *This Oil Refinery is now mine, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth043Subtitle.text: *General, you are coming dangerously close to my base

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth044Subtitle.text: *I see forces approaching my base, General. You don't mean to invade do you?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth045Subtitle.text: *You are testing my patience, General. Remove you forces from my base

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth046Subtitle.text: *If you do not remove your forces from my base, I'll remove them permanently

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth047Subtitle.text: *So you're trying to enter my base from the flank. We'll put a stop to that

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth048Subtitle.text: *A back-door attack? I didn't realize you were so devious, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth049Subtitle.text: *A frontal assault? That will prove a fatal mistake, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth050Subtitle.text: *Those are my resources, General--go find your own

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth051Subtitle.text: *Why do you insist on approaching my base that way, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth052Subtitle.text: *That route is not as unguarded as it seems, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth053Subtitle.text: *The only thing you will find here is your own destruction, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth054Subtitle.text: *What is your fascination with this area, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth055Subtitle.text: *We are nearing your base, General. There may be cross-hairs on your head right now

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth056Subtitle.text: *Your outer defenses are weak, General. Let's hope you base is better protected

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth057Subtitle.text: *We have entered you base, General. Ignore us at your own peril

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth058Subtitle.text: *Your defenses are broken, General. How will you repel us now?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth059Subtitle.text: *You really should be defending these resources, General, or this battle will be very short

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth060Subtitle.text: *I've found your Tech Buildings, General. What should I do with them?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth061Subtitle.text: *I've found the back-door to your base, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth062Subtitle.text: *Can you defend against my flanking attack, General? Let's find out

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth063Subtitle.text: *Only a careless general would allow the power to fail

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth064Subtitle.text: *Your power is down, General. You did not plan your infrastructure properly. Let's hope it isn't a fatal mistake

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth065Subtitle.text: *General, you can't fight without resources. What will you do now?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth066Subtitle.text: *You have robbed me of my resources, General. Now I will return the favor

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth067Subtitle.text: *So, you have built a Scud Storm. We will have to deal with this new threat

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth068Subtitle.text: *Nuclear weapons have no place in this battle, General. Why do you insist on building them?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth069Subtitle.text: *You would strike at me from space with your cowardly Particle Cannon? I am disappointed, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth070Subtitle.text: *So many base defenses, General. What are you afraid of?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth071Subtitle.text: *You're building tanks, are you. Well, a few more sniper should take care of that

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth072Subtitle.text: *More planes? Why so many, General? Afraid to come down and face me?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth073Subtitle.text: *Let me give you some advice, General. That large group of infantry is no match for my snipers

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth074Subtitle.text: *Your base has grown so large, General. Do you think you can defend all your buildings from capture?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth075Subtitle.text: *You've launched! You'll regret using that Scud Storm, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth076Subtitle.text: *Nuclear missiles! I thought you were bluffing, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth077Subtitle.text: *Yes, look at the cowardly particle beam. Enjoy this, General--my answer will be swift and brutal

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth078Subtitle.text: *By all means, General, garrison that buildingmy snipers can possibly hit them in there

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth079Subtitle.text: *Colonel Burton, General? Perhaps you should make him the general; you'll only lead him to an early grave

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth080Subtitle.text: *Ah the beautiful Black Lotus. Perhaps after you're defeated, General, she'll agree to join me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth081Subtitle.text: *Jarmen Kell?! All snipers beware: Jarmen Kell has entered the field

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth082Subtitle.text: *Wise choice, building an Air Field, but planes alone will not be enough to defeat me, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth083Subtitle.text: *My spies tell me you've finally built your War Factory, General. Are you ready to fight now?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth084Subtitle.text: *Train all the men you wish from that Barracks, General; they are no match for my snipers

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth085Subtitle.text: *You've sold-off one of your buildings. Such tactics lead to defeat, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth086Subtitle.text: *How are you defeating my forces?! It's not possible!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth087Subtitle.text: *You may have the upper-hand now, but your desperate tactics will not endure, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth088Subtitle.text: *My forces will rise up against your oppression and we will defeat you, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth089Subtitle.text: *Enjoy your advantage for now, Generalyou'll make a mistake soon and I'll turn the tide of this battle

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth090Subtitle.text: *So it endsyou've defeated me, General, but someday I'll have my revenge. Watch your back, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth091Subtitle.text: *Your forces are weakening, General. Accept defeat and I'll go easy on you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth092Subtitle.text: *Your attacks are ineffective against me, General. Soon we'll sweep in and destroy you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth093Subtitle.text: *I'm enjoying this little game, General, but your pathetic attacks are beginning to bore me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth094Subtitle.text: *I thought you would provide more of a challenge, General. I guess I overestimated you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth095Subtitle.text: *You have fallen to Kassad, like all have before you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth096Subtitle.text: *We will strike like the snake--unseen and deadly

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth099Subtitle.text: *This will not go well for you, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth100Subtitle.text: *My men will not accept this defeat from their leader, General. You have signed my death warrant with your superior tactics

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth101Subtitle.text: *Accept your bitter defeat and remove yourself from my sight, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth102Subtitle.text: *And another who stood against me falls

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth103Subtitle.text: *And so it will be for you, General--no warning, no mercy

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Stealth104Subtitle.text: *You still have time to flee with your life, General. <evil laughter trailing off to silence>

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank001Subtitle.text: *I see you haven't run in fear, General. Soon you'll wish you had

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank002Subtitle.text: *My forces are at your door, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank003Subtitle.text: *The iron dragon marches through your puny defenses

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank004Subtitle.text: *I fear this will end you, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank005Subtitle.text: *Mmmcan you feel the thunderous song of approaching armor, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank006Subtitle.text: *Are you protecting your flanks, General? Why don't we have a look

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank007Subtitle.text: *Are you impressed with the modifications to my tanks, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank009Subtitle.text: *Soon, the field will fill with tanksmy tanks

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank011Subtitle.text: *Nice base, Generalcare to surrender it?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank013Subtitle.text: *We're in your base, General; your defenses were inadequate

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank014Subtitle.text: *You dare attack my War Factory! All forces, remove this pest!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank016Subtitle.text: *Another battalion is on its way, General, please make them feel welcome

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank017Subtitle.text: *Ah, this is the part of the battle I enjoy the mostthe part just before I finish off my enemy

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank018Subtitle.text: *Tanks: move fasterbefore our opponent considers an actual attack

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank019Subtitle.text: *It's quiet out there, General. There must be a lot of tanks rolling towards your base, don't you think?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank020Subtitle.text: *I'm going to take this time to construct more defensesno, wait, I'll build more tanks instead

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank021Subtitle.text: *This area was once fertile farm land. Soon your blood will make it fertile again

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank023Subtitle.text: *Enjoy the rest, General--soon the attacks will begin again

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank024Subtitle.text: *We're awaiting your assault, General, but I'm beginning to wonder if it will ever come

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank025Subtitle.text: *Our War Factories are working hard to make more tanks, just for you, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank026Subtitle.text: *How much longer can you survive such loses, General? Perhaps it is time to consider surrender

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank027Subtitle.text: *Tanks amass in our base, preparing for the final assault. Will your defenses hold this time?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank028Subtitle.text: *Soon we will remove you from our lands

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank029Subtitle.text: *This will be your last chance to prove yourself, General. Soon my tanks will end your pitiful army

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank030Subtitle.text: *You cannot believe your luck will hold out much longercan you, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank031Subtitle.text: *You didn't want that Tech Building, did you?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank032Subtitle.text: *Your Barracks has fallen to my tanks, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank033Subtitle.text: *There goes your factory, General. How will you match my armor now?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank034Subtitle.text: *Without your airfield you've lost your only chance against me, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank035Subtitle.text: *Your defenses fall like toys before my armor

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank036Subtitle.text: *You can't lost your Command Center and all hope to win against me, General. I await your surrender

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank037Subtitle.text: *You've lost a lot of buildings, Generalisn't it time to surrender?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank038Subtitle.text: *That tech building was mine, General; you will regret destroying it

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank039Subtitle.text: *So, you've destroyed my Barracks--so be it. Now I will destroy yours

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank040Subtitle.text: *We will rebuild that War Factory. Soon the tanks will again flow to your base like water

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank041Subtitle.text: *Destroying my Airfield will not stop me, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank042Subtitle.text: *Destroying my defenses only let's me know where you are, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank043Subtitle.text: *General, you are destroying an unacceptable number of my buildings. This must stop

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank044Subtitle.text: *You've destroyed my Command CenterI am impressed, General...few survive this long

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank045Subtitle.text: *You're shooting at my planes?! Do you think this is the best tactic against me, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank046Subtitle.text: *Enough! Do not destroy any more of my tanks, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank048Subtitle.text: *General, I need that Oil Derrick for my tanks. Release it to me or pay

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank049Subtitle.text: *That Artillery Platform is no match for my armor, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank050Subtitle.text: *Ah, I see you captured an Oil Refinery. Perhaps I should take it from you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank051Subtitle.text: *We are approaching you base, General. Prepare yourself

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank052Subtitle.text: *Ah, my tanks are almost in range of your base. This should be over soon

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank053Subtitle.text: *We've breached your defenses, General. Now your factories will begin to fall

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank054Subtitle.text: *Thank you for inviting us into your base, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank055Subtitle.text: *I see your flank is exposed, General. I expected as much

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank056Subtitle.text: *There are no guards at your backdoor--a fatal mistake on your part, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank057Subtitle.text: *I see you've built a second base, General. It will soon be removed

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank058Subtitle.text: *Ah, I've found your Tech Building. Now, should I destroy it or capture it?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank059Subtitle.text: *Your power is down--your forces are finished

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank060Subtitle.text: *I would suggest restoring your power, Generalbefore we turn it off permanently

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank061Subtitle.text: *Your supply pile looks lownow nothing can stop us

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank063Subtitle.text: *And what you plan to do with that Scud Storm, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank064Subtitle.text: *And now this war has gone nuclearexcellent

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank065Subtitle.text: *That Particle Cannon will never live to fire on me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank066Subtitle.text: *So many base defenses, Generalall so useless

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank067Subtitle.text: *So, you're trying to match my tanks in the field. I question your tactics, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank068Subtitle.text: *I see many planes, General--like gnats waiting to be swatted out of the sky

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank069Subtitle.text: *You have trained too many men, General; they will all be crushed beneath my treads

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank070Subtitle.text: *Your base has grown too large, General--my tanks will enjoy the target practice

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank071Subtitle.text: *Your Scud Storm will harm us, but now you have made me angry, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank072Subtitle.text: *Only a failed General would resort to nuclear missiles

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank073Subtitle.text: *This particle beam will not defeat us, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank074Subtitle.text: *Yes, garrison your buildings--you only delay the inevitable

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank075Subtitle.text: *No one soldier can turn the tide, not even Colonel Burton

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank076Subtitle.text: *Ah, Black Lotus, you grace us with your presence. Perhaps you would consider fighting for me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank077Subtitle.text: *All tanks beware: Jarmen Kell has entered the field

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank078Subtitle.text: *An Air Field is a wise choice against me, but it won't save you from defeat, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank079Subtitle.text: *Build your War Factories, General; they still will not produce tanks capable of stopping mine

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank080Subtitle.text: *I see you've built a Barracks, General. Please, try to keep your men out from under my tanks

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank081Subtitle.text: *Yes, sell all of your buildings and flee from the field, General. This battle is lost to you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank082Subtitle.text: *You are losing, General. This battle is mine

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank083Subtitle.text: *All hope is gone now, General. Surrender or die

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank084Subtitle.text: *General, my forces outnumber yoursit is only a matter to time now

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank085Subtitle.text: *Your inferior strategy has lead you to this place, General. You can't win now

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank086Subtitle.text: *My victory was assured from the beginning

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank087Subtitle.text: *Your tactics have given you a momentary advantage,General, but you won't maintain it

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank088Subtitle.text: *No! You will not win, General. We will build more tanks and defeat you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank089Subtitle.text: *Your cowardly tactics may have gotten you this far, but this foolishness ends now

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank090Subtitle.text: *I think I've let you win long enough, General. Prepare for the end

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank091Subtitle.text: *Arrrrrgh! This cannot be! How have you defeated my tanks?!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank093Subtitle.text: *Your tank rush is nothing compared to mine

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank094Subtitle.text: *Don't challenge my tanks, General--you will lose

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank095Subtitle.text: *My armor will crush your pathetic forces

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank096Subtitle.text: *You may have defeated my tanks, General, but the Tigress will crush you like an insect

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank097Subtitle.text: *Tanks are the key to any victory, as you well know

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank098Subtitle.text: *I see you defeated my scouts, General. The next attack won't go so well for you, I think

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank099Subtitle.text: *Here we come, General, I hope your defenses are up

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank100Subtitle.text: *And these are just my Battlemasters, Generaljust wait until the Overlord join the battle

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Tank101Subtitle.text: *I'd be careful, General, sometimes the Red Guard like to take over buildings while you're busy with my tanks

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin002Subtitle.text: *One taste, and you'll never go back -- even if you wanted to!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin003Subtitle.text: *Have a taste of my own medicine!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin004Subtitle.text: *How long can you hold your breath?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin006Subtitle.text: *It's not so bad. You should only feel a long and painful burning after this!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin008Subtitle.text: *Here we come, General, like a chemical spill

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin009Subtitle.text: *It's so hard to find a doctor that makes housecalls, but Dr. Thrax does

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin011Subtitle.text: *Like acid rain, we decend upon your base, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin012Subtitle.text: *Go forth, my toxic warriors! Bring our message to the masses!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin013Subtitle.text: *Oh, you're going to like this, General. No, waitno you won't

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin014Subtitle.text: *You've brought this on yourself, General. Now watch your men pay for your mistake

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin016Subtitle.text: *That's right -- sit back and relax! Give my toxins more time to work!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin019Subtitle.text: *Every moment you delay, you die a little bit more!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin020Subtitle.text: *You can tell they're just right when the flesh falls off the bone!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin023Subtitle.text: *And breathe in out and again feel better?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin025Subtitle.text: *I'll give you a "breather" before our next attack

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin026Subtitle.text: *We have a clogged toxin nozzle, Generalgive me a second to fix it

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin027Subtitle.text: *You'll come for the toxin, but you'll staybecause you're dead!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin028Subtitle.text: *You will regret intruding on my experiments, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin029Subtitle.text: *Are you going to attack me, or are you afraid of what you might find at my base, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin030Subtitle.text: *Nothing can live beneath my toxic cloud, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin033Subtitle.text: *Ohh general, looks like your troops can't hold their toxin

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin034Subtitle.text: *Your Air Field is destroyed, General. Now you'll have to walk through my clouds of death

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin035Subtitle.text: *Notice how the toxins tear everything apart?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin036Subtitle.text: *Argh! I had my wine collection in there!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin037Subtitle.text: *My toxins and your troops certainly have chemistry!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin039Subtitle.text: *Now where will my chemical soldiers come from?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin041Subtitle.text: *See, people don't belong in the air

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin043Subtitle.text: *Stop destroying my buildings, General, or I will make thingsunpleasant for you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin044Subtitle.text: *You've destroyed my Command Center! Ah well, I always hated my commanders anywaynow it's just you and me, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin045Subtitle.text: *General, if you keep destroying my vehicles, how can I bring you your medicine?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin046Subtitle.text: *My brave warriors! How can you do this to them? What did they ever do to-- oh wait, never mind

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin047Subtitle.text: *Give that Oil Derrick back! Don't you know petroleum is a key ingredient in my toxins?!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin048Subtitle.text: *That Artillery Platform will not stop me, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin049Subtitle.text: *General, I need that Refinery to purify my toxins. What could you possibly need it for?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin050Subtitle.text: *Did I give you permission to come in?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin051Subtitle.text: *What are you doing in here? The recipes are mine!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin052Subtitle.text: *You are a fool to come into my base, General!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin053Subtitle.text: *You are too close to my precious toxins, General. Now you must die

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin054Subtitle.text: *Stay away from my scud missiles! I'll give them to you when I'm ready!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin055Subtitle.text: *I don't think you want those supplies, they aren't  ready yet

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin056Subtitle.text: *I see you're building another base. Soon it will be abandoned

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin057Subtitle.text: *Get out of my village, General. There's not much left of it, but it is mine!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin058Subtitle.text: *Be careful as you cross that bridge, General--the water below isn't safe for swimming

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin059Subtitle.text: *Watch out, General, that bridge might not be safebut then, what is around here?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin060Subtitle.text: *Do you think you're being clever, sneaking in my backdoor?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin061Subtitle.text: *So, you've made it across the river. Now the battle gets interesting

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin062Subtitle.text: *It looks like you're out of power, General. Perhaps I should attack now

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin063Subtitle.text: *You're out of power, General. It's time for me to come and play

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin064Subtitle.text: *Your resource pile has grown small,General. I don't think you have enough left to stop my next attackexcellent

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin065Subtitle.text: *Budget?! I don't want to hear about the budget!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin066Subtitle.text: *You dare to build a Scud Storm in my presence! You know, of course, that we are all immune to its toxins, right, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin067Subtitle.text: *A Nuke Silo? I would not have expected you to use toxic radiationperhaps we could work together sometime

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin068Subtitle.text: *So, a Particle Cannon to counter my toxins, eh? Your technology is no match for my toxins, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin070Subtitle.text: *Metal is only a temporary barrier to my toxins!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin071Subtitle.text: *Ah -- coward! Your pilots still need to breathe!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin072Subtitle.text: *Do you enjoy seeing your men glow in the dark? Build more, then!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin073Subtitle.text: *Your base has grown large, Generala perfect target for my Scud Storm

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin074Subtitle.text: *Yes, fire your Scud Stormvisit your useless toxins upon my base

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin075Subtitle.text: *Your nuclear missile will only mutate us and make us stronger, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin076Subtitle.text: *You cannot hope to clear my toxins with that particle beam, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin077Subtitle.text: *Yes, garrison that building--I'm sure my Toxin Tractors will love that

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin078Subtitle.text: *If you bring Colonel Burton into this I'll have to release Jarmen Kell

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin079Subtitle.text: *Black Lotus? You know, of course, that the black lotus is a poisonous flowerI think that's in one of my toxinsbut I digress

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin080Subtitle.text: *I see Jarmen Kell has joined our little war. Perhaps mine would enjoy a sniper duel

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin081Subtitle.text: *Now what do you want with that Air Field, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin082Subtitle.text: *So our General builds a War Factory. How predictable of you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin083Subtitle.text: *Yeeesss, build a Barracks--send you men to me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin084Subtitle.text: *Sell off allyour buildings, Generaland send your men to me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin085Subtitle.text: *Give up now, and I guarantee you'll breathe easy

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin086Subtitle.text: *Your troops are short of breath, General. Give up!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin087Subtitle.text: *My second wind spells your doom, General!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin088Subtitle.text: *Let me drown your sorrows with a nice toxin!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin090Subtitle.text: *You are defeated, General. Perhaps this will teach you to defy Dr. Thrax

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin091Subtitle.text: *Would you consider a peace offering? An antidote, perhaps?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin092Subtitle.text: *Perhaps I've inhaled too many of my own toxins--You can't possibly be defeating me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin093Subtitle.text: *Get away from me! You will not defeat me, General. Do you hear me!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin094Subtitle.text: *What do you have against toxins? Have you seen what they put in food these days?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin095Subtitle.text: *Even if you defeat me, my toxins will get to you -- eventually!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin096Subtitle.text: *No! No. I am defeated. Now where is that cyanide capsule

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin097Subtitle.text: *That button was covered with poisonyou're already dead

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin098Subtitle.text: *You dare select Dr. Thrax? You should reconsider, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin100Subtitle.text: *Perhaps I shouldn't have gotten my degree from a mail-order college

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin101Subtitle.text: *You thought my toxins were ineffective and now look what has happened to you, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin102Subtitle.text: *Hello, General. Do not think I cannot see your spies flying over my base. Please, look all you wish, because this may be the last time you ever see my stronghold

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin103Subtitle.text: *As you can see, my defenses are impenetrable...and my toxic weapon systems will poison your troops long before they can reach me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin104Subtitle.text: *And do not worry about hurting the civilian population, General; they have long since fled this valley of toxic death. Our little war will play-out uninterruptedand your delicate sensibilities will not be taxed

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin105Subtitle.text: *Ah yes, and here is where you've placed your pathetic base. Now make your stand against me--Dr. Thrax--and once your forces have breathed their last breath of my toxic air, I can return to my experiments

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin106Subtitle.text: *Do you trust your senses, General? By engaging me, you have doomed yourself to a long and painful death, for I am Dr. Thrax, and my weapons strike unseen!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin107Subtitle.text: *Breathe easy, General, for I am Dr. Thrax, and with every breath you take, you are on your way to defeat!
