DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin109Subtitle.text: *Would you like the green or the blue? Both are equally satisfying!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin110Subtitle.text: *Prepare to tell your 3-eyed grandchildren of your defeat this day!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin111Subtitle.text: *My precious chemicals! Do you know how long it takes to mix those?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin112Subtitle.text: *More victi- ah- volunteers for my experiments!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin113Subtitle.text: *Now I have more vehicles to ferry my toxins! So generous of you!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin114Subtitle.text: *Oh, did I forget to tell you about those? Watch the mines, General!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin115Subtitle.text: *Now where did I put those chemical troops?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Toxin118Subtitle.text: *Ah yes, and here is where you've placed your pathetic base

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle001Subtitle.text: *Oh, you're still here, General. I'm impressed by your determination. Let's dance

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle002Subtitle.text: *That didn't hurt too much, did it?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle003Subtitle.text: *The battlefield is a rough place, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle006Subtitle.text: *Everything seems to be going my way

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle008Subtitle.text: *Tactical superiority is key, General. Here, let me show you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle009Subtitle.text: *I really don't think you're going to be able to stop this next attackdo you?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle010Subtitle.text: *Here comes another attackoh, and almost all of my Generals Powers are ready to gowhich one do you want to see first?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle011Subtitle.text: *Is that my Superweapon ready to go? Oh no, my attacks just feel like that

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle012Subtitle.text: *All units: Attack pattern alpha! Just kiddingwho would call something "alpha"?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle013Subtitle.text: *Here comes some of my units, General. Would you mind helping them gain some veterancy?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle014Subtitle.text: *I rarely send in the troops, but you deserve special attention, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle015Subtitle.text: *I warn you not to underestimate me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle016Subtitle.text: *You may think I'm hiding, but I'm really just planning

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle017Subtitle.text: *Fools rush in, General. I take my time

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle018Subtitle.text: *You don't know what to expect from me, do you?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle019Subtitle.text: *If you fail to plan, you plan to fail, General. Think about it

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle020Subtitle.text: *My greatest "super weapon" is my brainwouldn't you agree, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle021Subtitle.text: *Come on, General, take your best shot

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle022Subtitle.text: *We're waiting for you, General. What's keeping you?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle023Subtitle.text: *I've been analyzing you tactics and I'm just amazeddo you even have any tactics, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle024Subtitle.text: *I'd attack if I were you, General. If you wait then I'll just have one more Superweapon to fire at you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle025Subtitle.text: *So, your over-all strategy is to bore me off the battlefield?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle026Subtitle.text: *Are you rethinking the wisdom of attacking me, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle027Subtitle.text: *I've been trying to go easy on you, General, but you're starting to annoy me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle028Subtitle.text: *This has been fun, General, but I think it's time to end this

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle029Subtitle.text: *Maybe we should do this some other timewhen you're not so distractedat least, I hope that's what's wrong. You did say you were a "general", right?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle031Subtitle.text: *I didn't like the look of that Barracks, at all

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle032Subtitle.text: *Your vehicles are getting on my nerves

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle033Subtitle.text: *Stay out of the air, General--you'll be safer on the ground

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle034Subtitle.text: *Was that supposed to keep me out of your base, General?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle035Subtitle.text: *Wow, you just lost your Command Center. That's not very good, is it

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle036Subtitle.text: *Your base was much too cluttered before

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle037Subtitle.text: *You have no respect for other people's property!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle038Subtitle.text: *People, who was supposed to be guarding the Barracks!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle040Subtitle.text: *Is keeping my air field too much to ask

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle041Subtitle.text: *I put that there for a reason!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle042Subtitle.text: *I had just gotten all of those buildings where I wanted them

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle043Subtitle.text: *I don't appreciate that kind of disrespect!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle044Subtitle.text: *I built all of those planes for a reason!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle045Subtitle.text: *Destroy as many vehicles as you like. See if I care

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle049Subtitle.text: *Capturing the Refinery? Why, General, I didn't know you were so efficiency conscious

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle051Subtitle.text: *I don't think you have the right security clearance to be here

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle052Subtitle.text: *What gives you the right to be in my base?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle053Subtitle.text: *This is my base, get out now!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle054Subtitle.text: *Don't expect me to be a good hostess

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle056Subtitle.text: *What do you think you're doing here?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle058Subtitle.text: *Your presence is starting to bother me, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle059Subtitle.text: *Who was supposed to be guarding that area?!?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle060Subtitle.text: *So you've managed to crack my defensesthat won't happen again

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle061Subtitle.text: *Get out of my base, General. Don't think I'm above dropping the Particle Cannon right here

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle062Subtitle.text: *It's looking a little dark in your base, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle063Subtitle.text: *Did someone forget to pay the electric bill?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle064Subtitle.text: *You didn't manage your resources very wisely, did you?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle066Subtitle.text: *How could this have happened! I had everything planned so perfectly!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle067Subtitle.text: *Do you think I'm scared of your little Scud Storm?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle069Subtitle.text: *I appreciate your choice in weaponry, but I'm the only one allowed to have a Particle Cannon on this battlefield

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle070Subtitle.text: *Is that as secure as your base can be? Is it?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle071Subtitle.text: *That's a lot of tanks, General. Have you seen what a Particle Cannon can do to a lot of tanks?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle072Subtitle.text: *All these planes are just air pollution to me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle073Subtitle.text: *So many troops, General. You weren't actually planning to rush me with them were you?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle074Subtitle.text: *That's quite a base you have going there, General. You did remember to space out your buildings to avoid weapon strikes, right?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle075Subtitle.text: *Do you know how long it's going to take to clean that up?!?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle076Subtitle.text: *Get that disgusting radiation out of my base!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle077Subtitle.text: *Hey, that's my Particle Cannon! You're not authorized to use it!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle078Subtitle.text: *Is that a tactical move, or are you just hiding?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle079Subtitle.text: *Colonel Burton? Really? Do you think he's going to help you?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle080Subtitle.text: *Black Lotus? I guess it's just a girl-power showdown, isn't it?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle081Subtitle.text: *Jarmen Kell! He better stay away from my tanks!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle082Subtitle.text: *Nice Air Field, General--just keep those planes away from my Particle Cannon

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle083Subtitle.text: *A War Factory? You're seriously going to attack me, aren't you? It's about time

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle084Subtitle.text: *Good for you - you can build a barracks

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle085Subtitle.text: *Selling your buildings? Is that part of your going out of business sale?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle086Subtitle.text: *Why don't you just give up? I have better things I could be doing today

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle087Subtitle.text: *Why can't I ever find one that lasts more than 5 minutes

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle088Subtitle.text: *Looks like you're losing, General. Now what did I say about planning to fail?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle089Subtitle.text: *That's quite a beating you're taking, General. Are you ready for more?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle090Subtitle.text: *I'd like to say, "good fight," but clearly your mind wasn't in it, General

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle091Subtitle.text: *I can't believe you would beat-up on a girl like this

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle092Subtitle.text: *I need time to think. Go away, General!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle093Subtitle.text: *Your tactics are hardly sporting, General. Play nice!

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle094Subtitle.text: *General, look over there! Someone is capturing your buildings! Didn't buy it, huh?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle095Subtitle.text: *You know, if you were a gentleman, you'd give me five minutes to rebuild my defenses

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle096Subtitle.text: *What?! It's over? Well, it was nice dancing with you, General. Maybe next time I'll lead

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle097Subtitle.text: *My Super Weapons are ready... are you?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle099Subtitle.text: *Your rush tactics won't work on me

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle100Subtitle.text: *It's not fair! One more Super Weapon and I would have beaten you, General. Challenge me again, I dare you

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle101Subtitle.text: *I told you you'd never beat my Super Weapons, General. Care to try again?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle102Subtitle.text: *Welcome, General. Are you ready to begin?

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle103Subtitle.text: *Oh, what's that sound? Now I see a light in the sky... Hmm

DIALOGEVENT:Taunts_Turtle106Subtitle.text: *oh dearI'm sorry, General, but that's just how I like to say, "hello." Well, good luck, General

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina001Subtitl.text: *The Americans use the Sentry Drone as an early warning enemy detection system. The drone becomes invisible when it is not moving, and we've seen some of them upgraded with machine guns. Though no match for tanks, the drone can cause problems for foot soldiers

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina002Subtitl.text: *The American Microwave Tank is a big microwave gun that disables structures and vehicles. The radiation from the tank can also hurt infantry, so keep our men at a safe distance

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina003Subtitl.text: *The Avenger is an American laser based anti-air vehicle able to shoot down missiles and aircraft. It also helps other US units target our planes, so they should be considered high priority targets when encountered within a battle group

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina004Subtitl.text: *The Specter Gunship is a large jet powered aircraft with multiple weapon systems fixed to its side enabling it to circle a target area and rain death from above. Typical American engineering--using a shotgun to swat a fly

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina005Subtitl.text: *The Chemical Suit upgrade, makes infantry more resistant to toxins and radiation

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina006Subtitl.text: *The US Countermeasures upgrade reduces the effectiveness of enemy fire against their air units. Missiles will often miss, and bullets do less damage

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina007Subtitl.text: *The US Hellfire Drone upgrade creates an remote air drone that defends the parent vehicle with an automated hellfire missile system

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina008Subtitl.text: *The Bunker Buster is an upgrade to the US Stealth Fighter and the Aurora designed to penetrate garrisoned buildings

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina009Subtitl.text: *The Supply Lines Upgrade increases the rate that the US gathers resources from supply docks, supply drops, and oil derricks

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina010Subtitl.text: *The US Generals have seen the wisdom of propaganda. By using a Leaflet Drop they are able to temporarily disable units while they stop to read the propaganda

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina011Subtitl.text: *The MOAB is an upgrade to the US Fuel Air Bomb that includes a stun ability, temporarily shutting down surviving units and structures

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina012Subtitl.text: *The US Fire Base structure is a defensive position surrounded by sandbags and includes a howitzer and 4 firing positions

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina013Subtitl.text: *The Napalm Bomb is an upgrade to our Helix airship, allowing it to drop a pair of bombs which create a large firestorm effect

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina014Subtitl.text: *Our Listening Outpost is a slow, stealthed vehicle with a large sight radius, that can be garrisoned with 2 infantry as guards. Besides uncovering stealthed objects, it can be used to determine enemy destinations by clicking on units in range

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina015Subtitl.text: *Our Helix 2 airship is a slow transport helicopter that can carry infantry or a single vehicle. Although armed with a light machine gun, it can be upgraded with the Gattling Cannon, Propaganda Tower, or Battle Bunker. It can also be upgraded to carry a large napalm bomb

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina016Subtitl.text: *The ECM Tank disrupts electronic tracking systems, diverting enemy missile fire. It's electro-magnetic pulse can be used to disable a single enemy vehicle. It also creates a radar jamming field that disables all drones within its range

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina017Subtitl.text: *The Neutron Shell is an upgrade to our Nuclear Cannon, allowing it to fire neutron shells. These shells kill all infantry, and vehicle pilots inside the blast radius

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina018Subtitl.text: *The Systems Hack allows your hackers to steal a random Generals power from our enemies. Level 1 allows theft of a 1-star or 3-star power, while level 2 allows theft of a 5-star power

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina019Subtitl.text: *Our new Carpet Bomber plane drops a series of bombs along a targeted path, decimating all enemy forces

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina020Subtitl.text: *Our Neutron Mines are an alternative to standard explosive mines. Neutron Mines instantly disable vehicles and kill any nearby infantry

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina021Subtitl.text: *Our hackers, once vulnerable to attack, will find safety and increased hacking ability in our new Internet Center

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina022Subtitl.text: *The Satellite Hack I is an internet Center upgrade that allows a reveal around every opponent's Command Center

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina023Subtitl.text: *The Satellite Hack II is an Internet Center upgrade that grants a temporarily reveals the entire map, including stealthed enemy forces

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina024Subtitl.text: *The GLA Saboteur is a stealth infantry unit that can climb cliffs and effect enemy buildings by entering them. Entering a power plant will temporarily cut power, while entering a superweapon will reset the timer. A saboteur who enters an enemy command center will reset the timers on all enemy General's Powers

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina025Subtitl.text: *The Combat Cycle initially comes with a GLA Rebel driver and a mounted machine gun. The Rebel can be replaced with any other GLA infantry, granting the cycle their unique powers

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina026Subtitl.text: *The GLA Battle Bus can hold up to 8 infantry, who fire out windows. If destroyed, the heavy steel cabin remains like a bunker

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina027Subtitl.text: *The GLA have upgraded their Workers with Shoes to squeeze even more forced labor from their peasants

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina028Subtitl.text: *The Camo Netting is an upgrade to GLA base defense structures, making them invisible to normal detection

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina029Subtitl.text: *The GLA have begun garrisoning Elite Guard troops equipped with RPGs in all their structures. Use caution when infiltrating any GLA bases

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina030Subtitl.text: *The GLA Booby Trap upgrade enables the rebel to wire structures and civilian vehicles to explode when the enemy attempts to capture or garrison them. Watch for Rebels lurking around buildings in your area

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina031Subtitl.text: *The GLA tricks have reached a new level. They are now building Fake Structures that look like their real buildings, but are only booby-trapped facades. Destroy everything from range to avoid any GLA surprises

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina032Subtitl.text: *The GPS Scrambler targets an area of units and makes them invisible to normal detection

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina033Subtitl.text: *The Sneak Attack power allows GLA Generals to place a defenseless tunnel network anywhere they have explored. Although slightly weaker than a normal tunnel, it is connected to the main network

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina034Subtitl.text: *The Artillery Platform is a fixed-position cannon capable of single-handedly controlling an area from enemy assault. It should be a priority capture on any battlefield

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina035Subtitl.text: *A Reinforcement Pad allows a free periodic armor airdrop. Free Battlemasters can turn the tide of any battle

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXChina036Subtitl.text: *The Repair Bay tech building, when captured, allows battlefield repairs for any ground vehicles. Repairs for damaged armor in a forward position can make the difference between victory and defeat

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA001Subtitle.text: *Be careful of the American Sentry Drone, General; it can see stealthed units and often has a mounted gun

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA002Subtitle.text: *The US Microwave Tank has a beam that disables structures and units. It should be attacked by large groups only

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA003Subtitle.text: *The US Warlock Tank has a beam that disables structures and units. It should be attacked by large groups only

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA004Subtitle.text: *The US Avenger is a powerful laser-base anti-air vehiclebut we have no planes, so the danger from it is minimal

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA005Subtitle.text: *The American Specter Gunship is a large plane with big guns. Do not engage it--seek refuge underground until it leaves the area

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA006Subtitle.text: *With the Chemical Suit upgrade, enemy infantry become more resistant to our toxins. But that won't stop our bullets, will it?

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA007Subtitle.text: *The Countermeasures upgrade reduces the effect of enemy fire against US air units. Missiles will often miss, and bullets do less damage

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA008Subtitle.text: *The US Hellfire Drone upgrade is a little toy plane with a missile attached. Another example of American's cowardly tactics

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA009Subtitle.text: *The Bunker Buster Bomb is an upgrade to the US Stealth Fighter and the Aurora. They use it to try to attack our bunkers

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA010Subtitle.text: *The Supply Lines Upgrade increases the rate that the US gathers resources from supply docks, supply drops, and oil derricks

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA011Subtitle.text: *The US Leaflet Drop temporarily disables our units as they stop to read the propaganda

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA012Subtitle.text: *The MOAB is an upgrade to the Fuel Air Bomb that includes a stun ability, temporarily shutting down surviving units and structures

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA013Subtitle.text: *The Fire Base is the American answer to our Stinger sites...but watch out for the big cannon in the middle

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA014Subtitle.text: *China's Napalm Bomb is a Helix upgrade, allowing it to drop a pair of bombs which create a large firestorm

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA015Subtitle.text: *The Listening Outpost is a slow, stealthed vehicle the China uses to find our stealthed units. Avoid them to remain hidden

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA016Subtitle.text: *China's Helix 2 is a slow transport helicopter that can carry infantry or a single vehicle

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA017Subtitle.text: *The Chinese ECM Tank is a vehicle which disrupts electronic tracking systems, diverting enemy missile fire

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA018Subtitle.text: *The Neutron Shell is an upgrade to the Chinese Nuke Cannon, allowing it to fire neutron shells. These shells kill all infantry, and vehicle pilots inside the blast radius

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA019Subtitle.text: *China's new Systems Hack technique allows hackers to steal a random power from their enemies. Such is the downfall of depending on power to fight wars

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA020Subtitle.text: *The Carpet Bomber is a plane that drops a series of bombs along a targeted path, decimating the enemy

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA021Subtitle.text: *The Neutron Mines are an alternative to standard Chinese Mines which disable vehicles. The mines still kill infantry as well

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA022Subtitle.text: *The Internet Center allows China's hackers to increase their effectiveness

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA023Subtitle.text: *The Satellite Hack I is an internet Center upgrade that allows China to see every opponent's Command Center

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA024Subtitle.text: *The Satellite Hack II is a Chinese Internet Center upgrade that grants a temporary reveal of the entire map, as well as revealing stealthed objects

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA025Subtitle.text: *The Saboteur is a stealth unit that can climb cliffs and effect enemy buildings by entering them

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA026Subtitle.text: *Our new Combat Cycle has mounted machine guns and is enhanced by the abilities of any infantry riding it

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA027Subtitle.text: *The Battle Bus is a slow moving transport that can hold up to 8 infantry, who may fire out of the bus. If destroyed, the hull of the Battle Bus remains and functions like a bunker

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA028Subtitle.text: *The Worker Shoes upgrade increase speed and gathering efficiency for all our loyal workers

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA029Subtitle.text: *The Camo Netting is an upgrade to our base defense structures, allowing them to be stealthed

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA030Subtitle.text: *The Elite Guard Upgrade is a structure ability, garrisoning the structure with 4 RPG Troopers

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA031Subtitle.text: *The Booby Trap is an upgrade to the rebel, allowing the unit to wire structures and civilian vehicles to explode when the enemy attempts to capture or garrison them. Captured structures are automatically booby trapped

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA032Subtitle.text: *Fake Structures can be built for a greatly reduced cost. These buildings are initially a booby-trapped façade, but can be upgraded to fully functional versions of the structure

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA033Subtitle.text: *Our newly acquired GPS Scrambler targets an area of units and renders them invisible to enemies

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA034Subtitle.text: *Our Sneak Attack allows placement of a defenseless tunnel network at any area that has been explored. Although slightly weaker than a normal tunnel, it is connected to the main network

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA035Subtitle.text: *The Artillery Platform fires a weapon similar to the US Strategy Center in terms of range and damage. Capture or avoid its deadly cannon

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA036Subtitle.text: *The Reinforcement Pad periodically delivers a group of Scorpion tanks for our cause

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXGLA037Subtitle.text: *The Repair Bay is a front-line repair facility for vehicles. It repairs vehicles like an Arms Dealer

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA001Subtitle.text: *The Sentry Drone is a mobile unit capable of tracking enemy movements, including those that are camouflaged. The Sentry Drone itself is also capable of stealth when not moving, and may be upgraded with an anti-personnel machine gun from the strategy center

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA002Subtitle.text: *The Microwave Tank is armed with a Direct-Energy microwave panel that disables targeted structures and vehicles. It also emits a continuous microwave field which damages infantry

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA003Subtitle.text: *The Warlock tank is armed with a Direct-Energy microwave panel that disables targeted structures and vehicles. It also emits a continuous microwave field which damages infantry

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA004Subtitle.text: *The Avenger is a laser based anti-air vehicle able to shoot down missiles and aircraft. It can also award bonuses to units attacking it's "painted" target

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA005Subtitle.text: *The Specter Gunship is a large jet powered aircraft with multiple weapon systems fixed to it's wings. While it circles the target, it auto-acquires enemies. Manual targeting is allowed, and it can upgrade to deploy countermeasures

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA006Subtitle.text: *With the Chemical Suit upgrade, infantry become more resistant to toxins and radiation

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA007Subtitle.text: *The Countermeasures upgrade reduces the effect of enemy fire against US air units. Missiles will often miss, and bullets do less damage

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA008Subtitle.text: *The Hellfire Drone upgrade equips the parent vehicle with a drone capable of firing a single missile. The drones auto-acquire and require time to reload

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA009Subtitle.text: *The Bunker Buster is an upgrade to the Stealth Fighter and the Aurora. In addition to their normal effects, these upgraded missiles damage and even kill units garrisoned within structures, including the GLA Palace, Tunnel Network, and the Chinese Battle Bunker

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA010Subtitle.text: *The Supply Lines Upgrade increases the amount of money gathered from supply docks, supply drops, and oil derricks

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA011Subtitle.text: *The Leaflet Drop temporarily disables units as they stop to read the propaganda. The plane dispenses leaflets over the targeted area and the effect only lasts a short time

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA012Subtitle.text: *The MOAB is an upgrade to the Fuel Air Bomb that includes a stun ability, temporarily shutting down surviving units and structures

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA013Subtitle.text: *The Fire Base is surrounded by sandbags and includes a howitzer and 4 firing positions. Infantry entering the Fire Base will take firing positions behind the sandbags

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA014Subtitle.text: *The Napalm Bomb is a Helix upgrade, allowing it to drop a pair of bombs which create a large firestorm

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA015Subtitle.text: *The Listening Outpost is a slow, stealthed vehicle with a large sight radius, and can be garrisoned with 2 infantry as guards. Besides uncovering stealthed objects, it can be used to determine enemy destinations by clicking on units in range

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA016Subtitle.text: *The Helix 2 is a slow transport helicopter that can carry infantry or a single vehicle. Although armed with a light machine gun, it can be upgraded with the Gattling Cannon, Propaganda Tower, or Battle Bunker. It can also be upgraded to carry a large napalm bomb

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA017Subtitle.text: *The ECM Tank is a vehicle which disrupts electronic tracking systems, diverting enemy missile fire. It's ECM pulse can be used to disable single enemy vehicles. Finally, it creates a radar jamming field, disabling all drones within its range

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA018Subtitle.text: *The Neutron Shell is an upgrade to the Chinese Nuke Cannon, allowing it to fire neutron shells. These shells kill all infantry, and vehicle pilots inside the blast radius

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA019Subtitle.text: *The Systems Hack allows your hackers to steal a random power from your enemies. Level 1 allows theft of a tier 1 or 3 power, while level 2 allows theft of a 5-star power

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA020Subtitle.text: *The Carpet Bomber is a plane that drops a series of bombs along a targeted path, decimating the enemy

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA021Subtitle.text: *The Neutron Mines are an alternative to standard Chinese Mines which disable vehicles. The mines still kill infantry as well

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA022Subtitle.text: *The Internet Center allows hackers to increase their effectiveness at generating money, and allows the use of Satellite Hacks I & II

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA023Subtitle.text: *The Satellite Hack I is an internet Center upgrade that allows a reveal around every opponent's Command Center

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA024Subtitle.text: *The Satellite Hack II is an internet Center upgrade that grants a temporary reveal of the entire map, as well as revealing stealthed objects

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA025Subtitle.text: *The Saboteur is a stealth unit that can climb cliffs and effect enemy buildings by entering them. Entering a power plant will temporarily cut power, while entering a superweapon will reset the timer. A saboteur who enters an enemy command center will reset the timers on all enemy General's Powers

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA026Subtitle.text: *The Combat Cycle initially comes with a Rebel driver and a mounted machine gun. Replacing him with a RPG Trooper will allow the bike to fire missiles. A Terrorist will create a suicide bike. Jarmen Kell, Hijackers, and Saboteurs can also ride, making the bike stealthed

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA027Subtitle.text: *The Battle Van is a slow moving transport that can hold up to 8 infantry, who may fire out of the bus. If destroyed, the hull of the Battle Van remains and functions like a bunker. If it is destroyed, anyone inside is also killed

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA028Subtitle.text: *The Worker Shoes upgrade increase speed and gathering efficiency for all GLA workers

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA029Subtitle.text: *The Camo Netting is an upgrade to GLA base defense structures, allowing them to be stealthed

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA030Subtitle.text: *The Elite Guard Upgrade is an structure ability, garrisoning the structure with 4 RPG Troopers

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA031Subtitle.text: *The Booby Trap is an upgrade to the rebel, allowing the unit to wire structures and civilian vehicles to explode when the enemy attempts to capture or garrison them. The explosion damages everything within a small radius. Structures captured by an upgraded rebel are automatically booby trapped

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA032Subtitle.text: *Fake Structures can be built for a greatly reduced cost. These buildings are initially a booby-trapped façade, but can be upgraded to fully functional versions of the structure

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA033Subtitle.text: *The GPS Scrambler targets an area of units and renders them stealthed to enemies

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA034Subtitle.text: *The Sneak Attack allows placement of a defenseless tunnel network at any area that has been explored. Although slightly weaker than a normal tunnel, it is connected to the main network

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA035Subtitle.text: *The artillery platform is armed with a large caliber howitzer. It is an excellent suppression weapon. It is also a good gathering point from which to launch an assault

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA036Subtitle.text: *The Reinforcement Pad Periodically reinforces the player with one of his side's main battle tank (Scorpion, Battlemaster, Crusader)

DIALOGEVENT:UnitDescriptXUSA037Subtitle.text: *The Repair Bay is a repair facility for vehicles. Vehicles must dock with the structure in the same way that they must dock with the war factory
